authors_text: Xiaonan Nie,Xupeng Miao,Shijie Cao,Lingxiao Ma,Qibin Liu,Jilong Xue,Youshan Miao,Yi Liu,Zhi Yang,Bin Cui
title: EvoMoE: An Evolutional Mixture-of-Experts Training Framework via Dense-To-Sparse Gate
title_zh: EvoMoE：通过密集到稀疏门的进化专家混合训练框架
abstract: Mixture-of-experts (MoE) is becoming popular due to its success in improving the model quality, especially in Transformers. By routing tokens with a sparse gate to a few experts (i.e., a small pieces of the full model), MoE can easily increase the model parameters to a very large scale while keeping the computation cost in a constant level. Most existing works just initialize some random experts, set a fixed gating strategy (e.g., Top-k), and train the model from scratch in an ad-hoc way. We identify that these MoE models are suffering from the immature experts and unstable sparse gate, which are harmful to the convergence performance. In this paper, we propose an efficient end-to-end MoE training framework called EvoMoE. EvoMoE starts from training one single expert and gradually evolves into a large and sparse MoE structure. EvoMoE mainly contains two phases: the expert-diversify phase to train the base expert for a while and spawn multiple diverse experts from it, and the gate-sparsify phase to learn an adaptive sparse gate and activate a dynamic number of experts. EvoMoE naturally decouples the joint learning of both the experts and the sparse gate and focuses on learning the basic knowledge with a single expert at the early training stage. Then it diversifies the experts and continues to train the MoE with a novel Dense-to-Sparse gate (DTS-Gate). Specifically, instead of using a permanent sparse gate, DTS-Gate begins as a dense gate that routes tokens to all experts, then gradually and adaptively becomes sparser while routes to fewer experts. Evaluations are conducted on three popular models and tasks, including RoBERTa for masked language modeling task, GPT for language modeling task and Transformer for machine translation task. The results show that EvoMoE outperforms existing baselines, including Switch, BASE Layer, Hash Layer and StableMoE.

abstract_zh: 专家混合 (MoE) 因其在提高模型质量方面的成功而变得流行，尤其是在 Transformers 中。通过将具有稀疏门的代币路由给少数专家（即完整模型的一小部分），MoE 可以轻松地将模型参数增加到非常大的范围，同时将计算成本保持在恒定水平。大多数现有的工作只是初始化一些随机专家，设置固定的门控策略（例如，Top-k），并以临时的方式从头开始训练模型。我们发现这些 MoE 模型受到不成熟的专家和不稳定的稀疏门的影响，这对收敛性能有害。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的端到端 MoE 训练框架，称为 EvoMoE。 EvoMoE从训练单个专家开始，逐渐演变成一个大型且稀疏的MoE结构。 EvoMoE主要包含两个阶段：专家多样化阶段，训练基础专家一段时间并从中产生多个不同的专家；门稀疏阶段，学习自适应稀疏门并激活动态数量的专家。 EvoMoE自然地解耦了专家和稀疏门的联合学习，并在早期训练阶段专注于与单个专家一起学习基础知识。然后，它使专家多样化，并继续使用新颖的密集到稀疏门（DTS-Gate）来训练 MoE。具体来说，DTS-Gate 不是使用永久的稀疏门，而是从一个密集门开始，将令牌路由到所有专家，然后逐渐自适应地变得稀疏，同时路由到更少的专家。对三种流行的模型和任务进行了评估，包括用于掩码语言建模任务的 RoBERTa、用于语言建模任务的 GPT 和用于机器翻译任务的 Transformer。结果表明，EvoMoE 的性能优于现有基线，包括 Switch、BASE Layer、Hash Layer 和 StableMoE。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EvoMoE框架，通过从单专家逐步演化为稀疏结构，改进混合专家（MoE）的训练方法。
AI.motivation: 现有MoE模型因专家不成熟和稀疏门控不稳定，导致收敛性能不佳，需更高效的训练框架。
AI.method: EvoMoE分两阶段：专家多样化阶段训练基础专家并生成多个专家，门控稀疏化阶段学习自适应稀疏门控（DTS-Gate），从密集门控逐步过渡到稀疏。
AI.result: 在RoBERTa、GPT和Transformer任务中，EvoMoE优于Switch、BASE Layer等基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EvoMoE通过解耦专家与门控学习，有效提升MoE模型性能与稳定性。

Most existing works just initialize some random experts, set a fixed gating strategy (e.g., Top-k), and train the model from scratch in an ad-hoc way. We identify that these MoE models are suffering from the immature experts and unstable sparse gate, which are harmful to the convergence performance. In this paper, we propose an efficient end-to-end MoE training framework called EvoMoE. EvoMoE starts from training one single expert and gradually evolves into a large and sparse MoE structure. EvoMoE mainly contains two phases: the expert-diversify phase to train the base expert for a while and spawn multiple diverse experts from it, and the gate-sparsify phase to learn an adaptive sparse gate and activate a dynamic number of experts. EvoMoE naturally decouples the joint learning of both the experts and the sparse gate and focuses on learning the basic knowledge with a single expert at the early training stage. Then it diversifies the experts and continues to train the MoE with a novel Dense-to-Sparse gate (DTS-Gate). Specifically, instead of using a permanent sparse gate, DTS-Gate begins as a dense gate that routes tokens to all experts, then gradually and adaptively becomes sparser while routes to fewer experts. authors_text: Hitika Tiwari,Min-Hung Chen,Yi-Min Tsai,Hsien-Kai Kuo,Hung-Jen Chen,Kevin Jou,K. S. Venkatesh,Yong-Sheng Chen
title: Self-Supervised Robustifying Guidance for Monocular 3D Face Reconstruction
title_zh: 单目 3D 人脸重建的自监督鲁棒指导
comment: Accepted by The 33rd British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC) 2022. Evaluation code and datasets: https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc
comments: Accepted by The 33rd British Machine Vision Conference (BMVC) 2022. Evaluation code and datasets: https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc
abstract: Despite the recent developments in 3D Face Reconstruction from occluded and noisy face images, the performance is still unsatisfactory. Moreover, most existing methods rely on additional dependencies, posing numerous constraints over the training procedure. Therefore, we propose a Self-Supervised RObustifying GUidancE (ROGUE) framework to obtain robustness against occlusions and noise in the face images. The proposed network contains 1) the Guidance Pipeline to obtain the 3D face coefficients for the clean faces and 2) the Robustification Pipeline to acquire the consistency between the estimated coefficients for occluded or noisy images and the clean counterpart. The proposed image- and feature-level loss functions aid the ROGUE learning process without posing additional dependencies. To facilitate model evaluation, we propose two challenging occlusion face datasets, ReaChOcc and SynChOcc, containing real-world and synthetic occlusion-based face images for robustness evaluation. Also, a noisy variant of the test dataset of CelebA is produced for evaluation. Our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art method by large margins (e.g., for the perceptual errors, a reduction of 23.8% for real-world occlusions, 26.4% for synthetic occlusions, and 22.7% for noisy images), demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach. The occlusion datasets and the corresponding evaluation code are released publicly at https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc.
summary: Despite the recent developments in 3D Face Reconstruction from occluded and noisy face images, the performance is still unsatisfactory. Moreover, most existing methods rely on additional dependencies, posing numerous constraints over the training procedure. Therefore, we propose a Self-Supervised RObustifying GUidancE (ROGUE) framework to obtain robustness against occlusions and noise in the face images. The proposed network contains 1) the Guidance Pipeline to obtain the 3D face coefficients for the clean faces and 2) the Robustification Pipeline to acquire the consistency between the estimated coefficients for occluded or noisy images and the clean counterpart. The proposed image- and feature-level loss functions aid the ROGUE learning process without posing additional dependencies. To facilitate model evaluation, we propose two challenging occlusion face datasets, ReaChOcc and SynChOcc, containing real-world and synthetic occlusion-based face images for robustness evaluation. Also, a noisy variant of the test dataset of CelebA is produced for evaluation. Our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art method by large margins (e.g., for the perceptual errors, a reduction of 23.8% for real-world occlusions, 26.4% for synthetic occlusions, and 22.7% for noisy images), demonstrating the effectiveness of the proposed approach. The occlusion datasets and the corresponding evaluation code are released publicly at https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc.
abstract_zh: 尽管最近在基于遮挡和噪声的人脸图像进行 3D 人脸重建方面取得了一些进展，但其性能仍然不能令人满意。此外，大多数现有方法依赖于额外的依赖性，对训练过程造成许多限制。因此，我们提出了一种自监督鲁棒 GUIdancE (ROGUE) 框架，以获得针对人脸图像中的遮挡和噪声的鲁棒性。所提出的网络包含 1) 指导管道，用于获取干净面部的 3D 面部系数；2) 鲁棒化管道，用于获取遮挡或噪声图像的估计系数与干净对应图像之间的一致性。所提出的图像和特征级损失函数有助于 ROGUE 学习过程，而不会造成额外的依赖性。为了促进模型评估，我们提出了两个具有挑战性的遮挡人脸数据集：ReaChOcc 和 SynChOcc，其中包含用于鲁棒性评估的真实世界和基于合成遮挡的人脸图像。此外，还生成了 CelebA 测试数据集的噪声变体用于评估。我们的方法大幅优于当前最先进的方法（例如，对于感知误差，现实世界遮挡减少了 23.8％，合成遮挡减少了 26.4％，噪声图像减少了 22.7％），证明了所提出方法的有效性。遮挡数据集和相应的评估代码在 https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc 上公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督鲁棒引导框架ROGUE，用于在遮挡和噪声环境下进行单目3D人脸重建。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人脸重建方法在遮挡和噪声场景下表现不佳，且依赖额外约束条件，限制了训练灵活性。
AI.method: 框架包含两个管道：1) 用于生成干净人脸的3D系数的引导管道；2) 通过图像级和特征级损失函数实现遮挡/噪声图像与干净图像系数一致性的鲁棒化管道，并构建了ReaChOcc和SynChOcc两个遮挡数据集。
AI.result: 在真实遮挡、合成遮挡和噪声场景下，感知误差分别降低23.8%、26.4%和22.7%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ROGUE通过自监督学习有效提升了遮挡和噪声环境下的3D人脸重建鲁棒性，相关数据集已公开。

Also, a noisy variant of the test dataset of CelebA is produced for evaluation. The occlusion datasets and the corresponding evaluation code are released publicly at https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc. 尽管最近在基于遮挡和噪声的人脸图像进行 3D 人脸重建方面取得了一些进展，但其性能仍然不能令人满意。此外，大多数现有方法依赖于额外的依赖性，对训练过程造成许多限制。因此，我们提出了一种自监督鲁棒 GUIdancE (ROGUE) 框架，以获得针对人脸图像中的遮挡和噪声的鲁棒性。所提出的网络包含 1) 指导管道，用于获取干净面部的 3D 面部系数；2) 鲁棒化管道，用于获取遮挡或噪声图像的估计系数与干净对应图像之间的一致性。所提出的图像和特征级损失函数有助于 ROGUE 学习过程，而不会造成额外的依赖性。为了促进模型评估，我们提出了两个具有挑战性的遮挡人脸数据集：ReaChOcc 和 SynChOcc，其中包含用于鲁棒性评估的真实世界和基于合成遮挡的人脸图像。此外，还生成了 CelebA 测试数据集的噪声变体用于评估。我们的方法大幅优于当前最先进的方法（例如，对于感知误差，现实世界遮挡减少了 23.8％，合成遮挡减少了 26.4％，噪声图像减少了 22.7％），证明了所提出方法的有效性。遮挡数据集和相应的评估代码在 https://github.com/ArcTrinity9/Datasets-ReaChOcc-and-SynChOcc 上公开发布。 本文提出了一种自监督鲁棒引导框架ROGUE，用于在遮挡和噪声环境下进行单目3D人脸重建。 Hitika Tiwari,Min-Hung Chen,Yi-Min Tsai,Hsien-Kai Kuo,Hung-Jen Chen,Kevin Jou,K. S. Venkatesh,Yong-Sheng Chen cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Guofeng Mei,Xiaoshui Huang,Litao Yu,Jian Zhang,Mohammed Bennamoun
title: COTReg:Coupled Optimal Transport based Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: COTReg：基于耦合最优传输的点云配准
abstract: Generating a set of high-quality correspondences or matches is one of the most critical steps in point cloud registration. This paper proposes a learning framework COTReg by jointly considering the pointwise and structural matchings to predict correspondences of 3D point cloud registration. Specifically, we transform the two matchings into a Wasserstein distance-based and a Gromov-Wasserstein distance-based optimizations, respectively. Thus the task of establishing the correspondences can be naturally reshaped to a coupled optimal transport problem. Furthermore, we design a network to predict the confidence score of being an inlier for each point of the point clouds, which provides the overlap region information to generate correspondences. Our correspondence prediction pipeline can be easily integrated into either learning-based features like FCGF or traditional descriptors like FPFH. We conducted comprehensive experiments on 3DMatch, KITTI, 3DCSR, and ModelNet40 benchmarks, showing the state-of-art performance of the proposed method.
summary: Generating a set of high-quality correspondences or matches is one of the most critical steps in point cloud registration. This paper proposes a learning framework COTReg by jointly considering the pointwise and structural matchings to predict correspondences of 3D point cloud registration. Specifically, we transform the two matchings into a Wasserstein distance-based and a Gromov-Wasserstein distance-based optimizations, respectively. Thus the task of establishing the correspondences can be naturally reshaped to a coupled optimal transport problem. Furthermore, we design a network to predict the confidence score of being an inlier for each point of the point clouds, which provides the overlap region information to generate correspondences. Our correspondence prediction pipeline can be easily integrated into either learning-based features like FCGF or traditional descriptors like FPFH. We conducted comprehensive experiments on 3DMatch, KITTI, 3DCSR, and ModelNet40 benchmarks, showing the state-of-art performance of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 生成一组高质量的对应或匹配是点云配准中最关键的步骤之一。本文提出了一种学习框架COTReg，通过联合考虑点匹配和结构匹配来预测3D点云配准的对应关系。具体来说，我们将这两个匹配分别转换为基于 Wasserstein 距离的优化和基于 Gromov-Wasserstein 距离的优化。因此，建立对应关系的任务可以自然地重塑为耦合的最优传输问题。此外，我们设计了一个网络来预测点云中每个点的内点的置信度得分，它提供重叠区域信息来生成对应关系。我们的对应预测管道可以轻松集成到基于学习的特征（如 FCGF）或传统描述符（如 FPFH）中。我们在 3DMatch、KITTI、3DCSR 和 ModelNet40 基准测试上进行了全面的实验，显示了所提出方法的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COTReg框架，通过联合考虑点云注册中的点级和结构级匹配，生成高质量的对应关系以提升点云配准效果。
AI.motivation: 点云注册中生成高质量对应关系是关键步骤，但现有方法难以同时有效处理点级匹配与结构级匹配的耦合关系。
AI.method: 将点级匹配转化为Wasserstein距离优化，结构级匹配转化为Gromov-Wasserstein距离优化，构建耦合最优运输问题；设计网络预测点云中每个点的内点置信度，辅助生成对应关系。
AI.result: 在3DMatch、KITTI等基准数据集上实验表明，该方法达到当时最先进的点云注册性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过耦合点级与结构级匹配建模，并结合置信度预测，COTReg有效提升了点云注册的准确性与鲁棒性。

title: Cross-Domain Empirical Risk Minimization for Unbiased Long-tailed Classification
title_zh: 无偏长尾分类的跨域经验风险最小化
abstract: We address the overlooked unbiasedness in existing long-tailed classification methods: we find that their overall improvement is mostly attributed to the biased preference of tail over head, as the test distribution is assumed to be balanced; however, when the test is as imbalanced as the long-tailed training data -- let the test respect Zipf's law of nature -- the tail bias is no longer beneficial overall because it hurts the head majorities. In this paper, we propose Cross-Domain Empirical Risk Minimization (xERM) for training an unbiased model to achieve strong performances on both test distributions, which empirically demonstrates that xERM fundamentally improves the classification by learning better feature representation rather than the head vs. tail game. Based on causality, we further theoretically explain why xERM achieves unbiasedness: the bias caused by the domain selection is removed by adjusting the empirical risks on the imbalanced domain and the balanced but unseen domain. Codes are available at https://github.com/BeierZhu/xERM.
summary: We address the overlooked unbiasedness in existing long-tailed classification methods: we find that their overall improvement is mostly attributed to the biased preference of tail over head, as the test distribution is assumed to be balanced; however, when the test is as imbalanced as the long-tailed training data -- let the test respect Zipf's law of nature -- the tail bias is no longer beneficial overall because it hurts the head majorities. In this paper, we propose Cross-Domain Empirical Risk Minimization (xERM) for training an unbiased model to achieve strong performances on both test distributions, which empirically demonstrates that xERM fundamentally improves the classification by learning better feature representation rather than the head vs. tail game. Based on causality, we further theoretically explain why xERM achieves unbiasedness: the bias caused by the domain selection is removed by adjusting the empirical risks on the imbalanced domain and the balanced but unseen domain. Codes are available at https://github.com/BeierZhu/xERM.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了现有长尾分类方法中被忽视的无偏性：我们发现它们的整体改进主要归因于尾部相对于头部的偏向偏好，因为假设测试分布是平衡的；然而，当测试与长尾训练数据一样不平衡时（让测试尊重齐普夫自然法则），尾部偏差总体上不再有利，因为它会伤害头部多数。在本文中，我们提出跨域经验风险最小化（xERM）来训练无偏模型，以在两个测试分布上实现强大的性能，这从经验上证明 xERM 通过学习更好的特征表示而不是头尾博弈从根本上改善了分类。基于因果关系，我们进一步从理论上解释了为什么xERM能够实现无偏：通过调整不平衡域和平衡但不可见域上的经验风险来消除域选​​择带来的偏差。代码可在 https://github.com/BeierZhu/xERM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种跨域经验风险最小化（xERM）方法，以解决长尾分类中因测试分布不平衡导致的偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有长尾分类方法在测试分布平衡时表现良好，但当测试数据与训练数据一样不平衡时，尾部偏差会损害头部类别性能，需消除这种偏差。
AI.method: 基于因果性理论，通过调整不平衡域和平衡但未见域的经风险，提出跨域经验风险最小化（xERM）方法，学习更鲁棒的特征表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，xERM在平衡和不平衡测试分布下均表现优异，优于现有方法，且通过因果性解释了其无偏性。
AI.conclusion: xERM通过跨域风险调整实现无偏性，本质是提升特征表示而非单纯优化头尾类别博弈。

authors_text: Lei Zhu,Qi She,Qian Chen,Xiangxi Meng,Mufeng Geng,Lujia Jin,Zhe Jiang,Bin Qiu,Yunfei You,Yibao Zhang,Qiushi Ren,Yanye Lu
title: Background-aware Classification Activation Map for Weakly Supervised Object Localization
title_zh: 用于弱监督对象定位的背景感知分类激活图
abstract: Weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) relaxes the requirement of dense annotations for object localization by using image-level classification masks to supervise its learning process. However, current WSOL methods suffer from excessive activation of background locations and need post-processing to obtain the localization mask. This paper attributes these issues to the unawareness of background cues, and propose the background-aware classification activation map (B-CAM) to simultaneously learn localization scores of both object and background with only image-level labels. In our B-CAM, two image-level features, aggregated by pixel-level features of potential background and object locations, are used to purify the object feature from the object-related background and to represent the feature of the pure-background sample, respectively. Then based on these two features, both the object classifier and the background classifier are learned to determine the binary object localization mask. Our B-CAM can be trained in end-to-end manner based on a proposed stagger classification loss, which not only improves the objects localization but also suppresses the background activation. Experiments show that our B-CAM outperforms one-stage WSOL methods on the CUB-200, OpenImages and VOC2012 datasets.
summary: Weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) relaxes the requirement of dense annotations for object localization by using image-level classification masks to supervise its learning process. However, current WSOL methods suffer from excessive activation of background locations and need post-processing to obtain the localization mask. This paper attributes these issues to the unawareness of background cues, and propose the background-aware classification activation map (B-CAM) to simultaneously learn localization scores of both object and background with only image-level labels. In our B-CAM, two image-level features, aggregated by pixel-level features of potential background and object locations, are used to purify the object feature from the object-related background and to represent the feature of the pure-background sample, respectively. Then based on these two features, both the object classifier and the background classifier are learned to determine the binary object localization mask. Our B-CAM can be trained in end-to-end manner based on a proposed stagger classification loss, which not only improves the objects localization but also suppresses the background activation. Experiments show that our B-CAM outperforms one-stage WSOL methods on the CUB-200, OpenImages and VOC2012 datasets.
abstract_zh: 弱监督对象定位（WSOL）通过使用图像级分类掩模来监督其学习过程，从而放宽了对象定位密集注释的要求。然而，当前的 WSOL 方法存在背景位置过度激活的问题，并且需要后处理才能获得定位掩模。本文将这些问题归因于对背景线索的无意识，并提出了背景感知分类激活图（B-CAM），仅使用图像级标签即可同时学习对象和背景的定位分数。在我们的 B-CAM 中，两个图像级特征（由潜在背景和对象位置的像素级特征聚合）分别用于从对象相关背景中纯化对象特征并表示纯背景样本的特征。然后基于这两个特征，学习对象分类器和背景分类器以确定二元对象定位掩模。我们的 B-CAM 可以基于所提出的交错分类损失以端到端的方式进行训练，这不仅改善了对象定位，而且抑制了背景激活。实验表明，我们的 B-CAM 在 CUB-200、OpenImages 和 VOC2012 数据集上优于一阶段 WSOL 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种背景感知的分类激活图（B-CAM）方法，用于解决弱监督目标定位中背景区域激活过多的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督目标定位方法因忽略背景线索导致背景区域激活过度，需依赖后处理生成定位掩码，影响定位精度。
AI.method: 通过聚合潜在背景与目标区域的像素级特征，分别提取纯净目标特征与纯背景特征，利用阶梯分类损失函数端到端训练目标与背景分类器，生成二值化定位掩码。
AI.result: 在CUB-200、OpenImages和VOC2012数据集上，B-CAM方法优于现有单阶段弱监督定位方法。
AI.conclusion: B-CAM通过显式建模背景信息，有效抑制了背景激活，提升了弱监督目标定位的准确性。

search_text: Background-aware Classification Activation Map for Weakly Supervised Object Localization 用于弱监督对象定位的背景感知分类激活图 Weakly supervised object localization (WSOL) relaxes the requirement of dense annotations for object localization by using image-level classification masks to supervise its learning process. However, current WSOL methods suffer from excessive activation of background locations and need post-processing to obtain the localization mask. This paper attributes these issues to the unawareness of background cues, and propose the background-aware classification activation map (B-CAM) to simultaneously learn localization scores of both object and background with only image-level labels. In our B-CAM, two image-level features, aggregated by pixel-level features of potential background and object locations, are used to purify the object feature from the object-related background and to represent the feature of the pure-background sample, respectively. Then based on these two features, both the object classifier and the background classifier are learned to determine the binary object localization mask. Our B-CAM can be trained in end-to-end manner based on a proposed stagger classification loss, which not only improves the objects localization but also suppresses the background activation. Experiments show that our B-CAM outperforms one-stage WSOL methods on the CUB-200, OpenImages and VOC2012 datasets. 弱监督对象定位（WSOL）通过使用图像级分类掩模来监督其学习过程，从而放宽了对象定位密集注释的要求。然而，当前的 WSOL 方法存在背景位置过度激活的问题，并且需要后处理才能获得定位掩模。本文将这些问题归因于对背景线索的无意识，并提出了背景感知分类激活图（B-CAM），仅使用图像级标签即可同时学习对象和背景的定位分数。在我们的 B-CAM 中，两个图像级特征（由潜在背景和对象位置的像素级特征聚合）分别用于从对象相关背景中纯化对象特征并表示纯背景样本的特征。然后基于这两个特征，学习对象分类器和背景分类器以确定二元对象定位掩模。我们的 B-CAM 可以基于所提出的交错分类损失以端到端的方式进行训练，这不仅改善了对象定位，而且抑制了背景激活。实验表明，我们的 B-CAM 在 CUB-200、OpenImages 和 VOC2012 数据集上优于一阶段 WSOL 方法。 本文提出一种背景感知的分类激活图（B-CAM）方法，用于解决弱监督目标定位中背景区域激活过多的问题。 Lei Zhu,Qi She,Qian Chen,Xiangxi Meng,Mufeng Geng,Lujia Jin,Zhe Jiang,Bin Qiu,Yunfei You,Yibao Zhang,Qiushi Ren,Yanye Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Fang-Chieh Chou,Marsalis Gibson,Rahul Bhadani,Alexandre M. Bayen,Jonathan Sprinkle
title: Reachability Analysis for FollowerStopper: Safety Analysis and Experimental Results
title_zh: FollowerStopper的可达性分析：安全性分析和实验结果
abstract: Motivated by earlier work and the developer of a new algorithm, the FollowerStopper, this article uses reachability analysis to verify the safety of the FollowerStopper algorithm, which is a controller designed for dampening stop- and-go traffic waves. With more than 1100 miles of driving data collected by our physical platform, we validate our analysis results by comparing it to human driving behaviors. The FollowerStopper controller has been demonstrated to dampen stop-and-go traffic waves at low speed, but previous analysis on its relative safety has been limited to upper and lower bounds of acceleration. To expand upon previous analysis, reachability analysis is used to investigate the safety at the speeds it was originally tested and also at higher speeds. Two formulations of safety analysis with different criteria are shown: distance-based and time headway-based. The FollowerStopper is considered safe with distance-based criterion. However, simulation results demonstrate that the FollowerStopper is not representative of human drivers - it follows too closely behind vehicles, specifically at a distance human would deem as unsafe. On the other hand, under the time headway-based safety analysis, the FollowerStopper is not considered safe anymore. A modified FollowerStopper is proposed to satisfy time-based safety criterion. Simulation results of the proposed FollowerStopper shows that its response represents human driver behavior better.
summary: Motivated by earlier work and the developer of a new algorithm, the FollowerStopper, this article uses reachability analysis to verify the safety of the FollowerStopper algorithm, which is a controller designed for dampening stop- and-go traffic waves. With more than 1100 miles of driving data collected by our physical platform, we validate our analysis results by comparing it to human driving behaviors. The FollowerStopper controller has been demonstrated to dampen stop-and-go traffic waves at low speed, but previous analysis on its relative safety has been limited to upper and lower bounds of acceleration. To expand upon previous analysis, reachability analysis is used to investigate the safety at the speeds it was originally tested and also at higher speeds. Two formulations of safety analysis with different criteria are shown: distance-based and time headway-based. The FollowerStopper is considered safe with distance-based criterion. However, simulation results demonstrate that the FollowerStopper is not representative of human drivers - it follows too closely behind vehicles, specifically at a distance human would deem as unsafe. On the other hand, under the time headway-based safety analysis, the FollowerStopper is not considered safe anymore. A modified FollowerStopper is proposed to satisfy time-based safety criterion. Simulation results of the proposed FollowerStopper shows that its response represents human driver behavior better.
abstract_zh: 受早期工作和新算法 FollowerStopper 开发人员的启发，本文使用可达性分析来验证 FollowerStopper 算法的安全性，该算法是一种为抑制走走停停的交通波而设计的控制器。通过我们的物理平台收集的超过 1100 英里的驾驶数据，我们通过将其与人类驾驶行为进行比较来验证我们的分析结果。 FollowerStopper 控制器已被证明可以抑制低速走走停停的交通波，但之前对其相对安全性的分析仅限于加速度的上限和下限。为了扩展之前的分析，可达性分析用于调查最初测试的速度以及更高速度下的安全性。显示了具有不同标准的两种安全分析公式：基于距离和基于车头时距。根据基于距离的标准，FollowerStopper 被认为是安全的。然而，模拟结果表明，FollowerStopper 不能代表人类驾驶员——它跟在车辆后面太近，特别是在人类认为不安全的距离处。另一方面，根据基于时间车头时距的安全分析，FollowerStopper 不再被认为是安全的。提出了一种改进的 FollowerStopper 以满足基于时间的安全标准。所提出的 FollowerStopper 的仿真结果表明，其响应更好地代表了人类驾驶员的行为。

AI.tldr: 本文通过可达性分析验证FollowerStopper算法的安全性，并基于实验数据提出改进方案。
AI.motivation: 先前对FollowerStopper算法的安全性分析仅限于加速度上下限，需扩展至更全面的速度范围及安全标准。
AI.method: 采用可达性分析方法，分别基于距离和时间间隔两种安全标准进行验证，并通过1100英里实车数据对比人类驾驶行为。
AI.result: 原算法满足距离安全标准但不符合时间间隔标准，改进后的FollowerStopper更贴近人类驾驶行为。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的控制器在时间间隔安全标准下表现更优，且驾驶响应更符合人类习惯。

title: Multi-Adversarial Safety Analysis for Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 自动驾驶汽车的多对抗安全分析
comment: 2 pages. 4 figures. RSS 2020 Workshop Robust Autonomy
comments: 2 pages. 4 figures. RSS 2020 Workshop Robust Autonomy
abstract: This work in progress considers reachability-based safety analysis in the domain of autonomous driving in multi-agent systems. We formulate the safety problem for a car following scenario as a differential game and study how different modelling strategies yield very different behaviors regardless of the validity of the strategies in other scenarios. Given the nature of real-life driving scenarios, we propose a modeling strategy in our formulation that accounts for subtle interactions between agents, and compare its Hamiltonian results to other baselines. Our formulation encourages reduction of conservativeness in Hamilton-Jacobi safety analysis to provide better safety guarantees during navigation.
summary: This work in progress considers reachability-based safety analysis in the domain of autonomous driving in multi-agent systems. We formulate the safety problem for a car following scenario as a differential game and study how different modelling strategies yield very different behaviors regardless of the validity of the strategies in other scenarios. Given the nature of real-life driving scenarios, we propose a modeling strategy in our formulation that accounts for subtle interactions between agents, and compare its Hamiltonian results to other baselines. Our formulation encourages reduction of conservativeness in Hamilton-Jacobi safety analysis to provide better safety guarantees during navigation.
abstract_zh: 这项正在进行的工作考虑了多智能体系统中自动驾驶领域基于可达性的安全分析。我们将跟车场景的安全问题表述为微分博弈，并研究不同的建模策略如何产生截然不同的行为，而不管策略在其他场景中的有效性如何。考虑到现实生活中驾驶场景的性质，我们在公式中提出了一种建模策略，该策略考虑了代理之间的微妙交互，并将其哈密顿结果与其他基线进行比较。我们的公式鼓励减少汉密尔顿-雅可比安全分析中的保守性，以在导航过程中提供更好的安全保证。

AI.tldr: 本文针对自动驾驶车辆在多智能体系统中的安全分析问题，提出基于可达性的微分博弈建模方法，研究不同建模策略对安全行为的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有安全分析方法在复杂驾驶场景中存在保守性过强或行为预测偏差的问题，需更精确建模智能体间交互以提升安全保证。
AI.method: 将跟车场景建模为微分博弈，设计考虑多智能体微妙交互的建模策略，并通过哈密顿量对比分析验证其有效性。
AI.result: 新方法在减少哈密顿-雅可比分析保守性方面表现更优，能提供更精确的安全保证。
AI.conclusion: 该建模策略为自动驾驶安全分析提供了更贴近实际交互的理论框架，未来可扩展至更复杂的多智能体场景。

method: 将跟车场景建模为微分博弈，设计考虑多智能体微妙交互的建模策略，并通过哈密顿量对比分析验证其有效性。
result: 新方法在减少哈密顿-雅可比分析保守性方面表现更优，能提供更精确的安全保证。
conclusion: 该建模策略为自动驾驶安全分析提供了更贴近实际交互的理论框架，未来可扩展至更复杂的多智能体场景。
search_text: Multi-Adversarial Safety Analysis for Autonomous Vehicles 自动驾驶汽车的多对抗安全分析 This work in progress considers reachability-based safety analysis in the domain of autonomous driving in multi-agent systems. We formulate the safety problem for a car following scenario as a differential game and study how different modelling strategies yield very different behaviors regardless of the validity of the strategies in other scenarios. Given the nature of real-life driving scenarios, we propose a modeling strategy in our formulation that accounts for subtle interactions between agents, and compare its Hamiltonian results to other baselines. Our formulation encourages reduction of conservativeness in Hamilton-Jacobi safety analysis to provide better safety guarantees during navigation. 这项正在进行的工作考虑了多智能体系统中自动驾驶领域基于可达性的安全分析。我们将跟车场景的安全问题表述为微分博弈，并研究不同的建模策略如何产生截然不同的行为，而不管策略在其他场景中的有效性如何。考虑到现实生活中驾驶场景的性质，我们在公式中提出了一种建模策略，该策略考虑了代理之间的微妙交互，并将其哈密顿结果与其他基线进行比较。我们的公式鼓励减少汉密尔顿-雅可比安全分析中的保守性，以在导航过程中提供更好的安全保证。 本文针对自动驾驶车辆在多智能体系统中的安全分析问题，提出基于可达性的微分博弈建模方法，研究不同建模策略对安全行为的影响。 Gilbert Bahati,Marsalis Gibson,Alexandre Bayen eess.SY,cs.RO

authors_text: Rami Mohawesh,Shuxiang Xu,Matthew Springer,Muna Al-Hawawreh,Sumbal Maqsood
title: Fake or Genuine? Contextualised Text Representation for Fake Review Detection
title_zh: 假的还是真的？用于虚假评论检测的上下文文本表示
comment: ef:10th International Conference on Natural Language Processing (NLP 2021)
comments: ef:10th International Conference on Natural Language Processing (NLP 2021)
abstract: Online reviews have a significant influence on customers' purchasing decisions for any products or services. However, fake reviews can mislead both consumers and companies. Several models have been developed to detect fake reviews using machine learning approaches. Many of these models have some limitations resulting in low accuracy in distinguishing between fake and genuine reviews. These models focused only on linguistic features to detect fake reviews and failed to capture the semantic meaning of the reviews. To deal with this, this paper proposes a new ensemble model that employs transformer architecture to discover the hidden patterns in a sequence of fake reviews and detect them precisely. The proposed approach combines three transformer models to improve the robustness of fake and genuine behaviour profiling and modelling to detect fake reviews. The experimental results using semi-real benchmark datasets showed the superiority of the proposed model over state-of-the-art models.
summary: Online reviews have a significant influence on customers' purchasing decisions for any products or services. However, fake reviews can mislead both consumers and companies. Several models have been developed to detect fake reviews using machine learning approaches. Many of these models have some limitations resulting in low accuracy in distinguishing between fake and genuine reviews. These models focused only on linguistic features to detect fake reviews and failed to capture the semantic meaning of the reviews. To deal with this, this paper proposes a new ensemble model that employs transformer architecture to discover the hidden patterns in a sequence of fake reviews and detect them precisely. The proposed approach combines three transformer models to improve the robustness of fake and genuine behaviour profiling and modelling to detect fake reviews. The experimental results using semi-real benchmark datasets showed the superiority of the proposed model over state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 在线评论对客户对任何产品或服务的购买决策都有重大影响。然而，虚假评论可能会误导消费者和公司。已经开发了几种模型来使用机器学习方法来检测虚假评论。许多这些模型都存在一些局限性，导致区分虚假评论和真实评论的准确性较低。这些模型仅关注语言特征来检测虚假评论，而未能捕获评论的语义含义。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种新的集成模型，该模型采用 Transformer 架构来发现一系列虚假评论中的隐藏模式并精确检测它们。所提出的方法结合了三个变压器模型，以提高虚假和真实行为分析和建模的鲁棒性，以检测虚假评论。使用半真实基准数据集的实验结果表明，所提出的模型相对于最先进的模型具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer架构的集成模型，通过上下文化文本表示技术精准检测虚假评论。
AI.motivation: 现有虚假评论检测模型仅依赖语言特征，无法捕捉语义信息，导致准确率不足。
AI.method: 融合三个Transformer模型构建集成系统，通过序列模式挖掘提升虚假评论识别的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在半真实数据集实验中，该模型性能优于当前最先进的检测方法。
AI.conclusion: 上下文化表示方法有效提升了虚假评论检测效果，为该领域提供新研究方向。

authors_text: Kartikeya Bhardwaj,Dibakar Gope,James Ward,Paul Whatmough,Danny Loh
title: Super-Efficient Super Resolution for Fast Adversarial Defense at the Edge
title_zh: 超高效的超分辨率，可在边缘实现快速对抗性防御
comment: This preprint is for personal use only. The official article will appear in proceedings of Design, Automation & Test in Europe (DATE), 2022, as part of the Special Initiative on Autonomous Systems Design (ASD)
comments: This preprint is for personal use only. The official article will appear in proceedings of Design, Automation & Test in Europe (DATE), 2022, as part of the Special Initiative on Autonomous Systems Design (ASD)
abstract: Autonomous systems are highly vulnerable to a variety of adversarial attacks on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Training-free model-agnostic defenses have recently gained popularity due to their speed, ease of deployment, and ability to work across many DNNs. To this end, a new technique has emerged for mitigating attacks on image classification DNNs, namely, preprocessing adversarial images using super resolution -- upscaling low-quality inputs into high-resolution images. This defense requires running both image classifiers and super resolution models on constrained autonomous systems. However, super resolution incurs a heavy computational cost. Therefore, in this paper, we investigate the following question: Does the robustness of image classifiers suffer if we use tiny super resolution models? To answer this, we first review a recent work called Super-Efficient Super Resolution (SESR) that achieves similar or better image quality than prior art while requiring 2x to 330x fewer Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations. We demonstrate that despite being orders of magnitude smaller than existing models, SESR achieves the same level of robustness as significantly larger networks. Finally, we estimate end-to-end performance of super resolution-based defenses on a commercial Arm Ethos-U55 micro-NPU. Our findings show that SESR achieves nearly 3x higher FPS than a baseline while achieving similar robustness.
summary: Autonomous systems are highly vulnerable to a variety of adversarial attacks on Deep Neural Networks (DNNs). Training-free model-agnostic defenses have recently gained popularity due to their speed, ease of deployment, and ability to work across many DNNs. To this end, a new technique has emerged for mitigating attacks on image classification DNNs, namely, preprocessing adversarial images using super resolution -- upscaling low-quality inputs into high-resolution images. This defense requires running both image classifiers and super resolution models on constrained autonomous systems. However, super resolution incurs a heavy computational cost. Therefore, in this paper, we investigate the following question: Does the robustness of image classifiers suffer if we use tiny super resolution models? To answer this, we first review a recent work called Super-Efficient Super Resolution (SESR) that achieves similar or better image quality than prior art while requiring 2x to 330x fewer Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) operations. We demonstrate that despite being orders of magnitude smaller than existing models, SESR achieves the same level of robustness as significantly larger networks. Finally, we estimate end-to-end performance of super resolution-based defenses on a commercial Arm Ethos-U55 micro-NPU. Our findings show that SESR achieves nearly 3x higher FPS than a baseline while achieving similar robustness.
abstract_zh: 自治系统非常容易受到深度神经网络（DNN）的各种对抗性攻击。免训练、模型无关的防御因其速度快、易于部署以及跨多个 DNN 工作的能力而最近受到欢迎。为此，出现了一种减轻图像分类 DNN 攻击的新技术，即使用超分辨率预处理对抗性图像，将低质量输入升级为高分辨率图像。这种防御需要在受限的自治系统上运行图像分类器和超分辨率模型。然而，超分辨率会带来大量的计算成本。因此，在本文中，我们研究了以下问题：如果我们使用微小的超分辨率模型，图像分类器的鲁棒性是否会受到影响？为了回答这个问题，我们首先回顾一下最近一项名为“超高效超分辨率”(SESR) 的工作，它实现了与现有技术相似或更好的图像质量，同时需要的乘法累加 (MAC) 操作减少了 2 倍到 330 倍。我们证明，尽管 SESR 比现有模型小几个数量级，但它仍实现了与更大的网络相同水平的稳健性。最后，我们评估了商用 Arm Ethos-U55 微型 NPU 上基于超分辨率的防御的端到端性能。我们的研究结果表明，SESR 的 FPS 比基准高出近 3 倍，同时实现了类似的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在资源受限的边缘设备上使用轻量级超分辨率模型（SESR）提升图像分类神经网络的对抗攻击防御效率。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗防御方法计算成本高，难以在边缘设备部署，需寻找计算效率与防御效果平衡的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过分析SESR模型的超分辨率能力，评估其在保持防御效果的同时降低计算量（MAC操作减少2-330倍）的可行性，并在Arm Ethos-U55微NPU上测试端到端性能。
AI.result: SESR在保持与大模型相当防御效果的前提下，实现比基线模型高近3倍的帧率（FPS），验证了其计算效率优势。
AI.conclusion: SESR为边缘设备提供了高效且鲁棒的对抗防御方案，兼顾计算资源约束与模型安全性需求。

title: Socially-Optimal Mechanism Design for Incentivized Online Learning
title_zh: 激励在线学习的社会最优机制设计
abstract: Multi-arm bandit (MAB) is a classic online learning framework that studies the sequential decision-making in an uncertain environment. The MAB framework, however, overlooks the scenario where the decision-maker cannot take actions (e.g., pulling arms) directly. It is a practically important scenario in many applications such as spectrum sharing, crowdsensing, and edge computing. In these applications, the decision-maker would incentivize other selfish agents to carry out desired actions (i.e., pulling arms on the decision-maker's behalf). This paper establishes the incentivized online learning (IOL) framework for this scenario. The key challenge to design the IOL framework lies in the tight coupling of the unknown environment learning and asymmetric information revelation. To address this, we construct a special Lagrangian function based on which we propose a socially-optimal mechanism for the IOL framework. Our mechanism satisfies various desirable properties such as agent fairness, incentive compatibility, and voluntary participation. It achieves the same asymptotic performance as the state-of-art benchmark that requires extra information. Our analysis also unveils the power of crowd in the IOL framework: a larger agent crowd enables our mechanism to approach more closely the theoretical upper bound of social performance. Numerical results demonstrate the advantages of our mechanism in large-scale edge computing.
summary: Multi-arm bandit (MAB) is a classic online learning framework that studies the sequential decision-making in an uncertain environment. The MAB framework, however, overlooks the scenario where the decision-maker cannot take actions (e.g., pulling arms) directly. It is a practically important scenario in many applications such as spectrum sharing, crowdsensing, and edge computing. In these applications, the decision-maker would incentivize other selfish agents to carry out desired actions (i.e., pulling arms on the decision-maker's behalf). This paper establishes the incentivized online learning (IOL) framework for this scenario. The key challenge to design the IOL framework lies in the tight coupling of the unknown environment learning and asymmetric information revelation. To address this, we construct a special Lagrangian function based on which we propose a socially-optimal mechanism for the IOL framework. Our mechanism satisfies various desirable properties such as agent fairness, incentive compatibility, and voluntary participation. It achieves the same asymptotic performance as the state-of-art benchmark that requires extra information. Our analysis also unveils the power of crowd in the IOL framework: a larger agent crowd enables our mechanism to approach more closely the theoretical upper bound of social performance. Numerical results demonstrate the advantages of our mechanism in large-scale edge computing.
abstract_zh: 多臂老虎机（MAB）是一种经典的在线学习框架，研究不确定环境下的顺序决策。然而，人与生物圈计划框架忽略了决策者无法直接采取行动（例如拉动手臂）的情况。它在频谱共享、群智感知和边缘计算等许多应用中都是一个实际重要的场景。在这些应用中，决策者将激励其他自私的代理人执行期望的行动（即代表决策者拉动手臂）。本文针对这一场景建立了激励在线学习（IOL）框架。设计IOL框架的关键挑战在于未知环境学习和不对称信息揭示的紧密耦合。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一个特殊的拉格朗日函数，基于该函数，我们为 IOL 框架提出了一种社会最优机制。我们的机制满足代理公平性、激励相容性和自愿参与等各种理想的特性。它实现了与需要额外信息的最先进基准相同的渐近性能。我们的分析还揭示了 IOL 框架中人群的力量：更大的代理人群使我们的机制能够更接近社会绩效的理论上限。数值结果证明了我们的机制在大规模边缘计算中的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种激励在线学习（IOL）框架下的社会最优机制设计，解决决策者无法直接执行动作时如何激励自私代理的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统多臂老虎机（MAB）框架未考虑决策者无法直接执行动作的场景，如频谱共享和边缘计算，需设计兼顾学习与信息不对称的激励机制。
AI.method: 构建特殊拉格朗日函数，提出满足公平性、激励相容性等特性的社会最优机制，无需额外信息即可达到基准性能。
AI.result: 机制在渐进行为上与需额外信息的基准相当，且代理规模越大越接近社会绩效理论上限，数值实验验证了其在大规模边缘计算中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 该机制有效平衡了学习与激励问题，揭示了代理群体规模对社会绩效的提升作用，为实际应用提供了理论支持。

search_text: Socially-Optimal Mechanism Design for Incentivized Online Learning 激励在线学习的社会最优机制设计 Multi-arm bandit (MAB) is a classic online learning framework that studies the sequential decision-making in an uncertain environment. The MAB framework, however, overlooks the scenario where the decision-maker cannot take actions (e.g., pulling arms) directly. It is a practically important scenario in many applications such as spectrum sharing, crowdsensing, and edge computing. In these applications, the decision-maker would incentivize other selfish agents to carry out desired actions (i.e., pulling arms on the decision-maker's behalf). This paper establishes the incentivized online learning (IOL) framework for this scenario. The key challenge to design the IOL framework lies in the tight coupling of the unknown environment learning and asymmetric information revelation. To address this, we construct a special Lagrangian function based on which we propose a socially-optimal mechanism for the IOL framework. Our mechanism satisfies various desirable properties such as agent fairness, incentive compatibility, and voluntary participation. It achieves the same asymptotic performance as the state-of-art benchmark that requires extra information. Our analysis also unveils the power of crowd in the IOL framework: a larger agent crowd enables our mechanism to approach more closely the theoretical upper bound of social performance. Numerical results demonstrate the advantages of our mechanism in large-scale edge computing. 多臂老虎机（MAB）是一种经典的在线学习框架，研究不确定环境下的顺序决策。然而，人与生物圈计划框架忽略了决策者无法直接采取行动（例如拉动手臂）的情况。它在频谱共享、群智感知和边缘计算等许多应用中都是一个实际重要的场景。在这些应用中，决策者将激励其他自私的代理人执行期望的行动（即代表决策者拉动手臂）。本文针对这一场景建立了激励在线学习（IOL）框架。设计IOL框架的关键挑战在于未知环境学习和不对称信息揭示的紧密耦合。为了解决这个问题，我们构建了一个特殊的拉格朗日函数，基于该函数，我们为 IOL 框架提出了一种社会最优机制。我们的机制满足代理公平性、激励相容性和自愿参与等各种理想的特性。它实现了与需要额外信息的最先进基准相同的渐近性能。我们的分析还揭示了 IOL 框架中人群的力量：更大的代理人群使我们的机制能够更接近社会绩效的理论上限。数值结果证明了我们的机制在大规模边缘计算中的优势。 本文提出一种激励在线学习（IOL）框架下的社会最优机制设计，解决决策者无法直接执行动作时如何激励自私代理的问题。 Zhiyuan Wang,Lin Gao,Jianwei Huang cs.GT,cs.AI

authors_text: Futa Waseda,Sosuke Nishikawa,Trung-Nghia Le,Huy H. Nguyen,Isao Echizen
title: Closer Look at the Transferability of Adversarial Examples: How They Fool Different Models Differently
title_zh: 仔细观察对抗性示例的可迁移性：它们如何以不同的方式愚弄不同的模型
comment: 25 pages, 13 figures, Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
comments: 25 pages, 13 figures, Accepted at the IEEE Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision (WACV) 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs), which have adversarial transferability: AEs generated for the source model can mislead another (target) model's predictions. However, the transferability has not been understood in terms of to which class target model's predictions were misled (i.e., class-aware transferability). In this paper, we differentiate the cases in which a target model predicts the same wrong class as the source model ("same mistake") or a different wrong class ("different mistake") to analyze and provide an explanation of the mechanism. We find that (1) AEs tend to cause same mistakes, which correlates with "non-targeted transferability"; however, (2) different mistakes occur even between similar models, regardless of the perturbation size. Furthermore, we present evidence that the difference between same mistakes and different mistakes can be explained by non-robust features, predictive but human-uninterpretable patterns: different mistakes occur when non-robust features in AEs are used differently by models. Non-robust features can thus provide consistent explanations for the class-aware transferability of AEs.
summary: Deep neural networks are vulnerable to adversarial examples (AEs), which have adversarial transferability: AEs generated for the source model can mislead another (target) model's predictions. However, the transferability has not been understood in terms of to which class target model's predictions were misled (i.e., class-aware transferability). In this paper, we differentiate the cases in which a target model predicts the same wrong class as the source model ("same mistake") or a different wrong class ("different mistake") to analyze and provide an explanation of the mechanism. We find that (1) AEs tend to cause same mistakes, which correlates with "non-targeted transferability"; however, (2) different mistakes occur even between similar models, regardless of the perturbation size. Furthermore, we present evidence that the difference between same mistakes and different mistakes can be explained by non-robust features, predictive but human-uninterpretable patterns: different mistakes occur when non-robust features in AEs are used differently by models. Non-robust features can thus provide consistent explanations for the class-aware transferability of AEs.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络很容易受到对抗性示例（AE）的影响，这些示例具有对抗性可转移性：为源模型生成的 AE 可能会误导另一个（目标）模型的预测。然而，可转移性尚未被理解为哪个类目标模型的预测被误导（即类感知可转移性）。在本文中，我们区分目标模型预测与源模型相同的错误类别（“相同错误”）或不同的错误类别（“不同错误”）的情况，以分析并提供机制的解释。我们发现（1）AE往往会导致相同的错误，这与“非目标可迁移性”相关；然而，（2）即使在相似的模型之间，无论扰动大小如何，也会出现不同的错误。此外，我们提供的证据表明，相同错误和不同错误之间的差异可以通过非鲁棒特征、可预测但人类无法解释的模式来解释：当模型以不同方式使用 AE 中的非鲁棒特征时，会发生不同的错误。因此，非鲁棒特征可以为 AE 的类感知可转移性提供一致的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文研究对抗样本在不同模型间的可迁移性，分析其如何导致目标模型产生相同或不同错误预测的机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注对抗样本的跨模型迁移能力，但缺乏对目标模型预测错误类别（相同错误或不同错误）的深入理解。
AI.method: 通过区分目标模型预测与源模型相同错误（same mistake）或不同错误（different mistake）的案例，结合模型相似性、扰动规模等因素进行分析，并关联非鲁棒特征的影响。
AI.result: 对抗样本更易引发相同错误（与非目标迁移相关），但即使相似模型间也会出现不同错误，且非鲁棒特征的差异性使用是不同错误的关键原因。
AI.conclusion: 非鲁棒特征的差异性解释了对抗样本的类别感知迁移性，为提升模型鲁棒性提供了新方向。

title: Adoption of Industry 4.0 technologies in airports -- A systematic literature review
title_zh: 机场采用工业 4.0 技术——系统文献综述
abstract: Airports have been constantly evolving and adopting digital technologies to improve operational efficiency, enhance passenger experience, generate ancillary revenues and boost capacity from existing infrastructure. The COVID-19 pandemic has also challenged airports and aviation stakeholders alike to adapt and manage new operational challenges such as facilitating a contactless travel experience and ensuring business continuity. Digitalisation using Industry 4.0 technologies offers opportunities for airports to address short-term challenges associated with the COVID-19 pandemic while also preparing for future long-term challenges that ensue the crisis. Through a systematic literature review of 102 relevant articles, we discuss the current state of adoption of Industry 4.0 technologies in airports, the associated challenges as well as future research directions. The results of this review suggest that the implementation of Industry 4.0 technologies is slowly gaining traction within the airport environment, and shall continue to remain relevant in the digital transformation journeys in developing future airports.
summary: Airports have been constantly evolving and adopting digital technologies to improve operational efficiency, enhance passenger experience, generate ancillary revenues and boost capacity from existing infrastructure. The COVID-19 pandemic has also challenged airports and aviation stakeholders alike to adapt and manage new operational challenges such as facilitating a contactless travel experience and ensuring business continuity. Digitalisation using Industry 4.0 technologies offers opportunities for airports to address short-term challenges associated with the COVID-19 pandemic while also preparing for future long-term challenges that ensue the crisis. Through a systematic literature review of 102 relevant articles, we discuss the current state of adoption of Industry 4.0 technologies in airports, the associated challenges as well as future research directions. The results of this review suggest that the implementation of Industry 4.0 technologies is slowly gaining traction within the airport environment, and shall continue to remain relevant in the digital transformation journeys in developing future airports.
abstract_zh: 机场一直在不断发展并采用数字技术来提高运营效率、增强乘客体验、产生辅助收入并提高现有基础设施的容量。 COVID-19 大流行还对机场和航空利益相关者提出了挑战，要求他们适应和管理新的运营挑战，例如促进非接触式旅行体验和确保业务连续性。使用工业 4.0 技术的数字化为机场提供了解决与 COVID-19 大流行相关的短期挑战的机会，同时也为危机带来的未来长期挑战做好准备。通过对 102 篇相关文章的系统文献回顾，我们讨论了机场采用工业 4.0 技术的现状、相关挑战以及未来的研究方向。此次审查的结果表明，工业 4.0 技术的实施正在机场环境中慢慢获得关注，并将继续在发展未来机场的数字化转型之旅中保持相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统文献综述分析机场采用工业4.0技术的现状、挑战及未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 机场需应对新冠疫情带来的运营挑战并推进数字化转型，工业4.0技术被视为关键解决方案。
AI.method: 采用系统文献综述法，分析102篇相关学术文章以总结当前研究现状。
AI.result: 工业4.0技术在机场的应用逐渐普及，但实施过程中仍面临技术、组织及安全等多方面挑战。
AI.conclusion: 工业4.0技术将持续推动机场数字化转型，未来需进一步研究其规模化应用与跨领域整合。

ai_content.tldr: 本文通过系统文献综述分析机场采用工业4.0技术的现状、挑战及未来研究方向。

search_text: Adoption of Industry 4.0 technologies in airports -- A systematic literature review 机场采用工业 4.0 技术——系统文献综述 Airports have been constantly evolving and adopting digital technologies to improve operational efficiency, enhance passenger experience, generate ancillary revenues and boost capacity from existing infrastructure. The COVID-19 pandemic has also challenged airports and aviation stakeholders alike to adapt and manage new operational challenges such as facilitating a contactless travel experience and ensuring business continuity. Digitalisation using Industry 4.0 technologies offers opportunities for airports to address short-term challenges associated with the COVID-19 pandemic while also preparing for future long-term challenges that ensue the crisis. Through a systematic literature review of 102 relevant articles, we discuss the current state of adoption of Industry 4.0 technologies in airports, the associated challenges as well as future research directions. The results of this review suggest that the implementation of Industry 4.0 technologies is slowly gaining traction within the airport environment, and shall continue to remain relevant in the digital transformation journeys in developing future airports. 机场一直在不断发展并采用数字技术来提高运营效率、增强乘客体验、产生辅助收入并提高现有基础设施的容量。 COVID-19 大流行还对机场和航空利益相关者提出了挑战，要求他们适应和管理新的运营挑战，例如促进非接触式旅行体验和确保业务连续性。使用工业 4.0 技术的数字化为机场提供了解决与 COVID-19 大流行相关的短期挑战的机会，同时也为危机带来的未来长期挑战做好准备。通过对 102 篇相关文章的系统文献回顾，我们讨论了机场采用工业 4.0 技术的现状、相关挑战以及未来的研究方向。此次审查的结果表明，工业 4.0 技术的实施正在机场环境中慢慢获得关注，并将继续在发展未来机场的数字化转型之旅中保持相关性。 本文通过系统文献综述分析机场采用工业4.0技术的现状、挑战及未来研究方向。 Jia Hao Tan,Tariq Masood eess.SY,cs.HC,cs.RO

title: 360° Optical Flow using Tangent Images
title_zh: 使用切线图像的 360° 光流
abstract: Omnidirectional 360° images have found many promising and exciting applications in computer vision, robotics and other fields, thanks to their increasing affordability, portability and their 360° field of view. The most common format for storing, processing and visualising 360° images is equirectangular projection (ERP). However, the distortion introduced by the nonlinear mapping from 360° image to ERP image is still a barrier that holds back ERP images from being used as easily as conventional perspective images. This is especially relevant when estimating 360° optical flow, as the distortions need to be mitigated appropriately. In this paper, we propose a 360° optical flow method based on tangent images. Our method leverages gnomonic projection to locally convert ERP images to perspective images, and uniformly samples the ERP image by projection to a cubemap and regular icosahedron vertices, to incrementally refine the estimated 360° flow fields even in the presence of large rotations. Our experiments demonstrate the benefits of our proposed method both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: Omnidirectional 360° images have found many promising and exciting applications in computer vision, robotics and other fields, thanks to their increasing affordability, portability and their 360° field of view. The most common format for storing, processing and visualising 360° images is equirectangular projection (ERP). However, the distortion introduced by the nonlinear mapping from 360° image to ERP image is still a barrier that holds back ERP images from being used as easily as conventional perspective images. This is especially relevant when estimating 360° optical flow, as the distortions need to be mitigated appropriately. In this paper, we propose a 360° optical flow method based on tangent images. Our method leverages gnomonic projection to locally convert ERP images to perspective images, and uniformly samples the ERP image by projection to a cubemap and regular icosahedron vertices, to incrementally refine the estimated 360° flow fields even in the presence of large rotations. Our experiments demonstrate the benefits of our proposed method both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 全向 360° 图像由于其不断提高的经济性、便携性和 360° 视野，在计算机视觉、机器人技术和其他领域找到了许多有前景和令人兴奋的应用。存储、处理和可视化 360° 图像的最常见格式是等距柱状投影 (ERP)。然而，从360°图像到ERP图像的非线性映射引入的失真仍然是阻碍ERP图像像传统透视图像一样容易使用的障碍。这在估计 360° 光流时尤其重要，因为需要适当减轻失真。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于切线图像的360°光流方法。我们的方法利用心轴投影将 ERP 图像本地转换为透视图像，并通过投影到立方体贴图和正二十面体顶点来对 ERP 图像进行均匀采样，即使在存在大旋转的情况下也能逐步细化估计的 360° 流场。我们的实验在定量和定性方面证明了我们提出的方法的优点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于切线图像的360°光流估计方法，以解决等距投影（ERP）图像因非线性映射导致的失真问题。
AI.motivation: 等距投影图像在360°光流估计中因非线性映射产生的失真影响了其应用效果，需寻找有效方法缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 通过高斯投影将ERP图像局部转换为透视图像，并利用立方体贴图和正二十面体顶点对ERP图像进行均匀采样，逐步优化大旋转场景下的360°光流场估计。
AI.result: 实验从定性和定量两方面验证了该方法在处理360°光流估计任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过切线图像有效缓解了ERP投影失真，提升了360°光流估计的精度和鲁棒性。

title: Multi-Head Deep Metric Learning Using Global and Local Representations
title_zh: 使用全局和局部表示的多头深度度量学习
abstract: Deep Metric Learning (DML) models often require strong local and global representations, however, effective integration of local and global features in DML model training is a challenge. DML models are often trained with specific loss functions, including pairwise-based and proxy-based losses. The pairwise-based loss functions leverage rich semantic relations among data points, however, they often suffer from slow convergence during DML model training. On the other hand, the proxy-based loss functions often lead to significant speedups in convergence during training, while the rich relations among data points are often not fully explored by the proxy-based losses. In this paper, we propose a novel DML approach to address these challenges. The proposed DML approach makes use of a hybrid loss by integrating the pairwise-based and the proxy-based loss functions to leverage rich data-to-data relations as well as fast convergence. Furthermore, the proposed DML approach utilizes both global and local features to obtain rich representations in DML model training. Finally, we also use the second-order attention for feature enhancement to improve accurate and efficient retrieval. In our experiments, we extensively evaluated the proposed DML approach on four public benchmarks, and the experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieved state-of-the-art performance on all benchmarks.
summary: Deep Metric Learning (DML) models often require strong local and global representations, however, effective integration of local and global features in DML model training is a challenge. DML models are often trained with specific loss functions, including pairwise-based and proxy-based losses. The pairwise-based loss functions leverage rich semantic relations among data points, however, they often suffer from slow convergence during DML model training. On the other hand, the proxy-based loss functions often lead to significant speedups in convergence during training, while the rich relations among data points are often not fully explored by the proxy-based losses. In this paper, we propose a novel DML approach to address these challenges. The proposed DML approach makes use of a hybrid loss by integrating the pairwise-based and the proxy-based loss functions to leverage rich data-to-data relations as well as fast convergence. Furthermore, the proposed DML approach utilizes both global and local features to obtain rich representations in DML model training. Finally, we also use the second-order attention for feature enhancement to improve accurate and efficient retrieval. In our experiments, we extensively evaluated the proposed DML approach on four public benchmarks, and the experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieved state-of-the-art performance on all benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 深度度量学习 (DML) 模型通常需要强大的局部和全局表示，然而，在 DML 模型训练中有效集成局部和全局特征是一个挑战。 DML 模型通常使用特定的损失函数进行训练，包括基于成对和基于代理的损失。基于成对的损失函数利用了数据点之间丰富的语义关系，然而，它们在 DML 模型训练过程中经常会遇到收敛缓慢的问题。另一方面，基于代理的损失函数通常会导致训练过程中收敛速度显着加快，而基于代理的损失通常无法充分探索数据点之间的丰富关系。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 DML 方法来应对这些挑战。所提出的 DML 方法通过集成基于成对和基于代理的损失函数来利用混合损失，以利用丰富的数据到数据关系以及快速收敛。此外，所提出的 DML 方法利用全局和局部特征在 DML 模型训练中获得丰富的表示。最后，我们还使用二阶注意力进行特征增强，以提高检索的准确率和效率。在我们的实验中，我们在四个公共基准上广泛评估了所提出的 DML 方法，实验结果表明所提出的方法在所有基准上都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合全局和局部特征的多头深度度量学习方法，通过混合损失函数解决现有模型收敛速度与特征利用不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度度量学习模型在整合局部与全局特征时存在挑战，pairwise损失收敛慢而proxy损失未能充分利用数据间关系，需兼顾两者优势。
AI.method: 设计混合损失函数融合pairwise与proxy损失，结合全局局部特征，并引入二阶注意力机制增强特征表示。
AI.result: 在四个公开基准数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了收敛速度与特征利用，为深度度量学习提供新思路。

title: Brain Tumor Classification by Cascaded Multiscale Multitask Learning Framework Based on Feature Aggregation
title_zh: 基于特征聚合的级联多尺度多任务学习框架的脑肿瘤分类
abstract: Brain tumor analysis in MRI images is a significant and challenging issue because misdiagnosis can lead to death. Diagnosis and evaluation of brain tumors in the early stages increase the probability of successful treatment. However, the complexity and variety of tumors, shapes, and locations make their segmentation and classification complex. In this regard, numerous researchers have proposed brain tumor segmentation and classification methods. This paper presents an approach that simultaneously segments and classifies brain tumors in MRI images using a framework that contains MRI image enhancement and tumor region detection. Eventually, a network based on a multitask learning approach is proposed. Subjective and objective results indicate that the segmentation and classification results based on evaluation metrics are better or comparable to the state-of-the-art.
summary: Brain tumor analysis in MRI images is a significant and challenging issue because misdiagnosis can lead to death. Diagnosis and evaluation of brain tumors in the early stages increase the probability of successful treatment. However, the complexity and variety of tumors, shapes, and locations make their segmentation and classification complex. In this regard, numerous researchers have proposed brain tumor segmentation and classification methods. This paper presents an approach that simultaneously segments and classifies brain tumors in MRI images using a framework that contains MRI image enhancement and tumor region detection. Eventually, a network based on a multitask learning approach is proposed. Subjective and objective results indicate that the segmentation and classification results based on evaluation metrics are better or comparable to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: MRI 图像中的脑肿瘤分析是一个重要且具有挑战性的问题，因为误诊可能导致死亡。早期诊断和评估脑肿瘤可以增加成功治疗的可能性。然而，肿瘤、形状和位置的复杂性和多样性使得它们的分割和分类变得复杂。对此，众多研究人员提出了脑肿瘤分割和分类方法。本文提出了一种使用包含 MRI 图像增强和肿瘤区域检测的框架同时对 MRI 图像中的脑肿瘤进行分割和分类的方法。最终，提出了一种基于多任务学习方法的网络。主观和客观结果表明，基于评估指标的分割和分类结果更好或与​​最先进的技术相当。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于特征聚合的级联多尺度多任务学习框架，用于MRI图像中脑肿瘤的同时分割与分类。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤在MRI图像中的分割与分类因肿瘤形态多样、位置复杂而具有挑战性，需更高效的方法以提高诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用级联多尺度多任务学习框架，结合特征聚合技术，同时进行MRI图像增强、肿瘤区域检测及分类任务。
AI.result: 在多个评估指标上，分割和分类效果优于或与现有最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的多任务学习框架有效提升了脑肿瘤分割与分类的准确性，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Sayan Rakshit,Anwesh Mohanty,Ruchika Chavhan,Biplab Banerjee,Gemma Roig,Subhasis Chaudhuri
title: FRIDA -- Generative Feature Replay for Incremental Domain Adaptation
title_zh: FRIDA——增量域适应的生成特征重播
abstract: We tackle the novel problem of incremental unsupervised domain adaptation (IDA) in this paper. We assume that a labeled source domain and different unlabeled target domains are incrementally observed with the constraint that data corresponding to the current domain is only available at a time. The goal is to preserve the accuracies for all the past domains while generalizing well for the current domain. The IDA setup suffers due to the abrupt differences among the domains and the unavailability of past data including the source domain. Inspired by the notion of generative feature replay, we propose a novel framework called Feature Replay based Incremental Domain Adaptation (FRIDA) which leverages a new incremental generative adversarial network (GAN) called domain-generic auxiliary classification GAN (DGAC-GAN) for producing domain-specific feature representations seamlessly. For domain alignment, we propose a simple extension of the popular domain adversarial neural network (DANN) called DANN-IB which encourages discriminative domain-invariant and task-relevant feature learning. Experimental results on Office-Home, Office-CalTech, and DomainNet datasets confirm that FRIDA maintains superior stability-plasticity trade-off than the literature.
summary: We tackle the novel problem of incremental unsupervised domain adaptation (IDA) in this paper. We assume that a labeled source domain and different unlabeled target domains are incrementally observed with the constraint that data corresponding to the current domain is only available at a time. The goal is to preserve the accuracies for all the past domains while generalizing well for the current domain. The IDA setup suffers due to the abrupt differences among the domains and the unavailability of past data including the source domain. Inspired by the notion of generative feature replay, we propose a novel framework called Feature Replay based Incremental Domain Adaptation (FRIDA) which leverages a new incremental generative adversarial network (GAN) called domain-generic auxiliary classification GAN (DGAC-GAN) for producing domain-specific feature representations seamlessly. For domain alignment, we propose a simple extension of the popular domain adversarial neural network (DANN) called DANN-IB which encourages discriminative domain-invariant and task-relevant feature learning. Experimental results on Office-Home, Office-CalTech, and DomainNet datasets confirm that FRIDA maintains superior stability-plasticity trade-off than the literature.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中解决了增量无监督域适应（IDA）的新问题。我们假设标记的源域和不同的未标记的目标域被增量地观察，约束条件是与当前域对应的数据一次只能可用。目标是保留所有过去领域的准确性，同时很好地概括当前领域。由于域之间的突然差异以及包括源域在内的过去数据的不可用，IDA 设置受到影响。受生成特征重放概念的启发，我们提出了一种称为基于特征重放的增量域适应（FRIDA）的新颖框架，该框架利用称为域通用辅助分类 GAN（DGAC-GAN）的新增量生成对抗网络（GAN）来无缝生成特定于域的特征表示。对于域对齐，我们提出了流行的域对抗神经网络（DANN）的简单扩展，称为 DANN-IB，它鼓励区分域不变和任务相关的特征学习。 Office-Home、Office-CalTech 和 DomainNet 数据集上的实验结果证实，FRIDA 保持了比文献更优越的稳定性-可塑性权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为FRIDA的增量领域自适应框架，旨在解决在逐步获取不同目标域数据时保持历史域准确性和适应当前域的问题。
AI.motivation: 增量领域自适应面临领域间差异大、无法访问历史数据的挑战，需在保持过去模型稳定性的同时适应新领域。
AI.method: 提出FRIDA框架，结合生成对抗网络DGAC-GAN生成领域特征表示，并改进DANN-IB方法实现领域对齐。
AI.result: 在Office-Home、Office-CalTech和DomainNet数据集上，FRIDA在稳定性-可塑性权衡上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: FRIDA通过生成特征回放和改进对抗网络，有效解决了增量领域自适应问题，验证了其在多数据集上的优越性。

authors_text: Erfan Aasi,Mingyu Cai,Cristian Ioan Vasile,Calin Belta
title: Time-Incremental Learning from Data Using Temporal Logics
title_zh: 使用时态逻辑从数据中进行时间增量学习
abstract: Real-time and human-interpretable decision-making in cyber-physical systems is a significant but challenging task, which usually requires predictions of possible future events from limited data. In this paper, we introduce a time-incremental learning framework: given a dataset of labeled signal traces with a common time horizon, we propose a method to predict the label of a signal that is received incrementally over time, referred to as prefix signal. Prefix signals are the signals that are being observed as they are generated, and their time length is shorter than the common horizon of signals. We present a novel decision-tree based approach to generate a finite number of Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications from the given dataset, and construct a predictor based on them. Each STL specification, as a binary classifier of time-series data, captures the temporal properties of the dataset over time. The predictor is constructed by assigning time-variant weights to the STL formulas. The weights are learned by using neural networks, with the goal of minimizing the misclassification rate for the prefix signals defined over the given dataset. The learned predictor is used to predict the label of a prefix signal, by computing the weighted sum of the robustness of the prefix signal with respect to each STL formula. The effectiveness and classification performance of our algorithm are evaluated on an urban-driving and a naval-surveillance case studies.
summary: Real-time and human-interpretable decision-making in cyber-physical systems is a significant but challenging task, which usually requires predictions of possible future events from limited data. In this paper, we introduce a time-incremental learning framework: given a dataset of labeled signal traces with a common time horizon, we propose a method to predict the label of a signal that is received incrementally over time, referred to as prefix signal. Prefix signals are the signals that are being observed as they are generated, and their time length is shorter than the common horizon of signals. We present a novel decision-tree based approach to generate a finite number of Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications from the given dataset, and construct a predictor based on them. Each STL specification, as a binary classifier of time-series data, captures the temporal properties of the dataset over time. The predictor is constructed by assigning time-variant weights to the STL formulas. The weights are learned by using neural networks, with the goal of minimizing the misclassification rate for the prefix signals defined over the given dataset. The learned predictor is used to predict the label of a prefix signal, by computing the weighted sum of the robustness of the prefix signal with respect to each STL formula. The effectiveness and classification performance of our algorithm are evaluated on an urban-driving and a naval-surveillance case studies.
abstract_zh: 网络物理系统中的实时和人类可解释的决策是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，通常需要从有限的数据中预测未来可能发生的事件。在本文中，我们介绍了一种时间增量学习框架：给定具有共同时间范围的标记信号轨迹数据集，我们提出了一种预测随时间增量接收的信号（称为前缀信号）标签的方法。前缀信号是在生成时就被观测的信号，其时间长度比信号的公共视界要短。我们提出了一种新颖的基于决策树的方法，从给定的数据集中生成有限数量的信号时态逻辑（STL）规范，并基于它们构建预测器。每个 STL 规范作为时间序列数据的二元分类器，捕获数据集随时间变化的时间属性。通过为 STL 公式分配时变权重来构建预测器。权重是通过使用神经网络来学习的，目的是最小化给定数据集上定义的前缀信号的误分类率。学习到的预测器用于通过计算前缀信号相对于每个 STL 公式的鲁棒性的加权和来预测前缀信号的标签。我们的算法的有效性和分类性能在城市驾驶和海军监视案例研究中进行了评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间逻辑的增量学习框架，用于从有限数据中预测实时信号标签。
AI.motivation: 在复杂系统中实现可解释的实时决策面临挑战，传统方法难以处理动态数据流和时间依赖性。
AI.method: 通过决策树生成信号时序逻辑(STL)规范，结合神经网络动态调整权重，计算前缀信号的鲁棒性加权和进行分类。
AI.result: 在城市驾驶和海军监控案例中验证了算法有效性，展示了对增量信号的高分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过形式化逻辑与机器学习结合，在保证可解释性的同时提升了动态数据预测性能。

search_text: Time-Incremental Learning from Data Using Temporal Logics 使用时态逻辑从数据中进行时间增量学习 Real-time and human-interpretable decision-making in cyber-physical systems is a significant but challenging task, which usually requires predictions of possible future events from limited data. In this paper, we introduce a time-incremental learning framework: given a dataset of labeled signal traces with a common time horizon, we propose a method to predict the label of a signal that is received incrementally over time, referred to as prefix signal. Prefix signals are the signals that are being observed as they are generated, and their time length is shorter than the common horizon of signals. We present a novel decision-tree based approach to generate a finite number of Signal Temporal Logic (STL) specifications from the given dataset, and construct a predictor based on them. Each STL specification, as a binary classifier of time-series data, captures the temporal properties of the dataset over time. The predictor is constructed by assigning time-variant weights to the STL formulas. The weights are learned by using neural networks, with the goal of minimizing the misclassification rate for the prefix signals defined over the given dataset. The learned predictor is used to predict the label of a prefix signal, by computing the weighted sum of the robustness of the prefix signal with respect to each STL formula. The effectiveness and classification performance of our algorithm are evaluated on an urban-driving and a naval-surveillance case studies. 网络物理系统中的实时和人类可解释的决策是一项重要但具有挑战性的任务，通常需要从有限的数据中预测未来可能发生的事件。在本文中，我们介绍了一种时间增量学习框架：给定具有共同时间范围的标记信号轨迹数据集，我们提出了一种预测随时间增量接收的信号（称为前缀信号）标签的方法。前缀信号是在生成时就被观测的信号，其时间长度比信号的公共视界要短。我们提出了一种新颖的基于决策树的方法，从给定的数据集中生成有限数量的信号时态逻辑（STL）规范，并基于它们构建预测器。每个 STL 规范作为时间序列数据的二元分类器，捕获数据集随时间变化的时间属性。通过为 STL 公式分配时变权重来构建预测器。权重是通过使用神经网络来学习的，目的是最小化给定数据集上定义的前缀信号的误分类率。学习到的预测器用于通过计算前缀信号相对于每个 STL 公式的鲁棒性的加权和来预测前缀信号的标签。我们的算法的有效性和分类性能在城市驾驶和海军监视案例研究中进行了评估。 本文提出了一种基于时间逻辑的增量学习框架，用于从有限数据中预测实时信号标签。 Erfan Aasi,Mingyu Cai,Cristian Ioan Vasile,Calin Belta cs.LG,cs.FL,cs.RO

authors_text: Aleksandra Ćiprijanović,Diana Kafkes,Gregory Snyder,F. Javier Sánchez,Gabriel Nathan Perdue,Kevin Pedro,Brian Nord,Sandeep Madireddy,Stefan M. Wild
title: DeepAdversaries: Examining the Robustness of Deep Learning Models for Galaxy Morphology Classification
title_zh: DeepAdversaries：检查星系形态分类深度学习模型的稳健性
comment: 20 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables; accepted in MLST
comments: 20 pages, 6 figures, 5 tables; accepted in MLST
abstract: With increased adoption of supervised deep learning methods for processing and analysis of cosmological survey data, the assessment of data perturbation effects (that can naturally occur in the data processing and analysis pipelines) and the development of methods that increase model robustness are increasingly important. In the context of morphological classification of galaxies, we study the effects of perturbations in imaging data. In particular, we examine the consequences of using neural networks when training on baseline data and testing on perturbed data. We consider perturbations associated with two primary sources: 1) increased observational noise as represented by higher levels of Poisson noise and 2) data processing noise incurred by steps such as image compression or telescope errors as represented by one-pixel adversarial attacks. We also test the efficacy of domain adaptation techniques in mitigating the perturbation-driven errors. We use classification accuracy, latent space visualizations, and latent space distance to assess model robustness. Without domain adaptation, we find that processing pixel-level errors easily flip the classification into an incorrect class and that higher observational noise makes the model trained on low-noise data unable to classify galaxy morphologies. On the other hand, we show that training with domain adaptation improves model robustness and mitigates the effects of these perturbations, improving the classification accuracy by 23% on data with higher observational noise. Domain adaptation also increases by a factor of ~2.3 the latent space distance between the baseline and the incorrectly classified one-pixel perturbed image, making the model more robust to inadvertent perturbations.

abstract_zh: 随着越来越多地采用监督深度学习方法来处理和分析宇宙学调查数据，数据扰动效应的评估（自然发生在数据处理和分析流程中）以及开发提高模型鲁棒性的方法变得越来越重要。在星系形态分类的背景下，我们研究成像数据中的扰动的影响。特别是，我们研究了在基线数据训练和扰动数据测试时使用神经网络的后果。我们考虑与两个主要来源相关的扰动：1）观测噪声增加，以较高水平的泊松噪声为代表；2）由图像压缩或望远镜误差等步骤引起的数据处理噪声，以单像素对抗性攻击为代表。我们还测试了域适应技术在减轻扰动驱动的错误方面的功效。我们使用分类准确性、潜在空间可视化和潜在空间距离来评估模型的稳健性。如果没有域适应，我们发现处理像素级错误很容易将分类翻转到不正确的类别，并且较高的观测噪声使得在低噪声数据上训练的模型无法对星系形态进行分类。另一方面，我们表明，领域适应训练提高了模型的鲁棒性并减轻了这些扰动的影响，将具有较高观测噪声的数据的分类精度提高了 23%。域适应还将基线与错误分类的单像素扰动图像之间的潜在空间距离增加了约 2.3 倍，使模型对无意的扰动更加鲁棒。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究深度学习模型在星系形态分类任务中对数据扰动的鲁棒性，探讨噪声和对抗攻击的影响及领域自适应方法的缓解效果。
AI.motivation: 随着监督深度学习在宇宙学调查数据中的广泛应用，评估数据扰动影响及提升模型鲁棒性的方法变得至关重要，特别是在星系形态分类任务中。
AI.method: 通过在基线数据上训练神经网络并在扰动数据（泊松噪声和单像素对抗攻击）上测试，结合分类准确率、潜在空间可视化及距离指标评估模型鲁棒性，并测试领域自适应技术的效果。
AI.result: 未采用领域自适应时，像素级误差易导致分类错误，高观测噪声使模型失效；而领域自适应使高噪声数据分类准确率提升23%，潜在空间距离增加2.3倍，显著增强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 领域自适应技术能有效缓解观测噪声和处理噪声引起的扰动，显著提升深度学习模型在星系形态分类中的鲁棒性与准确性。

title: Multimodal perception for dexterous manipulation
title_zh: 灵巧操控的多模态感知
abstract: Humans usually perceive the world in a multimodal way that vision, touch, sound are utilised to understand surroundings from various dimensions. These senses are combined together to achieve a synergistic effect where the learning is more effectively than using each sense separately. For robotics, vision and touch are two key senses for the dexterous manipulation. Vision usually gives us apparent features like shape, color, and the touch provides local information such as friction, texture, etc. Due to the complementary properties between visual and tactile senses, it is desirable for us to combine vision and touch for a synergistic perception and manipulation. Many researches have been investigated about multimodal perception such as cross-modal learning, 3D reconstruction, multimodal translation with vision and touch. Specifically, we propose a cross-modal sensory data generation framework for the translation between vision and touch, which is able to generate realistic pseudo data. By using this cross-modal translation method, it is desirable for us to make up inaccessible data, helping us to learn the object's properties from different views. Recently, the attention mechanism becomes a popular method either in visual perception or in tactile perception. We propose a spatio-temporal attention model for tactile texture recognition, which takes both spatial features and time dimension into consideration. Our proposed method not only pays attention to the salient features in each spatial feature, but also models the temporal correlation in the through the time. The obvious improvement proves the efficiency of our selective attention mechanism. The spatio-temporal attention method has potential in many applications such as grasping, recognition, and multimodal perception.
summary: Humans usually perceive the world in a multimodal way that vision, touch, sound are utilised to understand surroundings from various dimensions. These senses are combined together to achieve a synergistic effect where the learning is more effectively than using each sense separately. For robotics, vision and touch are two key senses for the dexterous manipulation. Vision usually gives us apparent features like shape, color, and the touch provides local information such as friction, texture, etc. Due to the complementary properties between visual and tactile senses, it is desirable for us to combine vision and touch for a synergistic perception and manipulation. Many researches have been investigated about multimodal perception such as cross-modal learning, 3D reconstruction, multimodal translation with vision and touch. Specifically, we propose a cross-modal sensory data generation framework for the translation between vision and touch, which is able to generate realistic pseudo data. By using this cross-modal translation method, it is desirable for us to make up inaccessible data, helping us to learn the object's properties from different views. Recently, the attention mechanism becomes a popular method either in visual perception or in tactile perception. We propose a spatio-temporal attention model for tactile texture recognition, which takes both spatial features and time dimension into consideration. Our proposed method not only pays attention to the salient features in each spatial feature, but also models the temporal correlation in the through the time. The obvious improvement proves the efficiency of our selective attention mechanism. The spatio-temporal attention method has potential in many applications such as grasping, recognition, and multimodal perception.
abstract_zh: 人类通常以多模态的方式感知世界，利用视觉、触觉、声音从各个维度了解周围环境。这些感官结合在一起以达到协同效应，学习比单独使用每种感官更有效。对于机器人技术来说，视觉和触觉是灵巧操纵的两个关键感官。视觉通常为我们提供形状、颜色等明显特征，而触摸则提供摩擦、纹理等局部信息。由于视觉和触觉之间的互补特性，我们希望将视觉和触觉结合起来，以实现协同感知和操纵。许多研究已经针对多模态感知进行了研究，例如跨模态学习、3D 重建、视觉和触觉的多模态翻译。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于视觉和触觉之间转换的跨模式感觉数据生成框架，它能够生成真实的伪数据。通过使用这种跨模态转换方法，我们希望弥补无法访问的数据，帮助我们从不同的角度了解对象的属性。近年来，注意力机制成为视觉感知或触觉感知中的流行方法。我们提出了一种用于触觉纹理识别的时空注意力模型，该模型同时考虑了空间特征和时间维度。我们提出的方法不仅关注每个空间特征中的显着特征，而且还对整个时间的时间相关性进行建模。明显的改进证明了我们选择性注意机制的效率。时空注意力方法在抓取、识别和多模态感知等许多应用中具有潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过融合视觉与触觉的多模态感知技术，提升机器人灵巧操作能力。
AI.motivation: 人类通过多感官协同感知环境，而机器人仅依赖单一模态难以实现高效学习。视觉与触觉具有互补性，结合二者可增强对物体属性的理解，从而提升操作精度。
AI.method: 提出跨模态感知数据生成框架，实现视觉与触觉的相互转换；设计时空注意力模型，同时建模触觉的时空特征以提升纹理识别能力。
AI.result: 生成的伪数据有效弥补了数据不足问题，时空注意力机制显著提升了触觉纹理识别效率。
AI.conclusion: 多模态感知框架与时空注意力模型为机器人抓取、识别等任务提供了新方法，具有广泛的应用前景。
