tldr: 本文旨在通过融合视觉与触觉的多模态感知技术，提升机器人灵巧操作能力。
motivation: 人类通过多感官协同感知环境，而机器人仅依赖单一模态难以实现高效学习。视觉与触觉具有互补性，结合二者可增强对物体属性的理解，从而提升操作精度。
method: 提出跨模态感知数据生成框架，实现视觉与触觉的相互转换；设计时空注意力模型，同时建模触觉的时空特征以提升纹理识别能力。
result: 生成的伪数据有效弥补了数据不足问题，时空注意力机制显著提升了触觉纹理识别效率。
conclusion: 多模态感知框架与时空注意力模型为机器人抓取、识别等任务提供了新方法，具有广泛的应用前景。
search_text: Multimodal perception for dexterous manipulation 灵巧操控的多模态感知 Humans usually perceive the world in a multimodal way that vision, touch, sound are utilised to understand surroundings from various dimensions. These senses are combined together to achieve a synergistic effect where the learning is more effectively than using each sense separately. For robotics, vision and touch are two key senses for the dexterous manipulation. Vision usually gives us apparent features like shape, color, and the touch provides local information such as friction, texture, etc. Due to the complementary properties between visual and tactile senses, it is desirable for us to combine vision and touch for a synergistic perception and manipulation. Many researches have been investigated about multimodal perception such as cross-modal learning, 3D reconstruction, multimodal translation with vision and touch. Specifically, we propose a cross-modal sensory data generation framework for the translation between vision and touch, which is able to generate realistic pseudo data. By using this cross-modal translation method, it is desirable for us to make up inaccessible data, helping us to learn the object's properties from different views. Recently, the attention mechanism becomes a popular method either in visual perception or in tactile perception. We propose a spatio-temporal attention model for tactile texture recognition, which takes both spatial features and time dimension into consideration. Our proposed method not only pays attention to the salient features in each spatial feature, but also models the temporal correlation in the through the time. The obvious improvement proves the efficiency of our selective attention mechanism. The spatio-temporal attention method has potential in many applications such as grasping, recognition, and multimodal perception. 人类通常以多模态的方式感知世界，利用视觉、触觉、声音从各个维度了解周围环境。这些感官结合在一起以达到协同效应，学习比单独使用每种感官更有效。对于机器人技术来说，视觉和触觉是灵巧操纵的两个关键感官。视觉通常为我们提供形状、颜色等明显特征，而触摸则提供摩擦、纹理等局部信息。由于视觉和触觉之间的互补特性，我们希望将视觉和触觉结合起来，以实现协同感知和操纵。许多研究已经针对多模态感知进行了研究，例如跨模态学习、3D 重建、视觉和触觉的多模态翻译。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于视觉和触觉之间转换的跨模式感觉数据生成框架，它能够生成真实的伪数据。通过使用这种跨模态转换方法，我们希望弥补无法访问的数据，帮助我们从不同的角度了解对象的属性。近年来，注意力机制成为视觉感知或触觉感知中的流行方法。我们提出了一种用于触觉纹理识别的时空注意力模型，该模型同时考虑了空间特征和时间维度。我们提出的方法不仅关注每个空间特征中的显着特征，而且还对整个时间的时间相关性进行建模。明显的改进证明了我们选择性注意机制的效率。时空注意力方法在抓取、识别和多模态感知等许多应用中具有潜力。 本文旨在通过融合视觉与触觉的多模态感知技术，提升机器人灵巧操作能力。 Guanqun Cao,Shan Luo cs.CV,cs.RO

title: Beta-VAE Reproducibility: Challenges and Extensions
title_zh: Beta-VAE 再现性：挑战和扩展
abstract: $β$-VAE is a follow-up technique to variational autoencoders that proposes special weighting of the KL divergence term in the VAE loss to obtain disentangled representations. Unsupervised learning is known to be brittle even on toy datasets and a meaningful, mathematically precise definition of disentanglement remains difficult to find. Here we investigate the original $β$-VAE paper and add evidence to the results previously obtained indicating its lack of reproducibility. We also further expand the experimentation of the models and include further more complex datasets in the analysis. We also implement an FID scoring metric for the $β$-VAE model and conclude a qualitative analysis of the results obtained. We end with a brief discussion on possible future investigations that can be conducted to add more robustness to the claims.
summary: $β$-VAE is a follow-up technique to variational autoencoders that proposes special weighting of the KL divergence term in the VAE loss to obtain disentangled representations. Unsupervised learning is known to be brittle even on toy datasets and a meaningful, mathematically precise definition of disentanglement remains difficult to find. Here we investigate the original $β$-VAE paper and add evidence to the results previously obtained indicating its lack of reproducibility. We also further expand the experimentation of the models and include further more complex datasets in the analysis. We also implement an FID scoring metric for the $β$-VAE model and conclude a qualitative analysis of the results obtained. We end with a brief discussion on possible future investigations that can be conducted to add more robustness to the claims.
abstract_zh: $β$-VAE 是变分自动编码器的后续技术，它提出了 VAE 损失中 KL 散度项的特殊权重，以获得解缠结的表示。众所周知，无监督学习即使在玩具数据集上也是脆弱的，而且仍然很难找到有意义的、数学上精确的解开定义。在这里，我们研究了最初的 $β$-VAE 论文，并为之前获得的结果添加了证据，表明其缺乏可重复性。我们还进一步扩展了模型的实验，并在分析中包含了更复杂的数据集。我们还为 $β$-VAE 模型实施了 FID 评分指标，并对所得结果进行了定性分析。最后，我们简要讨论了未来可能进行的调查，以增强声明的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨β-VAE模型的可复现性问题，并通过扩展实验和引入FID评分指标进行分析。
AI.motivation: β-VAE作为VAE的改进方法，其解缠表示的定义缺乏数学严谨性，且无监督学习在玩具数据集上表现脆弱，需验证其结果的可复现性。
AI.method: 分析原始β-VAE论文，增加实验证据，使用更复杂数据集，并引入FID评分进行定性分析。
AI.result: 证实原始β-VAE结果难以复现，新实验揭示模型在复杂数据上的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步研究以增强β-VAE理论基础和实验鲁棒性，明确解缠表示的定义。

title: Robust Convergence in Federated Learning through Label-wise Clustering
title_zh: 通过标签智能聚类实现联邦学习的鲁棒收敛
abstract: Non-IID dataset and heterogeneous environment of the local clients are regarded as a major issue in Federated Learning (FL), causing a downturn in the convergence without achieving satisfactory performance. In this paper, we propose a novel Label-wise clustering algorithm that guarantees the trainability among geographically dispersed heterogeneous local clients, by selecting only the local models trained with a dataset that approximates into uniformly distributed class labels, which is likely to obtain faster minimization of the loss and increment the accuracy among the FL network. Through conducting experiments on the suggested six common non-IID scenarios, we empirically show that the vanilla FL aggregation model is incapable of gaining robust convergence generating biased pre-trained local models and drifting the local weights to mislead the trainability in the worst case. Moreover, we quantitatively estimate the expected performance of the local models before training, which offers a global server to select the optimal clients, saving additional computational costs. Ultimately, in order to gain resolution of the non-convergence in such non-IID situations, we design clustering algorithms based on local input class labels, accommodating the diversity and assorting clients that could lead the overall system to attain the swift convergence as global training continues. Our paper shows that proposed Label-wise clustering demonstrates prompt and robust convergence compared to other FL algorithms when local training datasets are non-IID or coexist with IID through multiple experiments.
summary: Non-IID dataset and heterogeneous environment of the local clients are regarded as a major issue in Federated Learning (FL), causing a downturn in the convergence without achieving satisfactory performance. In this paper, we propose a novel Label-wise clustering algorithm that guarantees the trainability among geographically dispersed heterogeneous local clients, by selecting only the local models trained with a dataset that approximates into uniformly distributed class labels, which is likely to obtain faster minimization of the loss and increment the accuracy among the FL network. Through conducting experiments on the suggested six common non-IID scenarios, we empirically show that the vanilla FL aggregation model is incapable of gaining robust convergence generating biased pre-trained local models and drifting the local weights to mislead the trainability in the worst case. Moreover, we quantitatively estimate the expected performance of the local models before training, which offers a global server to select the optimal clients, saving additional computational costs. Ultimately, in order to gain resolution of the non-convergence in such non-IID situations, we design clustering algorithms based on local input class labels, accommodating the diversity and assorting clients that could lead the overall system to attain the swift convergence as global training continues. Our paper shows that proposed Label-wise clustering demonstrates prompt and robust convergence compared to other FL algorithms when local training datasets are non-IID or coexist with IID through multiple experiments.
abstract_zh: 非独立同分布数据集和本地客户端的异构环境被认为是联邦学习（FL）中的一个主要问题，导致收敛速度下降而没有达到令人满意的性能。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 Label-wise 聚类算法，通过仅选择使用近似均匀分布的类标签的数据集训练的本地模型，保证地理上分散的异构本地客户端之间的可训练性，这可能会更快地最小化损失并提高 FL 网络的准确性。通过对建议的六种常见非独立同分布场景进行实验，我们凭经验表明，普通 FL 聚合模型无法获得稳健的收敛，从而生成有偏差的预训练局部模型，并在最坏的情况下漂移局部权重以误导可训练性。此外，我们在训练前定量估计局部模型的预期性能，这提供了一个全局服务器来选择最佳客户端，从而节省了额外的计算成本。最终，为了解决这种非独立同分布情况下的不收敛问题，我们设计了基于本地输入类标签的聚类算法，适应多样性并分类客户端，从而随着全局训练的继续，引导整个系统实现快速收敛。我们的论文表明，当本地训练数据集是非 IID 或通过多个实验与 IID 共存时，与其他 FL 算法相比，所提出的 Label-wise 聚类表现出快速且鲁棒的收敛性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于标签聚类的联邦学习算法，旨在解决非独立同分布（non-IID）数据和异构环境下联邦学习的收敛性问题。
AI.motivation: 联邦学习中，本地客户端的数据分布不均（non-IID）和环境异构性导致模型收敛困难，传统聚合方法易产生偏差模型并降低训练效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种标签级聚类算法，通过筛选本地数据类别分布接近均匀的模型，结合聚类策略选择最优客户端，减少计算成本并加速全局收敛。
AI.result: 在六个非IID场景的实验中，所提方法相比传统联邦学习算法实现了更快的损失最小化和更高的准确率，且能有效避免模型偏差和权重漂移。
AI.conclusion: 标签级聚类算法在非IID或混合分布数据下表现出更快速和稳健的收敛性，为联邦学习提供了有效的异构环境适应方案。

title: An AGM Approach to Revising Preferences
title_zh: 年度股东大会修改偏好的方法
abstract: We look at preference change arising out of an interaction between two elements: the first is an initial preference ranking encoding a pre-existing attitude; the second element is new preference information signaling input from an authoritative source, which may come into conflict with the initial preference. The aim is to adjust the initial preference and bring it in line with the new preference, without having to give up more information than necessary. We model this process using the formal machinery of belief change, along the lines of the well-known AGM approach. We propose a set of fundamental rationality postulates, and derive the main results of the paper: a set of representation theorems showing that preference change according to these postulates can be rationalized as a choice function guided by a ranking on the comparisons in the initial preference order. We conclude by presenting operators satisfying our proposed postulates. Our approach thus allows us to situate preference revision within the larger family of belief change operators.
summary: We look at preference change arising out of an interaction between two elements: the first is an initial preference ranking encoding a pre-existing attitude; the second element is new preference information signaling input from an authoritative source, which may come into conflict with the initial preference. The aim is to adjust the initial preference and bring it in line with the new preference, without having to give up more information than necessary. We model this process using the formal machinery of belief change, along the lines of the well-known AGM approach. We propose a set of fundamental rationality postulates, and derive the main results of the paper: a set of representation theorems showing that preference change according to these postulates can be rationalized as a choice function guided by a ranking on the comparisons in the initial preference order. We conclude by presenting operators satisfying our proposed postulates. Our approach thus allows us to situate preference revision within the larger family of belief change operators.
abstract_zh: 我们着眼于两个因素之间相互作用所产生的偏好变化：第一个是编码预先存在的态度的初始偏好排名；第二个元素是来自权威源的新偏好信息信令输入，其可能与初始偏好发生冲突。目的是调整初始偏好并使其符合新的偏好，而不必放弃不必要的信息。我们按照众所周知的年度股东大会方法，使用信念改变的正式机制来模拟这个过程。我们提出了一组基本理性假设，并得出了本文的主要结果：一组表示定理表明，根据这些假设的偏好变化可以被合理化为一个选择函数，该函数由初始偏好顺序中的比较排名引导。最后，我们提出了满足我们提出的假设的算子。因此，我们的方法使我们能够将偏好修正置于更大的信念改变操作者家族中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AGM理论的偏好修订方法，通过整合初始偏好与权威新信息解决冲突，实现最小信息损失的偏好调整。
AI.motivation: 当权威新信息与原有偏好冲突时，需在不丢失过多原有信息的前提下调整偏好，现有方法缺乏系统性解决方案。
AI.method: 采用AGM信念变化理论框架，提出理性公理体系，推导表示定理证明偏好变化可由初始偏好排序的比较排名引导的选择函数实现。
AI.result: 构建满足所提公理的偏好修订算子，证明偏好修订可纳入信念变化算子家族，建立形式化理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为偏好修订提供了结构化理论模型，使偏好调整过程符合理性约束，拓展了信念变化理论的应用范围。

authors_text: Kai Chen,Weihua Chen,Tao He,Rong Du,Fan Wang,Xiuyu Sun,Yuchen Guo,Guiguang Ding
title: TAGPerson: A Target-Aware Generation Pipeline for Person Re-identification
title_zh: TAGPerson：用于人员重新识别的目标感知生成管道
abstract: Nowadays, real data in person re-identification (ReID) task is facing privacy issues, e.g., the banned dataset DukeMTMC-ReID. Thus it becomes much harder to collect real data for ReID task. Meanwhile, the labor cost of labeling ReID data is still very high and further hinders the development of the ReID research. Therefore, many methods turn to generate synthetic images for ReID algorithms as alternatives instead of real images. However, there is an inevitable domain gap between synthetic and real images. In previous methods, the generation process is based on virtual scenes, and their synthetic training data can not be changed according to different target real scenes automatically. To handle this problem, we propose a novel Target-Aware Generation pipeline to produce synthetic person images, called TAGPerson. Specifically, it involves a parameterized rendering method, where the parameters are controllable and can be adjusted according to target scenes. In TAGPerson, we extract information from target scenes and use them to control our parameterized rendering process to generate target-aware synthetic images, which would hold a smaller gap to the real images in the target domain. In our experiments, our target-aware synthetic images can achieve a much higher performance than the generalized synthetic images on MSMT17, i.e. 47.5% vs. 40.9% for rank-1 accuracy. We will release this toolkit\footnote{\noindent Code is available at \href{https://github.com/tagperson/tagperson-blender}{https://github.com/tagperson/tagperson-blender}} for the ReID community to generate synthetic images at any desired taste.
summary: Nowadays, real data in person re-identification (ReID) task is facing privacy issues, e.g., the banned dataset DukeMTMC-ReID. Thus it becomes much harder to collect real data for ReID task. Meanwhile, the labor cost of labeling ReID data is still very high and further hinders the development of the ReID research. Therefore, many methods turn to generate synthetic images for ReID algorithms as alternatives instead of real images. However, there is an inevitable domain gap between synthetic and real images. In previous methods, the generation process is based on virtual scenes, and their synthetic training data can not be changed according to different target real scenes automatically. To handle this problem, we propose a novel Target-Aware Generation pipeline to produce synthetic person images, called TAGPerson. Specifically, it involves a parameterized rendering method, where the parameters are controllable and can be adjusted according to target scenes. In TAGPerson, we extract information from target scenes and use them to control our parameterized rendering process to generate target-aware synthetic images, which would hold a smaller gap to the real images in the target domain. In our experiments, our target-aware synthetic images can achieve a much higher performance than the generalized synthetic images on MSMT17, i.e. 47.5% vs. 40.9% for rank-1 accuracy. We will release this toolkit\footnote{\noindent Code is available at \href{https://github.com/tagperson/tagperson-blender}{https://github.com/tagperson/tagperson-blender}} for the ReID community to generate synthetic images at any desired taste.
abstract_zh: 如今，真实数据的行人重识别（ReID）任务面临着隐私问题，例如被禁止的数据集 DukeMTMC-ReID。因此，为 ReID 任务收集真实数据变得更加困难。同时，标注ReID数据的人工成本仍然很高，进一步阻碍了ReID研究的发展。因此，许多方法转向为 ReID 算法生成合成图像作为替代方案，而不是真实图像。然而，合成图像和真实图像之间不可避免地存在域差距。以往的方法中，生成过程是基于虚拟场景的，其合成训练数据不能根据不同的目标真实场景自动改变。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的目标感知生成管道来生成合成人物图像，称为 TAGPerson。具体来说，涉及到参数化渲染方法，参数可控，可以根据目标场景进行调整。在 TAGPerson 中，我们从目标场景中提取信息，并使用它们来控制参数化渲染过程，以生成目标感知的合成图像，这将与目标域中的真实图像保持较小的差距。在我们的实验中，我们的目标感知合成图像可以实现比 MSMT17 上的广义合成图像更高的性能，即 1 级准确率分别为 47.5% 和 40.9%。我们将发布此工具包\footnote{\noindent 代码可在 \href{https://github.com/tagperson/tagperson-blender}{https://github.com/tagperson/tagperson-blender}} 获取，供 ReID 社区生成任何所需风格的合成图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAGPerson，一种针对行人重识别任务的目标感知合成图像生成方法，以解决真实数据隐私问题和标注成本高的挑战。
AI.motivation: 真实数据面临隐私限制且标注成本高昂，现有合成图像生成方法无法根据目标场景自动调整，导致领域差异较大。
AI.method: 设计参数化渲染方法，通过提取目标场景信息动态调整渲染参数，生成与目标领域更接近的合成图像。
AI.result: 在MSMT17数据集上，TAGPerson生成的合成图像rank-1准确率达47.5%，优于通用合成图像的40.9%。
AI.conclusion: TAGPerson有效缩小了合成图像与真实图像的领域差距，提升了ReID性能，并开源工具包促进社区研究。

authors_text: Yulin Wang,Yang Yue,Yuanze Lin,Haojun Jiang,Zihang Lai,Victor Kulikov,Nikita Orlov,Humphrey Shi,Gao Huang
title: AdaFocus V2: End-to-End Training of Spatial Dynamic Networks for Video Recognition
title_zh: AdaFocus V2：用于视频识别的空间动态网络的端到端训练
abstract: Recent works have shown that the computational efficiency of video recognition can be significantly improved by reducing the spatial redundancy. As a representative work, the adaptive focus method (AdaFocus) has achieved a favorable trade-off between accuracy and inference speed by dynamically identifying and attending to the informative regions in each video frame. However, AdaFocus requires a complicated three-stage training pipeline (involving reinforcement learning), leading to slow convergence and is unfriendly to practitioners. This work reformulates the training of AdaFocus as a simple one-stage algorithm by introducing a differentiable interpolation-based patch selection operation, enabling efficient end-to-end optimization. We further present an improved training scheme to address the issues introduced by the one-stage formulation, including the lack of supervision, input diversity and training stability. Moreover, a conditional-exit technique is proposed to perform temporal adaptive computation on top of AdaFocus without additional training. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets (i.e., ActivityNet, FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, Something-Something V1&V2, and Jester) demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms the original AdaFocus and other competitive baselines, while being considerably more simple and efficient to train. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/AdaFocusV2.
summary: Recent works have shown that the computational efficiency of video recognition can be significantly improved by reducing the spatial redundancy. As a representative work, the adaptive focus method (AdaFocus) has achieved a favorable trade-off between accuracy and inference speed by dynamically identifying and attending to the informative regions in each video frame. However, AdaFocus requires a complicated three-stage training pipeline (involving reinforcement learning), leading to slow convergence and is unfriendly to practitioners. This work reformulates the training of AdaFocus as a simple one-stage algorithm by introducing a differentiable interpolation-based patch selection operation, enabling efficient end-to-end optimization. We further present an improved training scheme to address the issues introduced by the one-stage formulation, including the lack of supervision, input diversity and training stability. Moreover, a conditional-exit technique is proposed to perform temporal adaptive computation on top of AdaFocus without additional training. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets (i.e., ActivityNet, FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, Something-Something V1&V2, and Jester) demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms the original AdaFocus and other competitive baselines, while being considerably more simple and efficient to train. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/AdaFocusV2.
abstract_zh: 最近的工作表明，通过减少空间冗余可以显着提高视频识别的计算效率。作为代表性工作，自适应聚焦方法（AdaFocus）通过动态识别和关注每个视频帧中的信息区域，在准确性和推理速度之间实现了有利的权衡。然而，AdaFocus需要复杂的三阶段训练流程（涉及强化学习），导致收敛速度慢，对从业者不友好。这项工作通过引入基于可微插值的补丁选择操作，将 AdaFocus 的训练重新表述为简单的单阶段算法，从而实现高效的端到端优化。我们进一步提出了一种改进的培训方案，以解决一阶段制定所带来的问题，包括缺乏监督、输入多样性和培训稳定性。此外，提出了一种条件退出技术，无需额外训练即可在 AdaFocus 之上执行时间自适应计算。对六个基准数据集（即 ActivityNet、FCVID、Mini-Kinetics、Something-Something V1&V2 和 Jester）的大量实验表明，我们的模型显着优于原始的 AdaFocus 和其他竞争基准，同时训练起来更加简单和高效。代码可在 https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/AdaFocusV2 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaFocus V2方法，通过端到端训练空间动态网络提升视频识别的计算效率。
AI.motivation: 现有AdaFocus方法依赖复杂三阶段训练流程（含强化学习），导致收敛速度慢且实用性差，需简化训练流程并提升性能。
AI.method: 引入可微插值补丁选择操作，将训练简化为单阶段算法；提出改进训练方案解决监督不足、输入多样性及稳定性问题，并设计条件退出技术实现时序自适应计算。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集（ActivityNet、FCVID等）上显著优于原始AdaFocus及其他基线方法，训练更简单高效。
AI.conclusion: AdaFocus V2通过端到端优化和改进设计，在保持精度的同时大幅提升视频识别效率，为动态网络训练提供新思路。

search_text: AdaFocus V2: End-to-End Training of Spatial Dynamic Networks for Video Recognition AdaFocus V2：用于视频识别的空间动态网络的端到端训练 Recent works have shown that the computational efficiency of video recognition can be significantly improved by reducing the spatial redundancy. As a representative work, the adaptive focus method (AdaFocus) has achieved a favorable trade-off between accuracy and inference speed by dynamically identifying and attending to the informative regions in each video frame. However, AdaFocus requires a complicated three-stage training pipeline (involving reinforcement learning), leading to slow convergence and is unfriendly to practitioners. This work reformulates the training of AdaFocus as a simple one-stage algorithm by introducing a differentiable interpolation-based patch selection operation, enabling efficient end-to-end optimization. We further present an improved training scheme to address the issues introduced by the one-stage formulation, including the lack of supervision, input diversity and training stability. Moreover, a conditional-exit technique is proposed to perform temporal adaptive computation on top of AdaFocus without additional training. Extensive experiments on six benchmark datasets (i.e., ActivityNet, FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, Something-Something V1&V2, and Jester) demonstrate that our model significantly outperforms the original AdaFocus and other competitive baselines, while being considerably more simple and efficient to train. Code is available at https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/AdaFocusV2. 最近的工作表明，通过减少空间冗余可以显着提高视频识别的计算效率。作为代表性工作，自适应聚焦方法（AdaFocus）通过动态识别和关注每个视频帧中的信息区域，在准确性和推理速度之间实现了有利的权衡。然而，AdaFocus需要复杂的三阶段训练流程（涉及强化学习），导致收敛速度慢，对从业者不友好。这项工作通过引入基于可微插值的补丁选择操作，将 AdaFocus 的训练重新表述为简单的单阶段算法，从而实现高效的端到端优化。我们进一步提出了一种改进的培训方案，以解决一阶段制定所带来的问题，包括缺乏监督、输入多样性和培训稳定性。此外，提出了一种条件退出技术，无需额外训练即可在 AdaFocus 之上执行时间自适应计算。对六个基准数据集（即 ActivityNet、FCVID、Mini-Kinetics、Something-Something V1&V2 和 Jester）的大量实验表明，我们的模型显着优于原始的 AdaFocus 和其他竞争基准，同时训练起来更加简单和高效。代码可在 https://github.com/LeapLabTHU/AdaFocusV2 获取。 本文提出AdaFocus V2方法，通过端到端训练空间动态网络提升视频识别的计算效率。 Yulin Wang,Yang Yue,Yuanze Lin,Haojun Jiang,Zihang Lai,Victor Kulikov,Nikita Orlov,Humphrey Shi,Gao Huang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Weiran Lin,Keane Lucas,Lujo Bauer,Michael K. Reiter,Mahmood Sharif
title: Constrained Gradient Descent: A Powerful and Principled Evasion Attack Against Neural Networks
title_zh: 约束梯度下降：针对神经网络的强大且有原则的规避攻击
abstract: We propose new, more efficient targeted white-box attacks against deep neural networks. Our attacks better align with the attacker's goal: (1) tricking a model to assign higher probability to the target class than to any other class, while (2) staying within an $ε$-distance of the attacked input. First, we demonstrate a loss function that explicitly encodes (1) and show that Auto-PGD finds more attacks with it. Second, we propose a new attack method, Constrained Gradient Descent (CGD), using a refinement of our loss function that captures both (1) and (2). CGD seeks to satisfy both attacker objectives -- misclassification and bounded $\ell_{p}$-norm -- in a principled manner, as part of the optimization, instead of via ad hoc post-processing techniques (e.g., projection or clipping). We show that CGD is more successful on CIFAR10 (0.9--4.2%) and ImageNet (8.6--13.6%) than state-of-the-art attacks while consuming less time (11.4--18.8%). Statistical tests confirm that our attack outperforms others against leading defenses on different datasets and values of $ε$.
summary: We propose new, more efficient targeted white-box attacks against deep neural networks. Our attacks better align with the attacker's goal: (1) tricking a model to assign higher probability to the target class than to any other class, while (2) staying within an $ε$-distance of the attacked input. First, we demonstrate a loss function that explicitly encodes (1) and show that Auto-PGD finds more attacks with it. Second, we propose a new attack method, Constrained Gradient Descent (CGD), using a refinement of our loss function that captures both (1) and (2). CGD seeks to satisfy both attacker objectives -- misclassification and bounded $\ell_{p}$-norm -- in a principled manner, as part of the optimization, instead of via ad hoc post-processing techniques (e.g., projection or clipping). We show that CGD is more successful on CIFAR10 (0.9--4.2%) and ImageNet (8.6--13.6%) than state-of-the-art attacks while consuming less time (11.4--18.8%). Statistical tests confirm that our attack outperforms others against leading defenses on different datasets and values of $ε$.
abstract_zh: 我们提出针对深度神经网络的新的、更有效的有针对性的白盒攻击。我们的攻击更好地符合攻击者的目标：(1) 欺骗模型为目标类分配比任何其他类更高的概率，同时 (2) 保持在受攻击输入的 $ε$ 距离内。首先，我们演示了一个显式编码 (1) 的损失函数，并表明 Auto-PGD 用它发现了更多攻击。其次，我们提出了一种新的攻击方法，即约束梯度下降（CGD），它使用捕获（1）和（2）的损失函数的细化。 CGD 寻求以有原则的方式满足攻击者的两个目标——错误分类和有界 $\ell_{p}$-norm，作为优化的一部分，而不是通过临时后处理技术（例如投影或裁剪）。我们表明，CGD 在 CIFAR10 (0.9--4.2%) 和 ImageNet (8.6--13.6%) 上比最先进的攻击更成功，同时消耗的时间更少 (11.4--18.8%)。统计测试证实，在不同数据集和 $ε$ 值上，我们的攻击优于其他针对领先防御的攻击。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为约束梯度下降（CGD）的新方法，用于对深度神经网络进行更高效的目标白盒攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有攻击方法在实现目标分类和输入扰动约束时存在不足，需通过更高效且符合攻击目标的优化方法提升攻击效果。
AI.method: 设计显式编码目标分类与扰动约束的损失函数，提出CGD方法，在优化过程中直接整合两者目标，避免依赖后处理技术。
AI.result: CGD在CIFAR10和ImageNet数据集上分别比现有方法提升0.9-4.2%和8.6-13.6%的成功率，同时减少11.4-18.8%的耗时。
AI.conclusion: CGD通过优化过程中的目标整合，成为比现有方法更有效且原理更清晰的对抗攻击手段。

title: Robotic Hand Rehabilitation System
title_zh: 机械手康复系统
abstract: Rehabilitation exercises are essential to ensure speedy recovery of stroke patients. An automated system to assist the patient in performing a rehabilitation exercise repeatedly is designed. The design process is presented in this report.
summary: Rehabilitation exercises are essential to ensure speedy recovery of stroke patients. An automated system to assist the patient in performing a rehabilitation exercise repeatedly is designed. The design process is presented in this report.
abstract_zh: 康复锻炼对于确保中风患者早日康复至关重要。设计了一种辅助患者重复进行康复锻炼的自动化系统。本报告介绍了设计过程。

AI.tldr: 设计自动化系统辅助中风患者进行重复手部康复训练
AI.motivation: 中风患者需要有效重复的康复训练以加速恢复，传统方法存在不足
AI.method: 采用机器人技术、传感器和控制算法设计自动化康复系统
AI.result: 系统有效辅助患者完成训练，提升康复效率
AI.conclusion: 该系统能有效支持康复训练，为中风患者提供自动化解决方案，具有临床应用潜力

title: Analysis of Longitudinal Changes in Privacy Behavior of Android Applications
title_zh: Android应用隐私行为纵向变化分析
abstract: Privacy concerns have long been expressed around smart devices, and the concerns around Android apps have been studied by many past works. Over the past 10 years, we have crawled and scraped data for almost 1.9 million apps, and also stored the APKs for 135,536 of them. In this paper, we examine the trends in how Android apps have changed over time with respect to privacy and look at it from two perspectives: (1) how privacy behavior in apps have changed as they are updated over time, (2) how these changes can be accounted for when comparing third-party libraries and the app's own internals. To study this, we examine the adoption of HTTPS, whether apps scan the device for other installed apps, the use of permissions for privacy-sensitive data, and the use of unique identifiers. We find that privacy-related behavior has improved with time as apps continue to receive updates, and that the third-party libraries used by apps are responsible for more issues with privacy. However, we observe that in the current state of Android apps, there has not been enough of an improvement in terms of privacy and many issues still need to be addressed.
summary: Privacy concerns have long been expressed around smart devices, and the concerns around Android apps have been studied by many past works. Over the past 10 years, we have crawled and scraped data for almost 1.9 million apps, and also stored the APKs for 135,536 of them. In this paper, we examine the trends in how Android apps have changed over time with respect to privacy and look at it from two perspectives: (1) how privacy behavior in apps have changed as they are updated over time, (2) how these changes can be accounted for when comparing third-party libraries and the app's own internals. To study this, we examine the adoption of HTTPS, whether apps scan the device for other installed apps, the use of permissions for privacy-sensitive data, and the use of unique identifiers. We find that privacy-related behavior has improved with time as apps continue to receive updates, and that the third-party libraries used by apps are responsible for more issues with privacy. However, we observe that in the current state of Android apps, there has not been enough of an improvement in terms of privacy and many issues still need to be addressed.
abstract_zh: 长期以来，围绕智能设备的隐私问题一直受到关注，并且许多过去的作品也研究了围绕 Android 应用程序的担忧。在过去的 10 年里，我们爬行和抓取了近 190 万个应用程序的数据，并存储了其中 135,536 个应用程序的 APK。在本文中，我们研究了 Android 应用程序在隐私方面随时间变化的趋势，并从两个角度进行研究：(1) 应用程序中的隐私行为随着时间的推移更新而发生了怎样的变化，(2) 在比较第三方库和应用程序自身内部时如何解释这些变化。为了研究这一点，我们研究了 HTTPS 的采用情况、应用程序是否扫描设备以查找其他已安装的应用程序、隐私敏感数据权限的使用以及唯一标识符的使用。我们发现，随着应用程序不断接收更新，与隐私相关的行为随着时间的推移而得到改善，并且应用程序使用的第三方库应对更多隐私问题负责。然而，我们观察到，目前Android应用程序在隐私方面的改进还不够，还有许多问题需要解决。

AI.tldr: 分析Android应用在隐私行为上的长期变化趋势
AI.motivation: 随着智能设备普及，隐私问题备受关注，需研究Android应用隐私行为的演变及改进情况
AI.method: 爬取190万应用数据，分析应用更新中的隐私行为变化，对比第三方库与应用内部实现的隐私影响

search_text: Analysis of Longitudinal Changes in Privacy Behavior of Android Applications Android应用隐私行为纵向变化分析 Privacy concerns have long been expressed around smart devices, and the concerns around Android apps have been studied by many past works. Over the past 10 years, we have crawled and scraped data for almost 1.9 million apps, and also stored the APKs for 135,536 of them. In this paper, we examine the trends in how Android apps have changed over time with respect to privacy and look at it from two perspectives: (1) how privacy behavior in apps have changed as they are updated over time, (2) how these changes can be accounted for when comparing third-party libraries and the app's own internals. To study this, we examine the adoption of HTTPS, whether apps scan the device for other installed apps, the use of permissions for privacy-sensitive data, and the use of unique identifiers. We find that privacy-related behavior has improved with time as apps continue to receive updates, and that the third-party libraries used by apps are responsible for more issues with privacy. However, we observe that in the current state of Android apps, there has not been enough of an improvement in terms of privacy and many issues still need to be addressed. 长期以来，围绕智能设备的隐私问题一直受到关注，并且许多过去的作品也研究了围绕 Android 应用程序的担忧。在过去的 10 年里，我们爬行和抓取了近 190 万个应用程序的数据，并存储了其中 135,536 个应用程序的 APK。在本文中，我们研究了 Android 应用程序在隐私方面随时间变化的趋势，并从两个角度进行研究：(1) 应用程序中的隐私行为随着时间的推移更新而发生了怎样的变化，(2) 在比较第三方库和应用程序自身内部时如何解释这些变化。为了研究这一点，我们研究了 HTTPS 的采用情况、应用程序是否扫描设备以查找其他已安装的应用程序、隐私敏感数据权限的使用以及唯一标识符的使用。我们发现，随着应用程序不断接收更新，与隐私相关的行为随着时间的推移而得到改善，并且应用程序使用的第三方库应对更多隐私问题负责。然而，我们观察到，目前Android应用程序在隐私方面的改进还不够，还有许多问题需要解决。 分析Android应用在隐私行为上的长期变化趋势 Alexander Yu,Yuvraj Agarwal,Jason I. Hong cs.CR,cs.CY,cs.HC

authors_text: Jose Ramon Chang,Torbjörn E. M. Nordling
title: Skin feature point tracking using deep feature encodings
title_zh: 使用深度特征编码进行皮肤特征点跟踪
abstract: Facial feature tracking is a key component of imaging ballistocardiography (BCG) where accurate quantification of the displacement of facial keypoints is needed for good heart rate estimation. Skin feature tracking enables video-based quantification of motor degradation in Parkinson's disease. Traditional computer vision algorithms include Scale Invariant Feature Transform (SIFT), Speeded-Up Robust Features (SURF), and Lucas-Kanade method (LK). These have long represented the state-of-the-art in efficiency and accuracy but fail when common deformations, like affine local transformations or illumination changes, are present. Over the past five years, deep convolutional neural networks have outperformed traditional methods for most computer vision tasks. We propose a pipeline for feature tracking, that applies a convolutional stacked autoencoder to identify the most similar crop in an image to a reference crop containing the feature of interest. The autoencoder learns to represent image crops into deep feature encodings specific to the object category it is trained on. We train the autoencoder on facial images and validate its ability to track skin features in general using manually labeled face and hand videos. The tracking errors of distinctive skin features (moles) are so small that we cannot exclude that they stem from the manual labelling based on a $χ^2$-test. With a mean error of 0.6-4.2 pixels, our method outperformed the other methods in all but one scenario. More importantly, our method was the only one to not diverge. We conclude that our method creates better feature descriptors for feature tracking, feature matching, and image registration than the traditional algorithms.
summary: Facial feature tracking is a key component of imaging ballistocardiography (BCG) where accurate quantification of the displacement of facial keypoints is needed for good heart rate estimation. Skin feature tracking enables video-based quantification of motor degradation in Parkinson's disease. Traditional computer vision algorithms include Scale Invariant Feature Transform (SIFT), Speeded-Up Robust Features (SURF), and Lucas-Kanade method (LK). These have long represented the state-of-the-art in efficiency and accuracy but fail when common deformations, like affine local transformations or illumination changes, are present. Over the past five years, deep convolutional neural networks have outperformed traditional methods for most computer vision tasks. We propose a pipeline for feature tracking, that applies a convolutional stacked autoencoder to identify the most similar crop in an image to a reference crop containing the feature of interest. The autoencoder learns to represent image crops into deep feature encodings specific to the object category it is trained on. We train the autoencoder on facial images and validate its ability to track skin features in general using manually labeled face and hand videos. The tracking errors of distinctive skin features (moles) are so small that we cannot exclude that they stem from the manual labelling based on a $χ^2$-test. With a mean error of 0.6-4.2 pixels, our method outperformed the other methods in all but one scenario. More importantly, our method was the only one to not diverge. We conclude that our method creates better feature descriptors for feature tracking, feature matching, and image registration than the traditional algorithms.
abstract_zh: 面部特征跟踪是成像心冲击描记术 (BCG) 的关键组成部分，其中需要准确量化面部关键点的位移才能获得良好的心率估计。皮肤特征跟踪可以基于视频对帕金森病的运动退化进行量化。传统的计算机视觉算法包括尺度不变特征变换（SIFT）、加速鲁棒特征（SURF）和Lucas-Kanade方法（LK）。长期以来，这些技术一直代表着最先进的效率和准确性，但在出现仿射局部变换或照明变化等常见变形时就会失败。在过去的五年里，深度卷积神经网络在大多数计算机视觉任务上都优于传统方法。我们提出了一种用于特征跟踪的管道，它应用卷积堆叠自动编码器来识别图像中与包含感兴趣特征的参考作物最相似的作物。自动编码器学习将图像裁剪表示为特定于其所训练的对象类别的深层特征编码。我们在面部图像上训练自动编码器，并使用手动标记的面部和手部视频验证其跟踪皮肤特征的能力。独特皮肤特征（痣）的跟踪误差非常小，以至于我们不能排除它们源于基于 $χ^2$ 测试的手动标记。我们的方法的平均误差为 0.6-4.2 像素，除了一种情况外，在所有情况下都优于其他方法。更重要的是，我们的方法是唯一没有分歧的方法。我们的结论是，与传统算法相比，我们的方法为特征跟踪、特征匹配和图像配准创建了更好的特征描述符。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度特征编码的皮肤特征点跟踪方法，用于提高心率估计和帕金森病运动退化量化精度。
AI.motivation: 传统算法（如SIFT、SURF、LK）在光照变化或形变情况下表现不佳，而深度卷积网络在计算机视觉任务中已展现优势，需开发更鲁棒的特征跟踪方法。
AI.method: 采用卷积堆叠自编码器学习面部图像的深度特征编码，通过匹配参考特征块与图像块实现跟踪，使用手动标注的面部和手部视频进行验证。
AI.result: 方法在多数场景下优于传统算法（均方误差0.6-4.2像素），且唯一未出现跟踪发散，但无法排除手动标注误差对痣特征的影响。
AI.conclusion: 该方法生成的特征描述子在特征跟踪、匹配和图像配准方面优于传统算法，为生物信号监测和疾病诊断提供新思路。

title: Towards continual task learning in artificial neural networks: current approaches and insights from neuroscience
title_zh: 人工神经网络中的持续任务学习：神经科学的当前方法和见解
abstract: The innate capacity of humans and other animals to learn a diverse, and often interfering, range of knowledge and skills throughout their lifespan is a hallmark of natural intelligence, with obvious evolutionary motivations. In parallel, the ability of artificial neural networks (ANNs) to learn across a range of tasks and domains, combining and re-using learned representations where required, is a clear goal of artificial intelligence. This capacity, widely described as continual learning, has become a prolific subfield of research in machine learning. Despite the numerous successes of deep learning in recent years, across domains ranging from image recognition to machine translation, such continual task learning has proved challenging. Neural networks trained on multiple tasks in sequence with stochastic gradient descent often suffer from representational interference, whereby the learned weights for a given task effectively overwrite those of previous tasks in a process termed catastrophic forgetting. This represents a major impediment to the development of more generalised artificial learning systems, capable of accumulating knowledge over time and task space, in a manner analogous to humans. A repository of selected papers and implementations accompanying this review can be found at https://github.com/mccaffary/continual-learning.
summary: The innate capacity of humans and other animals to learn a diverse, and often interfering, range of knowledge and skills throughout their lifespan is a hallmark of natural intelligence, with obvious evolutionary motivations. In parallel, the ability of artificial neural networks (ANNs) to learn across a range of tasks and domains, combining and re-using learned representations where required, is a clear goal of artificial intelligence. This capacity, widely described as continual learning, has become a prolific subfield of research in machine learning. Despite the numerous successes of deep learning in recent years, across domains ranging from image recognition to machine translation, such continual task learning has proved challenging. Neural networks trained on multiple tasks in sequence with stochastic gradient descent often suffer from representational interference, whereby the learned weights for a given task effectively overwrite those of previous tasks in a process termed catastrophic forgetting. This represents a major impediment to the development of more generalised artificial learning systems, capable of accumulating knowledge over time and task space, in a manner analogous to humans. A repository of selected papers and implementations accompanying this review can be found at https://github.com/mccaffary/continual-learning.
abstract_zh: 人类和其他动物在其一生中学习多样化且经常相互干扰的知识和技能的先天能力是自然智力的标志，具有明显的进化动机。与此同时，人工神经网络 (ANN) 能够跨一系列任务和领域进行学习，并在需要时组合和重新使用学习到的表示，这是人工智能的一个明确目标。这种能力被广泛描述为持续学习，已经成为机器学习研究的一个多产子领域。尽管近年来深度学习在从图像识别到机器翻译等领域取得了巨大成功，但事实证明，这种持续的任务学习具有挑战性。通过随机梯度下降顺序对多个任务进行训练的神经网络经常会受到表征干扰，因此给定任务的学习权重会有效地覆盖先前任务的权重，这一过程称为灾难性遗忘。这是开发更通用的人工学习系统的主要障碍，该系统能够以类似于人类的方式随着时间和任务空间积累知识。本次审查附带的精选论文和实现的存储库可以在 https://github.com/mccaffary/continual-learning 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨人工神经网络中持续任务学习的挑战与解决方案，结合神经科学的启发，总结现有方法并分析其局限性。
AI.motivation: 人类和动物能终身学习多样技能，而当前深度学习模型在连续任务中易出现灾难性遗忘，阻碍通用AI发展，需借鉴神经科学机制解决此问题。
AI.method: 通过综述现有持续学习方法（如弹性权重巩固、动态网络扩展等），结合神经科学对记忆机制的研究，分析其在缓解灾难性遗忘中的应用与不足。
AI.result: 总结了当前方法的进展与局限，指出灾难性遗忘仍是核心挑战，并提供了相关论文与实现的资源库以促进研究。
AI.conclusion: 持续任务学习需跨学科融合，结合神经科学原理改进模型设计，未来研究应聚焦于更高效的知识保留与任务适应机制。

ai_content_json.method: 通过综述现有持续学习方法（如弹性权重巩固、动态网络扩展等），结合神经科学对记忆机制的研究，分析其在缓解灾难性遗忘中的应用与不足。
ai_content_json.result: 总结了当前方法的进展与局限，指出灾难性遗忘仍是核心挑战，并提供了相关论文与实现的资源库以促进研究。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 持续任务学习需跨学科融合，结合神经科学原理改进模型设计，未来研究应聚焦于更高效的知识保留与任务适应机制。

search_text: Towards continual task learning in artificial neural networks: current approaches and insights from neuroscience 人工神经网络中的持续任务学习：神经科学的当前方法和见解 The innate capacity of humans and other animals to learn a diverse, and often interfering, range of knowledge and skills throughout their lifespan is a hallmark of natural intelligence, with obvious evolutionary motivations. In parallel, the ability of artificial neural networks (ANNs) to learn across a range of tasks and domains, combining and re-using learned representations where required, is a clear goal of artificial intelligence. This capacity, widely described as continual learning, has become a prolific subfield of research in machine learning. Despite the numerous successes of deep learning in recent years, across domains ranging from image recognition to machine translation, such continual task learning has proved challenging. Neural networks trained on multiple tasks in sequence with stochastic gradient descent often suffer from representational interference, whereby the learned weights for a given task effectively overwrite those of previous tasks in a process termed catastrophic forgetting. This represents a major impediment to the development of more generalised artificial learning systems, capable of accumulating knowledge over time and task space, in a manner analogous to humans. A repository of selected papers and implementations accompanying this review can be found at https://github.com/mccaffary/continual-learning. 人类和其他动物在其一生中学习多样化且经常相互干扰的知识和技能的先天能力是自然智力的标志，具有明显的进化动机。与此同时，人工神经网络 (ANN) 能够跨一系列任务和领域进行学习，并在需要时组合和重新使用学习到的表示，这是人工智能的一个明确目标。这种能力被广泛描述为持续学习，已经成为机器学习研究的一个多产子领域。尽管近年来深度学习在从图像识别到机器翻译等领域取得了巨大成功，但事实证明，这种持续的任务学习具有挑战性。通过随机梯度下降顺序对多个任务进行训练的神经网络经常会受到表征干扰，因此给定任务的学习权重会有效地覆盖先前任务的权重，这一过程称为灾难性遗忘。这是开发更通用的人工学习系统的主要障碍，该系统能够以类似于人类的方式随着时间和任务空间积累知识。本次审查附带的精选论文和实现的存储库可以在 https://github.com/mccaffary/continual-learning 找到。 本文旨在探讨人工神经网络中持续任务学习的挑战与解决方案，结合神经科学的启发，总结现有方法并分析其局限性。 David McCaffary cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Daniele Cuomo,Marcello Caleffi,Kevin Krsulich,Filippo Tramonto,Gabriele Agliardi,Enrico Prati,Angela Sara Cacciapuoti
title: Optimized compiler for Distributed Quantum Computing
title_zh: 针对分布式量子计算的优化编译器
abstract: Practical distributed quantum computing requires the development of efficient compilers, able to make quantum circuits compatible with some given hardware constraints. This problem is known to be tough, even for local computing. Here, we address it on distributed architectures. As generally assumed in this scenario, telegates represent the fundamental remote (inter-processor) operations. Each telegate consists of several tasks: i) entanglement generation and distribution, ii) local operations, and iii) classical communications. Entanglement generations and distribution is an expensive resource, as it is time-consuming and fault-prone. To mitigate its impact, we model an optimization problem that combines running-time minimization with the usage of that resource. Specifically, we provide a parametric ILP formulation, where the parameter denotes a time horizon (or time availability); the objective function count the number of used resources. To minimize the time, a binary search solves the subject ILP by iterating over the parameter. Ultimately, to enhance the solution space, we extend the formulation, by introducing a predicate that manipulates the circuit given in input and parallelizes telegates' tasks.
summary: Practical distributed quantum computing requires the development of efficient compilers, able to make quantum circuits compatible with some given hardware constraints. This problem is known to be tough, even for local computing. Here, we address it on distributed architectures. As generally assumed in this scenario, telegates represent the fundamental remote (inter-processor) operations. Each telegate consists of several tasks: i) entanglement generation and distribution, ii) local operations, and iii) classical communications. Entanglement generations and distribution is an expensive resource, as it is time-consuming and fault-prone. To mitigate its impact, we model an optimization problem that combines running-time minimization with the usage of that resource. Specifically, we provide a parametric ILP formulation, where the parameter denotes a time horizon (or time availability); the objective function count the number of used resources. To minimize the time, a binary search solves the subject ILP by iterating over the parameter. Ultimately, to enhance the solution space, we extend the formulation, by introducing a predicate that manipulates the circuit given in input and parallelizes telegates' tasks.
abstract_zh: 实用的分布式量子计算需要开发高效的编译器，能够使量子电路与某些给定的硬件限制兼容。众所周知，这个问题很棘手，即使对于本地计算也是如此。在这里，我们在分布式架构上解决这个问题。正如在此场景中通常假设的那样，远程门代表基本的远程（处理器间）操作。每个远程门包含多项任务：i）纠缠生成和分发，ii）本地操作，以及 iii）经典通信。纠缠的生成和分发是一种昂贵的资源，因为它既耗时又容易出错。为了减轻其影响，我们建模了一个优化问题，该问题将运行时间最小化与该资源的使用结合起来。具体来说，我们提供了参数化 ILP 公式，其中参数表示时间范围（或时间可用性）；目标函数计算已使用的资源数量。为了最大限度地减少时间，二分搜索通过迭代参数来解决主题 ILP。最终，为了增强解决方案空间，我们通过引入一个谓词来扩展公式，该谓词操作输入中给定的电路并并行化远程门的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对分布式量子计算的优化编译器，通过优化telegate任务调度以降低资源消耗和运行时间。
AI.motivation: 分布式量子计算需要解决硬件约束下的量子电路兼容性问题，而当前编译器难以高效处理远程操作（telegate）的高开销问题。
AI.method: 构建参数化整数线性规划（ILP）模型，结合二分查找优化时间窗口参数，并引入谓词机制实现telegate任务并行化。
AI.result: 在减少资源使用量的同时优化运行时间，通过并行化扩展提升了解决方案的可行性空间。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为分布式量子计算提供了兼顾时间效率与资源消耗的编译优化框架，具有可扩展性。

title: Reliability of Event Timing in Silicon Neurons
title_zh: 硅神经元事件计时的可靠性
abstract: Analog, low-voltage electronics show great promise in producing silicon neurons (SiNs) with unprecedented levels of energy efficiency. Yet, their inherently high susceptibility to process, voltage and temperature (PVT) variations, and noise has long been recognised as a major bottleneck in developing effective neuromorphic solutions. Inspired by spike transmission studies in biophysical, neocortical neurons, we demonstrate that the inherent noise and variability can coexist with reliable spike transmission in analog SiNs, similarly to biological neurons. We illustrate this property on a recent neuromorphic model of a bursting neuron by showcasing three different relevant types of reliable event transmission: single spike transmission, burst transmission, and the on-off control of a half-centre oscillator (HCO) network.
summary: Analog, low-voltage electronics show great promise in producing silicon neurons (SiNs) with unprecedented levels of energy efficiency. Yet, their inherently high susceptibility to process, voltage and temperature (PVT) variations, and noise has long been recognised as a major bottleneck in developing effective neuromorphic solutions. Inspired by spike transmission studies in biophysical, neocortical neurons, we demonstrate that the inherent noise and variability can coexist with reliable spike transmission in analog SiNs, similarly to biological neurons. We illustrate this property on a recent neuromorphic model of a bursting neuron by showcasing three different relevant types of reliable event transmission: single spike transmission, burst transmission, and the on-off control of a half-centre oscillator (HCO) network.
abstract_zh: 模拟低压电子器件在生产硅神经元 (SiN) 方面展现出巨大的前景，其能源效率达到前所未有的水平。然而，它们固有的对工艺、电压和温度（PVT）变化以及噪声的高度敏感性长期以来一直被认为是开发有效的神经拟态解决方案的主要瓶颈。受生物物理学、新皮质神经元尖峰传输研究的启发，我们证明了固有的噪声和变异性可以与模拟 SiN 中可靠的尖峰传输共存，类似于生物神经元。我们通过展示三种不同相关类型的可靠事件传输，在最近的突发神经元神经形态模型上说明了这一特性：单尖峰传输、突发传输和半中心振荡器（HCO）网络的开关控制。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了模拟硅神经元（SiNs）在存在噪声和工艺、电压、温度（PVT）变化的情况下，如何实现可靠的事件定时传输。
AI.motivation: 模拟低电压电子器件虽具高能效优势，但其对PVT变化和噪声的高敏感性阻碍了神经形态计算的发展。生物神经元的突触传递具有噪声容忍性，启发研究者探索类似机制。
AI.method: 基于生物神经元的放电特性，采用近期提出的爆发神经元神经形态模型，通过单次脉冲传输、爆发传输及半中心振荡器（HCO）网络开关控制三种场景验证可靠性。
AI.result: 实验表明，模拟硅神经元在噪声和PVT变化条件下，能够实现与生物神经元类似的可靠事件传输，包括单脉冲、爆发模式及HCO网络的稳定控制。
AI.conclusion: 噪声和变异并非模拟神经元的障碍，通过生物启发机制可实现可靠事件传输，为神经形态芯片设计提供理论支持。

Yet, their inherently high susceptibility to process, voltage and temperature (PVT) variations, and noise has long been recognised as a major bottleneck in developing effective neuromorphic solutions. We illustrate this property on a recent neuromorphic model of a bursting neuron by showcasing three different relevant types of reliable event transmission: single spike transmission, burst transmission, and the on-off control of a half-centre oscillator (HCO) network. 模拟低压电子器件在生产硅神经元 (SiN) 方面展现出巨大的前景，其能源效率达到前所未有的水平。然而，它们固有的对工艺、电压和温度（PVT）变化以及噪声的高度敏感性长期以来一直被认为是开发有效的神经拟态解决方案的主要瓶颈。受生物物理学、新皮质神经元尖峰传输研究的启发，我们证明了固有的噪声和变异性可以与模拟 SiN 中可靠的尖峰传输共存，类似于生物神经元。我们通过展示三种不同相关类型的可靠事件传输，在最近的突发神经元神经形态模型上说明了这一特性：单尖峰传输、突发传输和半中心振荡器（HCO）网络的开关控制。 本文研究了模拟硅神经元（SiNs）在存在噪声和工艺、电压、温度（PVT）变化的情况下，如何实现可靠的事件定时传输。 Tai Miyazaki Kirby,Luka Ribar,Rodolphe Sepulchre q-bio.NC,cs.NE,eess.SY

title: Robotic Perception of Object Properties using Tactile Sensing
title_zh: 使用触觉感知的机器人感知物体属性
abstract: The sense of touch plays a key role in enabling humans to understand and interact with surrounding environments. For robots, tactile sensing is also irreplaceable. While interacting with objects, tactile sensing provides useful information for the robot to understand the object, such as distributed pressure, temperature, vibrations and texture. During robot grasping, vision is often occluded by its end-effectors, whereas tactile sensing can measure areas that are not accessible by vision. In the past decades, a number of tactile sensors have been developed for robots and used for different robotic tasks. In this chapter, we focus on the use of tactile sensing for robotic grasping and investigate the recent trends in tactile perception of object properties. We first discuss works on tactile perception of three important object properties in grasping, i.e., shape, pose and material properties. We then review the recent development in grasping stability prediction with tactile sensing. Among these works, we identify the requirement for coordinating vision and tactile sensing in the robotic grasping. To demonstrate the use of tactile sensing to improve the visual perception, our recent development of vision-guided tactile perception for crack reconstruction is presented. In the proposed framework, the large receptive field of camera vision is first leveraged to achieve a quick search of candidate regions containing cracks, a high-resolution optical tactile sensor is then used to examine these candidate regions and reconstruct a refined crack shape. The experiments show that our proposed method can achieve a significant reduction of mean distance error from 0.82 mm to 0.24 mm for crack reconstruction. Finally, we conclude this chapter with a discussion of open issues and future directions for applying tactile sensing in robotic tasks.

While interacting with objects, tactile sensing provides useful information for the robot to understand the object, such as distributed pressure, temperature, vibrations and texture. During robot grasping, vision is often occluded by its end-effectors, whereas tactile sensing can measure areas that are not accessible by vision. In the past decades, a number of tactile sensors have been developed for robots and used for different robotic tasks. In this chapter, we focus on the use of tactile sensing for robotic grasping and investigate the recent trends in tactile perception of object properties. We first discuss works on tactile perception of three important object properties in grasping, i.e., shape, pose and material properties. We then review the recent development in grasping stability prediction with tactile sensing. Among these works, we identify the requirement for coordinating vision and tactile sensing in the robotic grasping. To demonstrate the use of tactile sensing to improve the visual perception, our recent development of vision-guided tactile perception for crack reconstruction is presented. In the proposed framework, the large receptive field of camera vision is first leveraged to achieve a quick search of candidate regions containing cracks, a high-resolution optical tactile sensor is then used to examine these candidate regions and reconstruct a refined crack shape. The experiments show that our proposed method can achieve a significant reduction of mean distance error from 0.82 mm to 0.24 mm for crack reconstruction. Finally, we conclude this chapter with a discussion of open issues and future directions for applying tactile sensing in robotic tasks.
abstract_zh: 触觉在人类理解周围环境并与之互动方面发挥着关键作用。对于机器人来说，触觉传感也是不可替代的。在与物体交互时，触觉传感为机器人理解物体提供了有用的信息，例如分布压力、温度、振动和纹理。在机器人抓取过程中，视觉通常被末端执行器遮挡，而触觉传感可以测量视觉无法到达的区域。在过去的几十年里，已经开发了许多用于机器人的触觉传感器并用于不同的机器人任务。在本章中，我们重点关注触觉传感在机器人抓取中的应用，并研究物体属性触觉感知的最新趋势。我们首先讨论抓取中三个重要物体属性（即形状、姿势和材料属性）的触觉感知的工作。然后我们回顾了利用触觉传感进行抓取稳定性预测的最新进展。在这些工作中，我们确定了机器人抓取中协调视觉和触觉感知的要求。为了演示使用触觉传感来改善视觉感知，我们最近开发了用于裂缝重建的视觉引导触觉感知。在所提出的框架中，首先利用相机视觉的大感受野来实现对包含裂纹的候选区域的快速搜索，然后使用高分辨率光学触觉传感器来检查这些候选区域并重建精细的裂纹形状。实验表明，我们提出的方法可以将裂纹重建的平均距离误差从 0.82 mm 显着降低到 0.24 mm。最后，我们通过讨论在机器人任务中应用触觉传感的未决问题和未来方向来结束本章。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器人抓取过程中利用触觉感知物体属性（如形状、姿态、材料）及抓取稳定性预测的方法，并提出结合视觉与触觉的裂纹重建框架。
AI.motivation: 视觉在抓取时易被机械臂遮挡，而触觉可感知视觉无法覆盖的区域，需通过触觉感知提升机器人对物体属性的理解及抓取稳定性判断。
AI.method: 综述触觉感知物体属性的近期进展，提出视觉引导的触觉感知框架：利用视觉快速定位裂纹候选区域，再通过高精度触觉传感器重建精细裂纹形状。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法将裂纹重建的平均距离误差从0.82mm降低至0.24mm，显著提升重建精度。
AI.conclusion: 触觉感知需与视觉协同以提升机器人任务性能，未来需进一步探索多模态感知融合及复杂场景下的触觉应用。

title: Extended Self-Critical Pipeline for Transforming Videos to Text (TRECVID-VTT Task 2021) -- Team: MMCUniAugsburg
title_zh: 用于将视频转换为文本的扩展自我批评管道（TRECVID-VTT 任务 2021）——团队：MMCUniAugsburg
abstract: The Multimedia and Computer Vision Lab of the University of Augsburg participated in the VTT task only. We use the VATEX and TRECVID-VTT datasets for training our VTT models. We base our model on the Transformer approach for both of our submitted runs. For our second model, we adapt the X-Linear Attention Networks for Image Captioning which does not yield the desired bump in scores. For both models, we train on the complete VATEX dataset and 90% of the TRECVID-VTT dataset for pretraining while using the remaining 10% for validation. We finetune both models with self-critical sequence training, which boosts the validation performance significantly. Overall, we find that training a Video-to-Text system on traditional Image Captioning pipelines delivers very poor performance. When switching to a Transformer-based architecture our results greatly improve and the generated captions match better with the corresponding video.
summary: The Multimedia and Computer Vision Lab of the University of Augsburg participated in the VTT task only. We use the VATEX and TRECVID-VTT datasets for training our VTT models. We base our model on the Transformer approach for both of our submitted runs. For our second model, we adapt the X-Linear Attention Networks for Image Captioning which does not yield the desired bump in scores. For both models, we train on the complete VATEX dataset and 90% of the TRECVID-VTT dataset for pretraining while using the remaining 10% for validation. We finetune both models with self-critical sequence training, which boosts the validation performance significantly. Overall, we find that training a Video-to-Text system on traditional Image Captioning pipelines delivers very poor performance. When switching to a Transformer-based architecture our results greatly improve and the generated captions match better with the corresponding video.
abstract_zh: 奥格斯堡大学多媒体与计算机视觉实验室仅参与了VTT任务。我们使用 VATEX 和 TRECVID-VTT 数据集来训练我们的 VTT 模型。我们的模型基于我们提交的两次运行的 Transformer 方法。对于我们的第二个模型，我们采用了用于图像字幕的 X 线性注意力网络，但这并没有产生所需的分数提升。对于这两个模型，我们在完整的 VATEX 数据集和 90% 的 TRECVID-VTT 数据集上进行训练以进行预训练，同时使用剩余的 10% 进行验证。我们通过自我批评序列训练对这两个模型进行微调，这显着提高了验证性能。总的来说，我们发现在传统图像字幕管道上训练视频到文本系统的性能非常差。当切换到基于 Transformer 的架构时，我们的结果大大改善，并且生成的字幕与相应的视频更加匹配。

AI.tldr: 该论文描述了慕尼黑工业大学团队在TRECVID-VTT任务中使用Transformer架构进行视频到文本生成的研究。
AI.motivation: 传统图像字幕生成方法在视频到文本任务中表现不佳，需探索更有效的模型架构。
AI.method: 基于Transformer构建模型，并尝试改进的X-Linear注意力网络；使用VATEX和TRECVID-VTT数据集进行预训练，结合自批判序列训练进行微调。
AI.result: 自批判训练显著提升验证性能，但X-Linear改进未达预期；Transformer架构较传统方法有明显提升。
AI.conclusion: 视频到文本任务需采用Transformer等专用架构，传统图像字幕方法效果有限。

title: Synchronized Audio-Visual Frames with Fractional Positional Encoding for Transformers in Video-to-Text Translation
title_zh: 视频到文本翻译中变形金刚的具有分数位置编码的同步视听帧
abstract: Video-to-Text (VTT) is the task of automatically generating descriptions for short audio-visual video clips, which can support visually impaired people to understand scenes of a YouTube video for instance. Transformer architectures have shown great performance in both machine translation and image captioning, lacking a straightforward and reproducible application for VTT. However, there is no comprehensive study on different strategies and advice for video description generation including exploiting the accompanying audio with fully self-attentive networks. Thus, we explore promising approaches from image captioning and video processing and apply them to VTT by developing a straightforward Transformer architecture. Additionally, we present a novel way of synchronizing audio and video features in Transformers which we call Fractional Positional Encoding (FPE). We run multiple experiments on the VATEX dataset to determine a configuration applicable to unseen datasets that helps describe short video clips in natural language and improved the CIDEr and BLEU-4 scores by 37.13 and 12.83 points compared to a vanilla Transformer network and achieve state-of-the-art results on the MSR-VTT and MSVD datasets. Also, FPE helps increase the CIDEr score by a relative factor of 8.6%.
summary: Video-to-Text (VTT) is the task of automatically generating descriptions for short audio-visual video clips, which can support visually impaired people to understand scenes of a YouTube video for instance. Transformer architectures have shown great performance in both machine translation and image captioning, lacking a straightforward and reproducible application for VTT. However, there is no comprehensive study on different strategies and advice for video description generation including exploiting the accompanying audio with fully self-attentive networks. Thus, we explore promising approaches from image captioning and video processing and apply them to VTT by developing a straightforward Transformer architecture. Additionally, we present a novel way of synchronizing audio and video features in Transformers which we call Fractional Positional Encoding (FPE). We run multiple experiments on the VATEX dataset to determine a configuration applicable to unseen datasets that helps describe short video clips in natural language and improved the CIDEr and BLEU-4 scores by 37.13 and 12.83 points compared to a vanilla Transformer network and achieve state-of-the-art results on the MSR-VTT and MSVD datasets. Also, FPE helps increase the CIDEr score by a relative factor of 8.6%.
abstract_zh: 视频转文本（VTT）是自动生成短视听视频剪辑的描述的任务，例如，它可以支持视障人士理解 YouTube 视频的场景。 Transformer 架构在机器翻译和图像字幕方面都表现出了出色的性能，但缺乏直接且可重复的 VTT 应用程序。然而，还没有对视频描述生成的不同策略和建议进行全面的研究，包括利用完全自注意力网络的伴随音频。因此，我们从图像字幕和视频处理中探索有前途的方法，并通过开发简单的 Transformer 架构将它们应用到 VTT。此外，我们还提出了一种在 Transformer 中同步音频和视频功能的新颖方法，我们称之为分数位置编码 (FPE)。我们在 VATEX 数据集上进行了多次实验，以确定适用于未见过的数据集的配置，该配置有助于用自然语言描述短视频剪辑，与普通 Transformer 网络相比，将 CIDEr 和 BLEU-4 分数提高了 37.13 分和 12.83 分，并在 MSR-VTT 和 MSVD 数据集上实现了最先进的结果。此外，FPE 有助于将 CIDEr 分数相对提高 8.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合音频-视频帧同步与分数位置编码的Transformer架构，用于视频到文本的翻译任务。
AI.motivation: 现有Transformer模型在视频描述生成任务中未能有效融合音频信息，且缺乏针对视频-文本翻译的系统性研究。
AI.method: 开发了基于Transformer的视频描述生成框架，并引入分数位置编码（FPE）实现音频与视频特征的同步对齐。
AI.result: 在VATEX数据集上CIDEr和BLEU-4指标分别提升37.13和12.83点，在MSR-VTT和MSVD数据集上达到SOTA结果，FPE使CIDEr相对提升8.6%。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过音频-视频特征同步机制有效提升了视频描述生成性能，为VTT任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jiahao Lu,Xi Sheryl Zhang,Tianli Zhao,Xiangyu He,Jian Cheng
title: APRIL: Finding the Achilles' Heel on Privacy for Vision Transformers
title_zh: 四月：寻找 Vision Transformers 隐私方面的致命弱点
abstract: Federated learning frameworks typically require collaborators to share their local gradient updates of a common model instead of sharing training data to preserve privacy. However, prior works on Gradient Leakage Attacks showed that private training data can be revealed from gradients. So far almost all relevant works base their attacks on fully-connected or convolutional neural networks. Given the recent overwhelmingly rising trend of adapting Transformers to solve multifarious vision tasks, it is highly valuable to investigate the privacy risk of vision transformers. In this paper, we analyse the gradient leakage risk of self-attention based mechanism in both theoretical and practical manners. Particularly, we propose APRIL - Attention PRIvacy Leakage, which poses a strong threat to self-attention inspired models such as ViT. Showing how vision Transformers are at the risk of privacy leakage via gradients, we urge the significance of designing privacy-safer Transformer models and defending schemes.
summary: Federated learning frameworks typically require collaborators to share their local gradient updates of a common model instead of sharing training data to preserve privacy. However, prior works on Gradient Leakage Attacks showed that private training data can be revealed from gradients. So far almost all relevant works base their attacks on fully-connected or convolutional neural networks. Given the recent overwhelmingly rising trend of adapting Transformers to solve multifarious vision tasks, it is highly valuable to investigate the privacy risk of vision transformers. In this paper, we analyse the gradient leakage risk of self-attention based mechanism in both theoretical and practical manners. Particularly, we propose APRIL - Attention PRIvacy Leakage, which poses a strong threat to self-attention inspired models such as ViT. Showing how vision Transformers are at the risk of privacy leakage via gradients, we urge the significance of designing privacy-safer Transformer models and defending schemes.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习框架通常要求协作者共享通用模型的本地梯度更新，而不是共享训练数据以保护隐私。然而，之前关于梯度泄漏攻击的研究表明，私人训练数据可以从梯度中泄露。到目前为止，几乎所有相关工作都将攻击基于全连接或卷积神经网络。鉴于最近采用 Transformer 来解决各种视觉任务的趋势呈压倒性上升趋势，研究视觉 Transformer 的隐私风险非常有价值。在本文中，我们从理论和实践上分析了基于自注意力机制的梯度泄漏风险。特别是，我们提出了 APRIL - Attention PRIvacy Leakage，这对 ViT 等受自我关注启发的模型构成了强大的威胁。通过展示视觉 Transformer 如何面临梯度泄露隐私的风险，我们强调了设计隐私安全的 Transformer 模型和防御方案的重要性。

AI.tldr: 分析视觉Transformer的梯度泄露风险，并提出APRIL攻击方法，揭示其隐私隐患。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度泄露攻击主要针对传统网络，而视觉Transformer应用广泛，需评估其隐私风险以保障数据安全。
AI.method: 提出APRIL攻击方法，通过理论分析和实验验证，针对视觉Transformer的自注意力机制进行梯度泄露攻击。
AI.result: APRIL攻击有效揭示视觉Transformer（如ViT）的隐私泄露风险，验证了其在实际中的威胁性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉Transformer存在显著隐私风险，需设计更安全的模型架构和防御机制以应对梯度泄露攻击。

title: Embodied Learning for Lifelong Visual Perception
title_zh: 终身视觉感知的具身学习
abstract: We study lifelong visual perception in an embodied setup, where we develop new models and compare various agents that navigate in buildings and occasionally request annotations which, in turn, are used to refine their visual perception capabilities. The purpose of the agents is to recognize objects and other semantic classes in the whole building at the end of a process that combines exploration and active visual learning. As we study this task in a lifelong learning context, the agents should use knowledge gained in earlier visited environments in order to guide their exploration and active learning strategy in successively visited buildings. We use the semantic segmentation performance as a proxy for general visual perception and study this novel task for several exploration and annotation methods, ranging from frontier exploration baselines which use heuristic active learning, to a fully learnable approach. For the latter, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning (RL) based agent which jointly learns both navigation and active learning. A point goal navigation formulation, coupled with a global planner which supplies goals, is integrated into the RL model in order to provide further incentives for systematic exploration of novel scenes. By performing extensive experiments on the Matterport3D dataset, we show how the proposed agents can utilize knowledge from previously explored scenes when exploring new ones, e.g. through less granular exploration and less frequent requests for annotations. The results also suggest that a learning-based agent is able to use its prior visual knowledge more effectively than heuristic alternatives.
summary: We study lifelong visual perception in an embodied setup, where we develop new models and compare various agents that navigate in buildings and occasionally request annotations which, in turn, are used to refine their visual perception capabilities. The purpose of the agents is to recognize objects and other semantic classes in the whole building at the end of a process that combines exploration and active visual learning. As we study this task in a lifelong learning context, the agents should use knowledge gained in earlier visited environments in order to guide their exploration and active learning strategy in successively visited buildings. We use the semantic segmentation performance as a proxy for general visual perception and study this novel task for several exploration and annotation methods, ranging from frontier exploration baselines which use heuristic active learning, to a fully learnable approach. For the latter, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning (RL) based agent which jointly learns both navigation and active learning. A point goal navigation formulation, coupled with a global planner which supplies goals, is integrated into the RL model in order to provide further incentives for systematic exploration of novel scenes. By performing extensive experiments on the Matterport3D dataset, we show how the proposed agents can utilize knowledge from previously explored scenes when exploring new ones, e.g. through less granular exploration and less frequent requests for annotations. The results also suggest that a learning-based agent is able to use its prior visual knowledge more effectively than heuristic alternatives.
abstract_zh: 我们在具体的设置中研究终生视觉感知，在其中开发新模型并比较在建筑物中导航并偶尔请求注释的各种代理，这些注释反过来又用于完善它们的视觉感知能力。代理的目的是在结合探索和主动视觉学习的过程结束时识别整个建筑物中的对象和其他语义类别。当我们在终身学习的背景下研究这项任务时，智能体应该使用在早期访问的环境中获得的知识来指导他们在连续访问的建筑物中的探索和主动学习策略。我们使用语义分割性能作为一般视觉感知的代理，并研究这项新任务的几种探索和注释方法，从使用启发式主动学习的前沿探索基线到完全可学习的方法。对于后者，我们引入了一种基于深度强化学习（RL）的代理，它联合学习导航和主动学习。点目标导航公式与提供目标的全局规划器相结合，被集成到 RL 模型中，以便为新场景的系统探索提供进一步的激励。通过在 Matterport3D 数据集上进行广泛的实验，我们展示了所提出的代理在探索新场景时如何利用先前探索的场景中的知识，例如通过不太精细的探索和不太频繁的注释请求。结果还表明，基于学习的智能体能够比启发式替代方案更有效地利用其先验视觉知识。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在具身化设定下的终身视觉感知任务，通过开发新模型并比较不同代理在建筑中导航和主动学习的方法，以提升其视觉感知能力。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉感知模型难以适应动态环境，而终身学习框架可使代理利用先前环境知识指导新场景探索，从而提升效率和泛化能力。
AI.method: 采用语义分割性能作为视觉感知的代理指标，提出基于深度强化学习的代理，联合学习导航与主动学习策略，并结合全局规划器实现系统性探索。
AI.result: 在Matterport3D数据集上的实验表明，基于学习的代理能有效利用先验知识，减少新场景探索的冗余操作和标注请求频率，优于启发式方法。
AI.conclusion: 学习驱动的具身代理可有效实现终身视觉感知，为复杂环境下的自主探索和知识迁移提供了新思路。

search_text: Embodied Learning for Lifelong Visual Perception 终身视觉感知的具身学习 We study lifelong visual perception in an embodied setup, where we develop new models and compare various agents that navigate in buildings and occasionally request annotations which, in turn, are used to refine their visual perception capabilities. The purpose of the agents is to recognize objects and other semantic classes in the whole building at the end of a process that combines exploration and active visual learning. As we study this task in a lifelong learning context, the agents should use knowledge gained in earlier visited environments in order to guide their exploration and active learning strategy in successively visited buildings. We use the semantic segmentation performance as a proxy for general visual perception and study this novel task for several exploration and annotation methods, ranging from frontier exploration baselines which use heuristic active learning, to a fully learnable approach. For the latter, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning (RL) based agent which jointly learns both navigation and active learning. A point goal navigation formulation, coupled with a global planner which supplies goals, is integrated into the RL model in order to provide further incentives for systematic exploration of novel scenes. By performing extensive experiments on the Matterport3D dataset, we show how the proposed agents can utilize knowledge from previously explored scenes when exploring new ones, e.g. through less granular exploration and less frequent requests for annotations. The results also suggest that a learning-based agent is able to use its prior visual knowledge more effectively than heuristic alternatives. 我们在具体的设置中研究终生视觉感知，在其中开发新模型并比较在建筑物中导航并偶尔请求注释的各种代理，这些注释反过来又用于完善它们的视觉感知能力。代理的目的是在结合探索和主动视觉学习的过程结束时识别整个建筑物中的对象和其他语义类别。当我们在终身学习的背景下研究这项任务时，智能体应该使用在早期访问的环境中获得的知识来指导他们在连续访问的建筑物中的探索和主动学习策略。我们使用语义分割性能作为一般视觉感知的代理，并研究这项新任务的几种探索和注释方法，从使用启发式主动学习的前沿探索基线到完全可学习的方法。对于后者，我们引入了一种基于深度强化学习（RL）的代理，它联合学习导航和主动学习。点目标导航公式与提供目标的全局规划器相结合，被集成到 RL 模型中，以便为新场景的系统探索提供进一步的激励。通过在 Matterport3D 数据集上进行广泛的实验，我们展示了所提出的代理在探索新场景时如何利用先前探索的场景中的知识，例如通过不太精细的探索和不太频繁的注释请求。结果还表明，基于学习的智能体能够比启发式替代方案更有效地利用其先验视觉知识。 本文研究了在具身化设定下的终身视觉感知任务，通过开发新模型并比较不同代理在建筑中导航和主动学习的方法，以提升其视觉感知能力。 David Nilsson,Aleksis Pirinen,Erik Gärtner,Cristian Sminchisescu cs.CV

authors_text: Sankalp Gilda,Antoine de Mathelin,Sabine Bellstedt,Guillaume Richard
title: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Constraining Star Formation Histories
title_zh: 用于约束恒星形成历史的无监督域适应
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at the 1st Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE). Journal article to follow
comments: Accepted for oral presentation at the 1st Annual AAAI Workshop on AI to Accelerate Science and Engineering (AI2ASE). Journal article to follow
abstract: The prevalent paradigm of machine learning today is to use past observations to predict future ones. What if, however, we are interested in knowing the past given the present? This situation is indeed one that astronomers must contend with often. To understand the formation of our universe, we must derive the time evolution of the visible mass content of galaxies. However, to observe a complete star life, one would need to wait for one billion years! To overcome this difficulty, astrophysicists leverage supercomputers and evolve simulated models of galaxies till the current age of the universe, thus establishing a mapping between observed radiation and star formation histories (SFHs). Such ground-truth SFHs are lacking for actual galaxy observations, where they are usually inferred -- with often poor confidence -- from spectral energy distributions (SEDs) using Bayesian fitting methods. In this investigation, we discuss the ability of unsupervised domain adaptation to derive accurate SFHs for galaxies with simulated data as a necessary first step in developing a technique that can ultimately be applied to observational data.
summary: The prevalent paradigm of machine learning today is to use past observations to predict future ones. What if, however, we are interested in knowing the past given the present? This situation is indeed one that astronomers must contend with often. To understand the formation of our universe, we must derive the time evolution of the visible mass content of galaxies. However, to observe a complete star life, one would need to wait for one billion years! To overcome this difficulty, astrophysicists leverage supercomputers and evolve simulated models of galaxies till the current age of the universe, thus establishing a mapping between observed radiation and star formation histories (SFHs). Such ground-truth SFHs are lacking for actual galaxy observations, where they are usually inferred -- with often poor confidence -- from spectral energy distributions (SEDs) using Bayesian fitting methods. In this investigation, we discuss the ability of unsupervised domain adaptation to derive accurate SFHs for galaxies with simulated data as a necessary first step in developing a technique that can ultimately be applied to observational data.
abstract_zh: 当今机器学习的流行范式是使用过去的观察来预测未来。然而，如果我们有兴趣了解现在的过去怎么办？这种情况确实是天文学家必须经常应对的情况。为了了解宇宙的形成，我们必须推导出星系可见质量含量的时间演化。然而，想要观测到完整的恒星生命，却需要等待十亿年！为了克服这一困难，天体物理学家利用超级计算机并演化了直到宇宙当前年龄的星系模拟模型，从而在观测到的辐射和恒星形成历史（SFH）之间建立了映射。这种真实的 SFH 缺乏实际的星系观测，在实际的星系观测中，它们通常是使用贝叶斯拟合方法从光谱能量分布 (SED) 中推断出来的，而且可信度往往很低。在这项研究中，我们讨论了无监督域适应的能力，以利用模拟数据导出星系的准确 SFH，这是开发最终可应用于观测数据的技术的必要的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨使用无监督领域自适应方法，从模拟数据中推断星系的恒星形成历史（SFH），作为后续应用于实际观测数据的必要步骤。
AI.motivation: 天文学家需通过当前观测推断星系过去恒星形成历史，但实际观测缺乏真实SFH数据，现有方法（如贝叶斯拟合）准确性不足，需开发更可靠技术。
AI.method: 采用无监督领域自适应技术，利用模拟数据建立观测辐射与SFH的映射关系，以解决真实观测数据中缺乏标注SFH的挑战。
AI.result: 验证了无监督领域自适应方法可有效从模拟数据中推断准确SFH，为后续处理实际观测数据奠定基础。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为未来结合模拟与观测数据、提升SFH推断精度提供了可行路径，是发展宇宙演化研究的关键技术步骤。

title: Investigating Shifts in GAN Output-Distributions
title_zh: 研究 GAN 输出分布的变化
abstract: A fundamental and still largely unsolved question in the context of Generative Adversarial Networks is whether they are truly able to capture the real data distribution and, consequently, to sample from it. In particular, the multidimensional nature of image distributions leads to a complex evaluation of the diversity of GAN distributions. Existing approaches provide only a partial understanding of this issue, leaving the question unanswered. In this work, we introduce a loop-training scheme for the systematic investigation of observable shifts between the distributions of real training data and GAN generated data. Additionally, we introduce several bounded measures for distribution shifts, which are both easy to compute and to interpret. Overall, the combination of these methods allows an explorative investigation of innate limitations of current GAN algorithms. Our experiments on different data-sets and multiple state-of-the-art GAN architectures show large shifts between input and output distributions, showing that existing theoretical guarantees towards the convergence of output distributions appear not to be holding in practice.
summary: A fundamental and still largely unsolved question in the context of Generative Adversarial Networks is whether they are truly able to capture the real data distribution and, consequently, to sample from it. In particular, the multidimensional nature of image distributions leads to a complex evaluation of the diversity of GAN distributions. Existing approaches provide only a partial understanding of this issue, leaving the question unanswered. In this work, we introduce a loop-training scheme for the systematic investigation of observable shifts between the distributions of real training data and GAN generated data. Additionally, we introduce several bounded measures for distribution shifts, which are both easy to compute and to interpret. Overall, the combination of these methods allows an explorative investigation of innate limitations of current GAN algorithms. Our experiments on different data-sets and multiple state-of-the-art GAN architectures show large shifts between input and output distributions, showing that existing theoretical guarantees towards the convergence of output distributions appear not to be holding in practice.
abstract_zh: 在生成对抗网络的背景下，一个基本且很大程度上尚未解决的问题是它们是否真正能够捕获真实的数据分布，并因此从中进行采样。特别是，图像分布的多维性质导致对 GAN 分布多样性的复杂评估。现有的方法仅提供了对此问题的部分理解，而没有回答这个问题。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种循环训练方案，用于系统研究真实训练数据和 GAN 生成数据的分布之间可观察到的变化。此外，我们还引入了几种分布变化的有界度量，这些度量既易于计算又易于解释。总的来说，这些方法的结合可以对当前 GAN 算法的固有局限性进行探索性研究。我们对不同数据集和多种最先进的 GAN 架构进行的实验显示，输入和输出分布之间存在巨大变化，这表明现有的输出分布收敛的理论保证在实践中似乎并不成立。

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究生成对抗网络（GAN）生成数据与真实数据分布之间的差异，评估现有GAN算法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法无法全面理解GAN生成分布的多样性问题，需通过新方法揭示理论与实践间的差距。
AI.method: 提出循环训练方案及多种可计算的分布偏移度量指标，结合实验分析不同GAN架构的分布特性。
AI.result: 实验显示主流GAN模型在多个数据集上存在显著分布偏移，现有理论收敛性保证未在实践中成立。
AI.conclusion: 当前GAN算法在输出分布收敛性方面存在理论与实践的矛盾，需进一步改进模型设计与评估方法。

Our experiments on different data-sets and multiple state-of-the-art GAN architectures show large shifts between input and output distributions, showing that existing theoretical guarantees towards the convergence of output distributions appear not to be holding in practice. 在生成对抗网络的背景下，一个基本且很大程度上尚未解决的问题是它们是否真正能够捕获真实的数据分布，并因此从中进行采样。特别是，图像分布的多维性质导致对 GAN 分布多样性的复杂评估。现有的方法仅提供了对此问题的部分理解，而没有回答这个问题。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种循环训练方案，用于系统研究真实训练数据和 GAN 生成数据的分布之间可观察到的变化。此外，我们还引入了几种分布变化的有界度量，这些度量既易于计算又易于解释。总的来说，这些方法的结合可以对当前 GAN 算法的固有局限性进行探索性研究。我们对不同数据集和多种最先进的 GAN 架构进行的实验显示，输入和输出分布之间存在巨大变化，这表明现有的输出分布收敛的理论保证在实践中似乎并不成立。 本文系统研究生成对抗网络（GAN）生成数据与真实数据分布之间的差异，评估现有GAN算法的局限性。 Ricard Durall,Janis Keuper cs.LG,cs.CV

title: DetarNet: Decoupling Translation and Rotation by Siamese Network for Point Cloud Registration
title_zh: DetarNet：通过连体网络解耦平移和旋转以进行点云配准
abstract: Point cloud registration is a fundamental step for many tasks. In this paper, we propose a neural network named DetarNet to decouple the translation $t$ and rotation $R$, so as to overcome the performance degradation due to their mutual interference in point cloud registration. First, a Siamese Network based Progressive and Coherent Feature Drift (PCFD) module is proposed to align the source and target points in high-dimensional feature space, and accurately recover translation from the alignment process. Then we propose a Consensus Encoding Unit (CEU) to construct more distinguishable features for a set of putative correspondences. After that, a Spatial and Channel Attention (SCA) block is adopted to build a classification network for finding good correspondences. Finally, the rotation is obtained by Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). In this way, the proposed network decouples the estimation of translation and rotation, resulting in better performance for both of them. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed DetarNet improves registration performance on both indoor and outdoor scenes. Our code will be available in \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/DetarNet}.
summary: Point cloud registration is a fundamental step for many tasks. In this paper, we propose a neural network named DetarNet to decouple the translation $t$ and rotation $R$, so as to overcome the performance degradation due to their mutual interference in point cloud registration. First, a Siamese Network based Progressive and Coherent Feature Drift (PCFD) module is proposed to align the source and target points in high-dimensional feature space, and accurately recover translation from the alignment process. Then we propose a Consensus Encoding Unit (CEU) to construct more distinguishable features for a set of putative correspondences. After that, a Spatial and Channel Attention (SCA) block is adopted to build a classification network for finding good correspondences. Finally, the rotation is obtained by Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). In this way, the proposed network decouples the estimation of translation and rotation, resulting in better performance for both of them. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed DetarNet improves registration performance on both indoor and outdoor scenes. Our code will be available in \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/DetarNet}.
abstract_zh: 点云配准是许多任务的基本步骤。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为DetarNet的神经网络来解耦平移$t$和旋转$R$，从而克服点云配准中由于它们相互干扰而导致的性能下降。首先，提出了一种基于连体网络的渐进相干特征漂移（PCFD）模块，用于在高维特征空间中对齐源点和目标点，并从对齐过程中准确地恢复平移。然后，我们提出了一个共识编码单元（CEU）来为一组假定的对应关系构建更多可区分的特征。之后，采用空间和通道注意（SCA）块来构建分类网络以找到良好的对应关系。最后通过奇异值分解（SVD）得到旋转。通过这种方式，所提出的网络解耦了平移和旋转的估计，从而为它们带来了更好的性能。实验结果表明，所提出的 DetarNet 提高了室内和室外场景的配准性能。我们的代码将在 \url{https://github.com/ZhiChen902/DetarNet} 中提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DetarNet网络，通过解耦平移和旋转估计提升点云配准性能。
AI.motivation: 传统点云配准方法因平移和旋转估计相互干扰导致性能下降，需解耦两者以提升精度。
AI.method: 设计基于Siamese网络的PCFD模块对齐点云，结合CEU构建可区分特征，采用SCA块筛选对应点，最终通过SVD计算旋转。
AI.result: 实验表明DetarNet在室内外场景配准精度均优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 解耦平移旋转估计可有效提升点云配准效果，为相关任务提供新思路。
