title: SECP-Net: SE-Connection Pyramid Network of Organ At Risk Segmentation for Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma
title_zh: SECP-Net：鼻咽癌危险器官分割的SE连接金字塔网络
abstract: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) is a kind of malignant tumor. Accurate and automatic segmentation of organs at risk (OAR) of computed tomography (CT) images is clinically significant. In recent years, deep learning models represented by U-Net have been widely applied in medical image segmentation tasks, which can help doctors with reduction of workload and get accurate results more quickly. In OAR segmentation of NPC, the sizes of OAR are variable, especially, some of them are small. Traditional deep neural networks underperform during segmentation due to the lack use of global and multi-size information. This paper proposes a new SE-Connection Pyramid Network (SECP-Net). SECP-Net extracts global and multi-size information flow with se connection (SEC) modules and a pyramid structure of network for improving the segmentation performance, especially that of small organs. SECP-Net also designs an auto-context cascaded network to further improve the segmentation performance. Comparative experiments are conducted between SECP-Net and other recently methods on a dataset with CT images of head and neck. Five-fold cross validation is used to evaluate the performance based on two metrics, i.e., Dice and Jaccard similarity. Experimental results show that SECP-Net can achieve SOTA performance in this challenging task.
summary: Nasopharyngeal carcinoma (NPC) is a kind of malignant tumor. Accurate and automatic segmentation of organs at risk (OAR) of computed tomography (CT) images is clinically significant. In recent years, deep learning models represented by U-Net have been widely applied in medical image segmentation tasks, which can help doctors with reduction of workload and get accurate results more quickly. In OAR segmentation of NPC, the sizes of OAR are variable, especially, some of them are small. Traditional deep neural networks underperform during segmentation due to the lack use of global and multi-size information. This paper proposes a new SE-Connection Pyramid Network (SECP-Net). SECP-Net extracts global and multi-size information flow with se connection (SEC) modules and a pyramid structure of network for improving the segmentation performance, especially that of small organs. SECP-Net also designs an auto-context cascaded network to further improve the segmentation performance. Comparative experiments are conducted between SECP-Net and other recently methods on a dataset with CT images of head and neck. Five-fold cross validation is used to evaluate the performance based on two metrics, i.e., Dice and Jaccard similarity. Experimental results show that SECP-Net can achieve SOTA performance in this challenging task.
abstract_zh: 鼻咽癌（NPC）是一种恶性肿瘤。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像中危及器官 (OAR) 的准确自动分割具有临床意义。近年来，以U-Net为代表的深度学习模型在医学图像分割任务中得到了广泛的应用，可以帮助医生减轻工作量，更快地得到准确的结果。在NPC的OAR分割中，OAR的大小是可变的，特别是其中一些很小。由于缺乏全局和多尺寸信息的使用，传统的深度神经网络在分割过程中表现不佳。本文提出了一种新的 SE 连接金字塔网络（SECP-Net）。 SECP-Net通过SE连接（SEC）模块和金字塔结构的网络提取全局和多尺寸信息流，以提高分割性能，特别是小器官的分割性能。 SECP-Net还设计了自动上下文级联网络以进一步提高分割性能。在头颈部 CT 图像数据集上，SECP-Net 与其他最近的方法进行了比较实验。五折交叉验证用于根据两个指标（即 Dice 和 Jaccard 相似度）评估性能。实验结果表明，SECP-Net 可以在这项具有挑战性的任务中实现 SOTA 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的SE-Connection Pyramid Network（SECP-Net），用于鼻咽癌CT图像中危及器官（OAR）的自动分割。
AI.motivation: 鼻咽癌的危及器官分割在临床中非常重要，但传统深度学习模型在分割小器官时表现不佳，因为缺乏对全局和多尺度信息的利用。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种SE-Connection（SEC）模块和金字塔网络结构，以提取全局和多尺度信息流。此外，还设计了一个自动上下文级联网络以进一步提高分割性能。
AI.result: 在头颈CT图像数据集上，与最近的方法进行比较实验，使用五折交叉验证评估性能，基于Dice和Jaccard相似度指标，SECP-Net在该具有挑战性的任务中实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: SECP-Net通过利用全局和多尺度信息，以及自动上下文级联网络，有效提高了鼻咽癌危及器官分割的准确性，达到了SOTA的性能。

title: Delving into Probabilistic Uncertainty for Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Person Re-Identification
title_zh: 深入研究无监督域自适应行人重识别的概率不确定性
abstract: Clustering-based unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) person re-identification (ReID) reduces exhaustive annotations. However, owing to unsatisfactory feature embedding and imperfect clustering, pseudo labels for target domain data inherently contain an unknown proportion of wrong ones, which would mislead feature learning. In this paper, we propose an approach named probabilistic uncertainty guided progressive label refinery (P$^2$LR) for domain adaptive person re-identification. First, we propose to model the labeling uncertainty with the probabilistic distance along with ideal single-peak distributions. A quantitative criterion is established to measure the uncertainty of pseudo labels and facilitate the network training. Second, we explore a progressive strategy for refining pseudo labels. With the uncertainty-guided alternative optimization, we balance between the exploration of target domain data and the negative effects of noisy labeling. On top of a strong baseline, we obtain significant improvements and achieve the state-of-the-art performance on four UDA ReID benchmarks. Specifically, our method outperforms the baseline by 6.5% mAP on the Duke2Market task, while surpassing the state-of-the-art method by 2.5% mAP on the Market2MSMT task.
summary: Clustering-based unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) person re-identification (ReID) reduces exhaustive annotations. However, owing to unsatisfactory feature embedding and imperfect clustering, pseudo labels for target domain data inherently contain an unknown proportion of wrong ones, which would mislead feature learning. In this paper, we propose an approach named probabilistic uncertainty guided progressive label refinery (P$^2$LR) for domain adaptive person re-identification. First, we propose to model the labeling uncertainty with the probabilistic distance along with ideal single-peak distributions. A quantitative criterion is established to measure the uncertainty of pseudo labels and facilitate the network training. Second, we explore a progressive strategy for refining pseudo labels. With the uncertainty-guided alternative optimization, we balance between the exploration of target domain data and the negative effects of noisy labeling. On top of a strong baseline, we obtain significant improvements and achieve the state-of-the-art performance on four UDA ReID benchmarks. Specifically, our method outperforms the baseline by 6.5% mAP on the Duke2Market task, while surpassing the state-of-the-art method by 2.5% mAP on the Market2MSMT task.
abstract_zh: 基于聚类的无监督域自适应 (UDA) 人员重新识别 (ReID) 减少了详尽的注释。然而，由于特征嵌入不理想和聚类不完善，目标域数据的伪标签本身包含未知比例的错误标签，这会误导特征学习。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为概率不确定性引导渐进标签精炼（P$^2$LR）的方法，用于领域自适应人员重新识别。首先，我们建议使用概率距离以及理想的单峰分布来对标签不确定性进行建模。建立量化标准来衡量伪标签的不确定性并促进网络训练。其次，我们探索一种改进伪标签的渐进策略。通过不确定性引导的替代优化，我们在目标域数据的探索和噪声标签的负面影响之间取得了平衡。除了强大的基准之外，我们还取得了重大改进，并在四个 UDA ReID 基准上实现了最先进的性能。具体来说，我们的方法在 Duke2Market 任务上比基线高出 6.5% mAP，而在 Market2MSMT 任务上比最先进方法高出 2.5% mAP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于概率不确定性的渐进式伪标签优化方法，用于提升无监督域适应性行人重识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于聚类的无监督域适应方法生成的伪标签存在噪声，导致特征学习偏差，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 通过概率距离建模标签不确定性，结合理想单峰分布建立量化准则，并采用不确定性引导的渐进式优化策略迭代修正伪标签。
AI.result: 在四个UDA ReID基准测试中达到SOTA性能，Duke2Market任务mAP提升6.5%，Market2MSMT任务超越现有方法2.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了伪标签噪声对特征学习的干扰，通过不确定性建模与渐进优化显著提升了域适应性行人重识别效果。

search_text: Delving into Probabilistic Uncertainty for Unsupervised Domain Adaptive Person Re-Identification 深入研究无监督域自适应行人重识别的概率不确定性 Clustering-based unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) person re-identification (ReID) reduces exhaustive annotations. However, owing to unsatisfactory feature embedding and imperfect clustering, pseudo labels for target domain data inherently contain an unknown proportion of wrong ones, which would mislead feature learning. In this paper, we propose an approach named probabilistic uncertainty guided progressive label refinery (P$^2$LR) for domain adaptive person re-identification. First, we propose to model the labeling uncertainty with the probabilistic distance along with ideal single-peak distributions. A quantitative criterion is established to measure the uncertainty of pseudo labels and facilitate the network training. Second, we explore a progressive strategy for refining pseudo labels. With the uncertainty-guided alternative optimization, we balance between the exploration of target domain data and the negative effects of noisy labeling. On top of a strong baseline, we obtain significant improvements and achieve the state-of-the-art performance on four UDA ReID benchmarks. Specifically, our method outperforms the baseline by 6.5% mAP on the Duke2Market task, while surpassing the state-of-the-art method by 2.5% mAP on the Market2MSMT task. 基于聚类的无监督域自适应 (UDA) 人员重新识别 (ReID) 减少了详尽的注释。然而，由于特征嵌入不理想和聚类不完善，目标域数据的伪标签本身包含未知比例的错误标签，这会误导特征学习。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为概率不确定性引导渐进标签精炼（P$^2$LR）的方法，用于领域自适应人员重新识别。首先，我们建议使用概率距离以及理想的单峰分布来对标签不确定性进行建模。建立量化标准来衡量伪标签的不确定性并促进网络训练。其次，我们探索一种改进伪标签的渐进策略。通过不确定性引导的替代优化，我们在目标域数据的探索和噪声标签的负面影响之间取得了平衡。除了强大的基准之外，我们还取得了重大改进，并在四个 UDA ReID 基准上实现了最先进的性能。具体来说，我们的方法在 Duke2Market 任务上比基线高出 6.5% mAP，而在 Market2MSMT 任务上比最先进方法高出 2.5% mAP。 本文提出了一种基于概率不确定性的渐进式伪标签优化方法，用于提升无监督域适应性行人重识别的性能。 Jian Han,Ya-Li li,Shengjin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhikang Zou,Xiaoqing Ye,Liang Du,Xianhui Cheng,Xiao Tan,Li Zhang,Jianfeng Feng,Xiangyang Xue,Errui Ding
title: The Devil is in the Task: Exploiting Reciprocal Appearance-Localization Features for Monocular 3D Object Detection
title_zh: 任务中的魔鬼：利用相互外观定位特征进行单目 3D 物体检测
abstract: Low-cost monocular 3D object detection plays a fundamental role in autonomous driving, whereas its accuracy is still far from satisfactory. In this paper, we dig into the 3D object detection task and reformulate it as the sub-tasks of object localization and appearance perception, which benefits to a deep excavation of reciprocal information underlying the entire task. We introduce a Dynamic Feature Reflecting Network, named DFR-Net, which contains two novel standalone modules: (i) the Appearance-Localization Feature Reflecting module (ALFR) that first separates taskspecific features and then self-mutually reflects the reciprocal features; (ii) the Dynamic Intra-Trading module (DIT) that adaptively realigns the training processes of various sub-tasks via a self-learning manner. Extensive experiments on the challenging KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of DFR-Net. We rank 1st among all the monocular 3D object detectors in the KITTI test set (till March 16th, 2021). The proposed method is also easy to be plug-and-play in many cutting-edge 3D detection frameworks at negligible cost to boost performance. The code will be made publicly available.
summary: Low-cost monocular 3D object detection plays a fundamental role in autonomous driving, whereas its accuracy is still far from satisfactory. In this paper, we dig into the 3D object detection task and reformulate it as the sub-tasks of object localization and appearance perception, which benefits to a deep excavation of reciprocal information underlying the entire task. We introduce a Dynamic Feature Reflecting Network, named DFR-Net, which contains two novel standalone modules: (i) the Appearance-Localization Feature Reflecting module (ALFR) that first separates taskspecific features and then self-mutually reflects the reciprocal features; (ii) the Dynamic Intra-Trading module (DIT) that adaptively realigns the training processes of various sub-tasks via a self-learning manner. Extensive experiments on the challenging KITTI dataset demonstrate the effectiveness and generalization of DFR-Net. We rank 1st among all the monocular 3D object detectors in the KITTI test set (till March 16th, 2021). The proposed method is also easy to be plug-and-play in many cutting-edge 3D detection frameworks at negligible cost to boost performance. The code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 低成本的单目3D物体检测在自动驾驶中发挥着基础性作用，但其精度仍远未令人满意。在本文中，我们深入研究了 3D 物体检测任务，并将其重新表述为物体定位和外观感知的子任务，这有​​利于深入挖掘整个任务背后的相互信息。我们引入了一种动态特征反射网络，名为 DFR-Net，它包含两个新颖的独立模块：（i）外观定位特征反射模块（ALFR），它首先分离任务特定的特征，然后自互反映互惠特征； （ii）动态内部交易模块（DIT），通过自学习方式自适应地重新调整各种子任务的训练过程。在具有挑战性的 KITTI 数据集上进行的大量实验证明了 DFR-Net 的有效性和泛化性。我们在 KITTI 测试集中的所有单目 3D 物体检测器中排名第一（截至 2021 年 3 月 16 日）。所提出的方法也很容易在许多尖端 3D 检测框架中即插即用，而提高性能的成本可以忽略不计。该代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型单目3D目标检测方法DFR-Net，通过挖掘外观-定位特征的互惠信息提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有单目3D目标检测精度不足，传统方法未能充分挖掘任务中外观感知与定位信息的相互作用关系。
AI.method: 设计动态特征反射网络DFR-Net，包含ALFR模块实现特征分离与互惠反射，以及DIT模块通过自学习方式动态协调子任务训练过程。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上取得当时单目3D检测最优性能（2021年3月16日前排名第一），且可无缝集成到主流检测框架中。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦任务特征并建立互惠学习机制，有效提升了单目3D检测性能，方法具有良好的通用性与扩展性。

authors_text: Haofeng Huang,Wenhan Yang,Yueyu Hu,Jiaying Liu,Ling-Yu Duan
title: Towards Low Light Enhancement with RAW Images
title_zh: 使用 RAW 图像实现低光增强
abstract: In this paper, we make the first benchmark effort to elaborate on the superiority of using RAW images in the low light enhancement and develop a novel alternative route to utilize RAW images in a more flexible and practical way. Inspired by a full consideration on the typical image processing pipeline, we are inspired to develop a new evaluation framework, Factorized Enhancement Model (FEM), which decomposes the properties of RAW images into measurable factors and provides a tool for exploring how properties of RAW images affect the enhancement performance empirically. The empirical benchmark results show that the Linearity of data and Exposure Time recorded in meta-data play the most critical role, which brings distinct performance gains in various measures over the approaches taking the sRGB images as input. With the insights obtained from the benchmark results in mind, a RAW-guiding Exposure Enhancement Network (REENet) is developed, which makes trade-offs between the advantages and inaccessibility of RAW images in real applications in a way of using RAW images only in the training phase. REENet projects sRGB images into linear RAW domains to apply constraints with corresponding RAW images to reduce the difficulty of modeling training. After that, in the testing phase, our REENet does not rely on RAW images. Experimental results demonstrate not only the superiority of REENet to state-of-the-art sRGB-based methods and but also the effectiveness of the RAW guidance and all components.
summary: In this paper, we make the first benchmark effort to elaborate on the superiority of using RAW images in the low light enhancement and develop a novel alternative route to utilize RAW images in a more flexible and practical way. Inspired by a full consideration on the typical image processing pipeline, we are inspired to develop a new evaluation framework, Factorized Enhancement Model (FEM), which decomposes the properties of RAW images into measurable factors and provides a tool for exploring how properties of RAW images affect the enhancement performance empirically. The empirical benchmark results show that the Linearity of data and Exposure Time recorded in meta-data play the most critical role, which brings distinct performance gains in various measures over the approaches taking the sRGB images as input. With the insights obtained from the benchmark results in mind, a RAW-guiding Exposure Enhancement Network (REENet) is developed, which makes trade-offs between the advantages and inaccessibility of RAW images in real applications in a way of using RAW images only in the training phase. REENet projects sRGB images into linear RAW domains to apply constraints with corresponding RAW images to reduce the difficulty of modeling training. After that, in the testing phase, our REENet does not rely on RAW images. Experimental results demonstrate not only the superiority of REENet to state-of-the-art sRGB-based methods and but also the effectiveness of the RAW guidance and all components.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们首次进行基准测试，以阐述在低光增强中使用 RAW 图像的优越性，并开发一种新颖的替代途径，以更灵活和实用的方式利用 RAW 图像。受到对典型图像处理流程的充分考虑的启发，我们开发了一种新的评估框架——分解增强模型（FEM），它将RAW图像的属性分解为可测量的因素，并提供了一个工具来从经验上探索RAW图像的属性如何影响增强性能。实证基准测试结果表明，元数据中记录的数据线性和曝光时间起着最关键的作用，与以 sRGB 图像作为输入的方法相比，它在各种措施中带来了明显的性能提升。考虑到从基准测试结果中获得的见解，开发了一种 RAW 引导曝光增强网络（REENet），该网络以仅在训练阶段使用 RAW 图像的方式在实际应用中的 RAW 图像的优势和不可访问性之间进行权衡。 REENet 将 sRGB 图像投影到线性 RAW 域中，以对相应的 RAW 图像应用约束，从而降低建模训练的难度。之后，在测试阶段，我们的 REENet 不依赖于 RAW 图像。实验结果不仅证明了 REENet 相对于最先进的基于 sRGB 的方法的优越性，而且还证明了 RAW 引导和所有组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用RAW图像进行低光增强的新方法，通过构建评估框架和开发REENet网络，验证了RAW图像在提升增强效果中的关键作用。
AI.motivation: 现有低光增强方法主要依赖sRGB图像，未能充分利用RAW图像中包含的线性数据和元数据信息，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 提出Factorized Enhancement Model（FEM）框架分解RAW图像属性，开发RAW-guiding Exposure Enhancement Network（REENet），在训练阶段利用RAW图像约束模型，在测试阶段仅需sRGB图像。
AI.result: 实验表明，RAW图像的线性度和曝光时间对增强效果影响最大，REENet在多项指标上优于现有sRGB基方法，验证了RAW引导的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过将RAW图像特性纳入训练过程，REENet实现了无需RAW输入的低光增强，证明了RAW数据在提升模型性能中的关键价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用RAW图像进行低光增强的新方法，通过构建评估框架和开发REENet网络，验证了RAW图像在提升增强效果中的关键作用。
ai_content.motivation: 现有低光增强方法主要依赖sRGB图像，未能充分利用RAW图像中包含的线性数据和元数据信息，限制了性能提升。
ai_content.method: 提出Factorized Enhancement Model（FEM）框架分解RAW图像属性，开发RAW-guiding Exposure Enhancement Network（REENet），在训练阶段利用RAW图像约束模型，在测试阶段仅需sRGB图像。
ai_content.result: 实验表明，RAW图像的线性度和曝光时间对增强效果影响最大，REENet在多项指标上优于现有sRGB基方法，验证了RAW引导的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过将RAW图像特性纳入训练过程，REENet实现了无需RAW输入的低光增强，证明了RAW数据在提升模型性能中的关键价值。

search_text: Towards Low Light Enhancement with RAW Images 使用 RAW 图像实现低光增强 In this paper, we make the first benchmark effort to elaborate on the superiority of using RAW images in the low light enhancement and develop a novel alternative route to utilize RAW images in a more flexible and practical way. Inspired by a full consideration on the typical image processing pipeline, we are inspired to develop a new evaluation framework, Factorized Enhancement Model (FEM), which decomposes the properties of RAW images into measurable factors and provides a tool for exploring how properties of RAW images affect the enhancement performance empirically. The empirical benchmark results show that the Linearity of data and Exposure Time recorded in meta-data play the most critical role, which brings distinct performance gains in various measures over the approaches taking the sRGB images as input. With the insights obtained from the benchmark results in mind, a RAW-guiding Exposure Enhancement Network (REENet) is developed, which makes trade-offs between the advantages and inaccessibility of RAW images in real applications in a way of using RAW images only in the training phase. REENet projects sRGB images into linear RAW domains to apply constraints with corresponding RAW images to reduce the difficulty of modeling training. After that, in the testing phase, our REENet does not rely on RAW images. Experimental results demonstrate not only the superiority of REENet to state-of-the-art sRGB-based methods and but also the effectiveness of the RAW guidance and all components. 在本文中，我们首次进行基准测试，以阐述在低光增强中使用 RAW 图像的优越性，并开发一种新颖的替代途径，以更灵活和实用的方式利用 RAW 图像。受到对典型图像处理流程的充分考虑的启发，我们开发了一种新的评估框架——分解增强模型（FEM），它将RAW图像的属性分解为可测量的因素，并提供了一个工具来从经验上探索RAW图像的属性如何影响增强性能。实证基准测试结果表明，元数据中记录的数据线性和曝光时间起着最关键的作用，与以 sRGB 图像作为输入的方法相比，它在各种措施中带来了明显的性能提升。考虑到从基准测试结果中获得的见解，开发了一种 RAW 引导曝光增强网络（REENet），该网络以仅在训练阶段使用 RAW 图像的方式在实际应用中的 RAW 图像的优势和不可访问性之间进行权衡。 REENet 将 sRGB 图像投影到线性 RAW 域中，以对相应的 RAW 图像应用约束，从而降低建模训练的难度。之后，在测试阶段，我们的 REENet 不依赖于 RAW 图像。实验结果不仅证明了 REENet 相对于最先进的基于 sRGB 的方法的优越性，而且还证明了 RAW 引导和所有组件的有效性。 本文提出了一种利用RAW图像进行低光增强的新方法，通过构建评估框架和开发REENet网络，验证了RAW图像在提升增强效果中的关键作用。 Haofeng Huang,Wenhan Yang,Yueyu Hu,Jiaying Liu,Ling-Yu Duan eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Liang Liu,Zhao Kang,Ling Tian,Wenbo Xu,Xixu He
title: Multilayer Graph Contrastive Clustering Network
title_zh: 多层图对比聚类网络
abstract: Multilayer graph has garnered plenty of research attention in many areas due to their high utility in modeling interdependent systems. However, clustering of multilayer graph, which aims at dividing the graph nodes into categories or communities, is still at a nascent stage. Existing methods are often limited to exploiting the multiview attributes or multiple networks and ignoring more complex and richer network frameworks. To this end, we propose a generic and effective autoencoder framework for multilayer graph clustering named Multilayer Graph Contrastive Clustering Network (MGCCN). MGCCN consists of three modules: (1)Attention mechanism is applied to better capture the relevance between nodes and neighbors for better node embeddings. (2)To better explore the consistent information in different networks, a contrastive fusion strategy is introduced. (3)MGCCN employs a self-supervised component that iteratively strengthens the node embedding and clustering. Extensive experiments on different types of real-world graph data indicate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art techniques.
summary: Multilayer graph has garnered plenty of research attention in many areas due to their high utility in modeling interdependent systems. However, clustering of multilayer graph, which aims at dividing the graph nodes into categories or communities, is still at a nascent stage. Existing methods are often limited to exploiting the multiview attributes or multiple networks and ignoring more complex and richer network frameworks. To this end, we propose a generic and effective autoencoder framework for multilayer graph clustering named Multilayer Graph Contrastive Clustering Network (MGCCN). MGCCN consists of three modules: (1)Attention mechanism is applied to better capture the relevance between nodes and neighbors for better node embeddings. (2)To better explore the consistent information in different networks, a contrastive fusion strategy is introduced. (3)MGCCN employs a self-supervised component that iteratively strengthens the node embedding and clustering. Extensive experiments on different types of real-world graph data indicate that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art techniques.
abstract_zh: 多层图由于其在建模相互依赖的系统方面的高实用性而在许多领域引起了广泛的研究关注。然而，旨在将图节点划分为类别或社区的多层图聚类仍处于初级阶段。现有的方法通常仅限于利用多视图属性或多个网络，而忽略了更复杂和更丰富的网络框架。为此，我们提出了一种通用且有效的多层图聚类自动编码器框架，名为多层图对比聚类网络（MGCCN）。 MGCCN由三个模块组成：（1）应用注意力机制来更好地捕获节点和邻居之间的相关性，以获得更好的节点嵌入。 (2)为了更好地探索不同网络中的一致信息，引入了对比融合策略。 (3)MGCCN采用自我监督组件，迭代地加强节点嵌入和聚类。对不同类型的现实世界图数据的广泛实验表明，我们提出的方法优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MGCCN的多层图聚类网络，用于更有效地对多层图节点进行分类和社区划分。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在利用多视图属性或多个网络时，未能充分挖掘更复杂和丰富的网络框架信息，导致多层图聚类效果受限。
AI.method: MGCCN包含三个模块：1) 使用注意力机制捕捉节点与邻居的相关性；2) 引入对比融合策略挖掘不同网络的一致性信息；3) 采用自监督组件迭代优化节点嵌入和聚类结果。
AI.result: 在多种真实世界图数据上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进的聚类技术。
AI.conclusion: MGCCN通过注意力机制、对比融合和自监督学习的结合，为多层图聚类提供了通用且有效的解决方案。

title: Semi-supervised Salient Object Detection with Effective Confidence Estimation
title_zh: 具有有效置信度估计的半监督显着目标检测
abstract: The success of existing salient object detection models relies on a large pixel-wise labeled training dataset, which is time-consuming and expensive to obtain. We study semi-supervised salient object detection, with access to a small number of labeled samples and a large number of unlabeled samples. Specifically, we present a pseudo label based learn-ing framework with a Conditional Energy-based Model. We model the stochastic nature of human saliency labels using the stochastic latent variable of the Conditional Energy-based Model. It further enables generation of a high-quality pixel-wise uncertainty map, highlighting the reliability of corresponding pseudo label generated for the unlabeled sample. This minimises the contribution of low-certainty pseudo labels in optimising the model, preventing the error propagation. Experimental results show that the proposed strategy can effectively explore the contribution of unlabeled data. With only 1/16 labeled samples, our model achieves competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art fully-supervised models.
summary: The success of existing salient object detection models relies on a large pixel-wise labeled training dataset, which is time-consuming and expensive to obtain. We study semi-supervised salient object detection, with access to a small number of labeled samples and a large number of unlabeled samples. Specifically, we present a pseudo label based learn-ing framework with a Conditional Energy-based Model. We model the stochastic nature of human saliency labels using the stochastic latent variable of the Conditional Energy-based Model. It further enables generation of a high-quality pixel-wise uncertainty map, highlighting the reliability of corresponding pseudo label generated for the unlabeled sample. This minimises the contribution of low-certainty pseudo labels in optimising the model, preventing the error propagation. Experimental results show that the proposed strategy can effectively explore the contribution of unlabeled data. With only 1/16 labeled samples, our model achieves competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art fully-supervised models.
abstract_zh: 现有显着目标检测模型的成功依赖于大型像素级标记训练数据集，而获取该数据集既耗时又昂贵。我们研究半监督显着目标检测，访问少量标记样本和大量未标记样本。具体来说，我们提出了一个基于伪标签的学习框架和基于条件能量的模型。我们使用基于条件能量的模型的随机潜变量对人类显着性标签的随机性质进行建模。它还能够生成高质量的像素级不确定性图，突出为未标记样本生成的相应伪标签的可靠性。这最大限度地减少了低确定性伪标签在优化模型中的贡献，防止了错误传播。实验结果表明，所提出的策略可以有效地挖掘未标记数据的贡献。仅用 1/16 的标记样本，我们的模型就实现了与最先进的完全监督模型相比具有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于有效置信度估计的半监督显著性物体检测方法，通过利用少量标注样本和大量未标注样本提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有显著性物体检测模型依赖大量像素级标注数据，而标注过程耗时且成本高，需探索减少标注依赖的半监督方法。
AI.method: 设计基于伪标签的框架与条件能量模型，通过建模人类标注的随机性生成像素级不确定性图，筛选高可靠性伪标签以优化模型。
AI.result: 在仅使用1/16标注样本的情况下，模型性能与最先进的全监督方法相当，验证了未标注数据的有效利用。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过置信度估计有效减少伪标签误差传播，证明了半监督学习在显著性检测中的可行性与有效性。

With only 1/16 labeled samples, our model achieves competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art fully-supervised models. 现有显着目标检测模型的成功依赖于大型像素级标记训练数据集，而获取该数据集既耗时又昂贵。我们研究半监督显着目标检测，访问少量标记样本和大量未标记样本。具体来说，我们提出了一个基于伪标签的学习框架和基于条件能量的模型。我们使用基于条件能量的模型的随机潜变量对人类显着性标签的随机性质进行建模。它还能够生成高质量的像素级不确定性图，突出为未标记样本生成的相应伪标签的可靠性。这最大限度地减少了低确定性伪标签在优化模型中的贡献，防止了错误传播。实验结果表明，所提出的策略可以有效地挖掘未标记数据的贡献。仅用 1/16 的标记样本，我们的模型就实现了与最先进的完全监督模型相比具有竞争力的性能。 本文提出一种基于有效置信度估计的半监督显著性物体检测方法，通过利用少量标注样本和大量未标注样本提升检测性能。 Jiawei Liu,Jing Zhang,Nick Barnes cs.CV

authors_text: Jin Gao,Yan Lu,Xiaojuan Qi,Yutong Kou,Bing Li,Liang Li,Shan Yu,Weiming Hu
title: Recursive Least-Squares Estimator-Aided Online Learning for Visual Tracking
title_zh: 用于视觉跟踪的递归最小二乘估计器辅助在线学习
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. Extended version of the RLS-RTMDNet tracker (CVPR2020)
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. Extended version of the RLS-RTMDNet tracker (CVPR2020)
abstract: Tracking visual objects from a single initial exemplar in the testing phase has been broadly cast as a one-/few-shot problem, i.e., one-shot learning for initial adaptation and few-shot learning for online adaptation. The recent few-shot online adaptation methods incorporate the prior knowledge from large amounts of annotated training data via complex meta-learning optimization in the offline phase. This helps the online deep trackers to achieve fast adaptation and reduce overfitting risk in tracking. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective recursive least-squares estimator-aided online learning approach for few-shot online adaptation without requiring offline training. It allows an in-built memory retention mechanism for the model to remember the knowledge about the object seen before, and thus the seen data can be safely removed from training. This also bears certain similarities to the emerging continual learning field in preventing catastrophic forgetting. This mechanism enables us to unveil the power of modern online deep trackers without incurring too much extra computational cost. We evaluate our approach based on two networks in the online learning families for tracking, i.e., multi-layer perceptrons in RT-MDNet and convolutional neural networks in DiMP. The consistent improvements on several challenging tracking benchmarks demonstrate its effectiveness and efficiency.
summary: Tracking visual objects from a single initial exemplar in the testing phase has been broadly cast as a one-/few-shot problem, i.e., one-shot learning for initial adaptation and few-shot learning for online adaptation. The recent few-shot online adaptation methods incorporate the prior knowledge from large amounts of annotated training data via complex meta-learning optimization in the offline phase. This helps the online deep trackers to achieve fast adaptation and reduce overfitting risk in tracking. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective recursive least-squares estimator-aided online learning approach for few-shot online adaptation without requiring offline training. It allows an in-built memory retention mechanism for the model to remember the knowledge about the object seen before, and thus the seen data can be safely removed from training. This also bears certain similarities to the emerging continual learning field in preventing catastrophic forgetting. This mechanism enables us to unveil the power of modern online deep trackers without incurring too much extra computational cost. We evaluate our approach based on two networks in the online learning families for tracking, i.e., multi-layer perceptrons in RT-MDNet and convolutional neural networks in DiMP. The consistent improvements on several challenging tracking benchmarks demonstrate its effectiveness and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 在测试阶段跟踪来自单个初始样本的视觉对象已被广泛视为一次/几次射击问题，即用于初始适应的一次性学习和用于在线适应的几次射击学习。最近的几次在线适应方法通过离线阶段复杂的元学习优化结合了来自大量带注释的训练数据的先验知识。这有助于在线深度跟踪器实现快速适应并降低跟踪中的过度拟合风险。在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的递归最小二乘估计辅助在线学习方法，用于无需离线训练的小样本在线适应。它允许模型使用内置的内存保留机制来记住之前看到的对象的知识，因此可以安全地从训练中删除看到的数据。这也与新兴的持续学习领域在防止灾难性遗忘方面具有某些相似之处。这种机制使我们能够揭示现代在线深度跟踪器的强大功能，而不会产生太多额外的计算成本。我们基于在线学习系列中的两个跟踪网络（即 RT-MDNet 中的多层感知器和 DiMP 中的卷积神经网络）评估我们的方法。对几个具有挑战性的跟踪基准的持续改进证明了其有效性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需离线训练的递归最小二乘估计器辅助在线学习方法，用于视觉跟踪的少样本适应。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本在线适应方法依赖复杂离线元学习优化，存在计算成本高和过拟合风险，需更高效的在线学习方案。
AI.method: 基于递归最小二乘估计器设计在线学习框架，内置记忆保留机制以防止灾难性遗忘，无需保留已见数据。
AI.result: 在RT-MDNet和DiMP网络上验证，多个跟踪基准测试中表现一致提升，证明方法有效且高效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过在线深度跟踪器实现快速适应，兼具计算效率与防止遗忘能力，无需离线训练即可提升跟踪性能。

authors_text: Peng Tu,Yawen Huang,Feng Zheng,Zhenyu He,Liujun Cao,Ling Shao
title: GuidedMix-Net: Semi-supervised Semantic Segmentation by Using Labeled Images as Reference
title_zh: GuidedMix-Net：使用标记图像作为参考的半监督语义分割
comment: Accepted by AAAI'22. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.15064
comments: Accepted by AAAI'22. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2106.15064
abstract: Semi-supervised learning is a challenging problem which aims to construct a model by learning from limited labeled examples. Numerous methods for this task focus on utilizing the predictions of unlabeled instances consistency alone to regularize networks. However, treating labeled and unlabeled data separately often leads to the discarding of mass prior knowledge learned from the labeled examples. %, and failure to mine the feature interaction between the labeled and unlabeled image pairs. In this paper, we propose a novel method for semi-supervised semantic segmentation named GuidedMix-Net, by leveraging labeled information to guide the learning of unlabeled instances. Specifically, GuidedMix-Net employs three operations: 1) interpolation of similar labeled-unlabeled image pairs; 2) transfer of mutual information; 3) generalization of pseudo masks. It enables segmentation models can learning the higher-quality pseudo masks of unlabeled data by transfer the knowledge from labeled samples to unlabeled data. Along with supervised learning for labeled data, the prediction of unlabeled data is jointly learned with the generated pseudo masks from the mixed data. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012, and Cityscapes demonstrate the effectiveness of our GuidedMix-Net, which achieves competitive segmentation accuracy and significantly improves the mIoU by +7$\%$ compared to previous approaches.
summary: Semi-supervised learning is a challenging problem which aims to construct a model by learning from limited labeled examples. Numerous methods for this task focus on utilizing the predictions of unlabeled instances consistency alone to regularize networks. However, treating labeled and unlabeled data separately often leads to the discarding of mass prior knowledge learned from the labeled examples. %, and failure to mine the feature interaction between the labeled and unlabeled image pairs. In this paper, we propose a novel method for semi-supervised semantic segmentation named GuidedMix-Net, by leveraging labeled information to guide the learning of unlabeled instances. Specifically, GuidedMix-Net employs three operations: 1) interpolation of similar labeled-unlabeled image pairs; 2) transfer of mutual information; 3) generalization of pseudo masks. It enables segmentation models can learning the higher-quality pseudo masks of unlabeled data by transfer the knowledge from labeled samples to unlabeled data. Along with supervised learning for labeled data, the prediction of unlabeled data is jointly learned with the generated pseudo masks from the mixed data. Extensive experiments on PASCAL VOC 2012, and Cityscapes demonstrate the effectiveness of our GuidedMix-Net, which achieves competitive segmentation accuracy and significantly improves the mIoU by +7$\%$ compared to previous approaches.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习是一个具有挑战性的问题，旨在通过从有限的标记示例中学习来构建模型。用于此任务的许多方法都集中于仅利用未标记实例一致性的预测来规范网络。然而，单独处理标记数据和未标记数据通常会导致丢弃从标记示例中学到的大量先验知识。 ％，并且未能挖掘标记和未标记图像对之间的特征交互。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 GuidedMix-Net 的半监督语义分割新方法，通过利用标记信息来指导未标记实例的学习。具体来说，GuidedMix-Net 采用三种操作：1）相似标记-未标记图像对的插值； 2）相互信息的传递； 3）伪掩模的泛化。它使分割模型能够通过将知识从标记样本转移到未标记数据来学习未标记数据的更高质量的伪掩模。除了标记数据的监督学习之外，未标记数据的预测还与从混合数据生成的伪掩模共同学习。 PASCAL VOC 2012 和 Cityscapes 上的大量实验证明了我们的 GuidedMix-Net 的有效性，它实现了有竞争力的分割精度，并且与以前的方法相比，mIoU 显着提高了 +7$\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GuidedMix-Net方法，通过利用标注图像作为参考，提升半监督语义分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督方法单独处理标注与未标注数据，导致标注数据中的先验知识未被充分利用，且未挖掘两者的特征交互。
AI.method: GuidedMix-Net通过三个操作整合标注与未标注数据：1) 相似标注-未标注图像对的插值；2) 互信息迁移；3) 伪标签的泛化，从而生成高质量伪标签并联合优化模型。
AI.result: 在PASCAL VOC 2012和Cityscapes数据集上，该方法在mIoU指标上较先前方法提升7%，达到竞争性分割精度。
AI.conclusion: GuidedMix-Net通过有效整合标注与未标注数据的知识，显著提升了半监督语义分割的效果。

authors_text: Jianyuan Yu,Pu,Wang,Toshiaki Koike-Akino,Ye Wang,Philip V. Orlik,R. Michael Buehrer
title: Multi-Band Wi-Fi Sensing with Matched Feature Granularity
title_zh: 具有匹配特征粒度的多频段 Wi-Fi 传感
abstract: Complementary to the fine-grained channel state information (CSI) from the physical layer and coarse-grained received signal strength indicator (RSSI) measurements, the mid-grained spatial beam attributes (e.g., beam SNR) that are available at millimeter-wave (mmWave) bands during the mandatory beam training phase can be repurposed for Wi-Fi sensing applications. In this paper, we propose a multi-band Wi-Fi fusion method for Wi-Fi sensing that hierarchically fuses the features from both the fine-grained CSI at sub-6 GHz and the mid-grained beam SNR at 60 GHz in a granularity matching framework. The granularity matching is realized by pairing two feature maps from the CSI and beam SNR at different granularity levels and linearly combining all paired feature maps into a fused feature map with learnable weights. To further address the issue of limited labeled training data, we propose an autoencoder-based multi-band Wi-Fi fusion network that can be pre-trained in an unsupervised fashion. Once the autoencoder-based fusion network is pre-trained, we detach the decoders and append multi-task sensing heads to the fused feature map by fine-tuning the fusion block and re-training the multi-task heads from the scratch. The multi-band Wi-Fi fusion framework is thoroughly validated by in-house experimental Wi-Fi sensing datasets spanning three tasks: 1) pose recognition; 2) occupancy sensing; and 3) indoor localization. Comparison to four baseline methods (i.e., CSI-only, beam SNR-only, input fusion, and feature fusion) demonstrates the granularity matching improves the multi-task sensing performance. Quantitative performance is evaluated as a function of the number of labeled training data, latent space dimension, and fine-tuning learning rates.
summary: Complementary to the fine-grained channel state information (CSI) from the physical layer and coarse-grained received signal strength indicator (RSSI) measurements, the mid-grained spatial beam attributes (e.g., beam SNR) that are available at millimeter-wave (mmWave) bands during the mandatory beam training phase can be repurposed for Wi-Fi sensing applications. In this paper, we propose a multi-band Wi-Fi fusion method for Wi-Fi sensing that hierarchically fuses the features from both the fine-grained CSI at sub-6 GHz and the mid-grained beam SNR at 60 GHz in a granularity matching framework. The granularity matching is realized by pairing two feature maps from the CSI and beam SNR at different granularity levels and linearly combining all paired feature maps into a fused feature map with learnable weights. To further address the issue of limited labeled training data, we propose an autoencoder-based multi-band Wi-Fi fusion network that can be pre-trained in an unsupervised fashion. Once the autoencoder-based fusion network is pre-trained, we detach the decoders and append multi-task sensing heads to the fused feature map by fine-tuning the fusion block and re-training the multi-task heads from the scratch. Comparison to four baseline methods (i.e., CSI-only, beam SNR-only, input fusion, and feature fusion) demonstrates the granularity matching improves the multi-task sensing performance. Quantitative performance is evaluated as a function of the number of labeled training data, latent space dimension, and fine-tuning learning rates.
abstract_zh: 作为对来自物理层的细粒度信道状态信息 (CSI) 和粗粒度接收信号强度指示符 (RSSI) 测量的补充，在强制波束训练阶段在毫米波 (mmWave) 频段提供的中粒度空间波束属性（例如波束 SNR）可以重新用于 Wi-Fi 传感应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 Wi-Fi 传感的多频段 Wi-Fi 融合方法，该方法在粒度匹配框架中分层融合了 6 GHz 以下的细粒度 CSI 和 60 GHz 的中粒度波束 SNR 的特征。粒度匹配是通过将不同粒度级别的 CSI 和波束 SNR 的两个特征图进行配对，并将所有配对的特征图线性组合成具有可学习权重的融合特征图来实现的。为了进一步解决有限标记训练数据的问题，我们提出了一种基于自动编码器的多频段 Wi-Fi 融合网络，可以以无监督的方式进行预训练。一旦基于自动编码器的融合网络经过预训练，我们就可以分离解码器，并通过微调融合块并从头开始重新训练多任务传感头，将多任务传感头附加到融合特征图上。多频段 Wi-Fi 融合框架经过内部实验 Wi-Fi 传感数据集的彻底验证，涵盖三个任务：1）姿势识别； 2) 占用感应； 3）室内定位。与四种基线方法（即仅 CSI、仅波束 SNR、输入融合和特征融合）的比较表明，粒度匹配提高了多任务传感性能。定量性能根据标记训练数据的数量、潜在空间维度和微调学习率进行评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多频段Wi-Fi融合方法，通过匹配不同粒度的特征（子6GHz的CSI和60GHz的波束SNR）提升Wi-Fi感知性能。
AI.motivation: 现有Wi-Fi感知方法仅依赖细粒度CSI或粗粒度RSSI，未能充分利用毫米波频段强制波束训练阶段的中粒度空间波束属性（如波束SNR）。
AI.method: 构建分层特征融合框架，通过配对CSI与波束SNR的特征图并线性加权生成融合特征图；设计基于自编码器的无监督预训练网络，分离解码器后附加多任务感知头进行微调。
AI.result: 在三个任务（姿态识别、占用感知、室内定位）的实验数据集验证中，粒度匹配方法较四种基线方法性能提升，且对标注数据量、潜在空间维度和微调学习率具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 粒度匹配框架通过跨频段特征融合有效提升多任务感知性能，尤其在标注数据有限场景下表现优异，为多频段Wi-Fi感知提供新思路。

search_text: Multi-Band Wi-Fi Sensing with Matched Feature Granularity 具有匹配特征粒度的多频段 Wi-Fi 传感 Complementary to the fine-grained channel state information (CSI) from the physical layer and coarse-grained received signal strength indicator (RSSI) measurements, the mid-grained spatial beam attributes (e.g., beam SNR) that are available at millimeter-wave (mmWave) bands during the mandatory beam training phase can be repurposed for Wi-Fi sensing applications. In this paper, we propose a multi-band Wi-Fi fusion method for Wi-Fi sensing that hierarchically fuses the features from both the fine-grained CSI at sub-6 GHz and the mid-grained beam SNR at 60 GHz in a granularity matching framework. The granularity matching is realized by pairing two feature maps from the CSI and beam SNR at different granularity levels and linearly combining all paired feature maps into a fused feature map with learnable weights. To further address the issue of limited labeled training data, we propose an autoencoder-based multi-band Wi-Fi fusion network that can be pre-trained in an unsupervised fashion. Once the autoencoder-based fusion network is pre-trained, we detach the decoders and append multi-task sensing heads to the fused feature map by fine-tuning the fusion block and re-training the multi-task heads from the scratch. The multi-band Wi-Fi fusion framework is thoroughly validated by in-house experimental Wi-Fi sensing datasets spanning three tasks: 1) pose recognition; 2) occupancy sensing; and 3) indoor localization. Comparison to four baseline methods (i.e., CSI-only, beam SNR-only, input fusion, and feature fusion) demonstrates the granularity matching improves the multi-task sensing performance. Quantitative performance is evaluated as a function of the number of labeled training data, latent space dimension, and fine-tuning learning rates. 作为对来自物理层的细粒度信道状态信息 (CSI) 和粗粒度接收信号强度指示符 (RSSI) 测量的补充，在强制波束训练阶段在毫米波 (mmWave) 频段提供的中粒度空间波束属性（例如波束 SNR）可以重新用于 Wi-Fi 传感应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 Wi-Fi 传感的多频段 Wi-Fi 融合方法，该方法在粒度匹配框架中分层融合了 6 GHz 以下的细粒度 CSI 和 60 GHz 的中粒度波束 SNR 的特征。粒度匹配是通过将不同粒度级别的 CSI 和波束 SNR 的两个特征图进行配对，并将所有配对的特征图线性组合成具有可学习权重的融合特征图来实现的。为了进一步解决有限标记训练数据的问题，我们提出了一种基于自动编码器的多频段 Wi-Fi 融合网络，可以以无监督的方式进行预训练。一旦基于自动编码器的融合网络经过预训练，我们就可以分离解码器，并通过微调融合块并从头开始重新训练多任务传感头，将多任务传感头附加到融合特征图上。多频段 Wi-Fi 融合框架经过内部实验 Wi-Fi 传感数据集的彻底验证，涵盖三个任务：1）姿势识别； 2) 占用感应； 3）室内定位。与四种基线方法（即仅 CSI、仅波束 SNR、输入融合和特征融合）的比较表明，粒度匹配提高了多任务传感性能。定量性能根据标记训练数据的数量、潜在空间维度和微调学习率进行评估。 本文提出一种多频段Wi-Fi融合方法，通过匹配不同粒度的特征（子6GHz的CSI和60GHz的波束SNR）提升Wi-Fi感知性能。 Jianyuan Yu,Pu,Wang,Toshiaki Koike-Akino,Ye Wang,Philip V. title: Towards Relatable Explainable AI with the Perceptual Process
title_zh: 通过感知过程迈向相关可解释的人工智能
comment: 14 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables, accepted by chi2022
comments: 14 pages, 7 figures, 4 tables, accepted by chi2022
abstract: Machine learning models need to provide contrastive explanations, since people often seek to understand why a puzzling prediction occurred instead of some expected outcome. Current contrastive explanations are rudimentary comparisons between examples or raw features, which remain difficult to interpret, since they lack semantic meaning. We argue that explanations must be more relatable to other concepts, hypotheticals, and associations. Inspired by the perceptual process from cognitive psychology, we propose the XAI Perceptual Processing Framework and RexNet model for relatable explainable AI with Contrastive Saliency, Counterfactual Synthetic, and Contrastive Cues explanations. We investigated the application of vocal emotion recognition, and implemented a modular multi-task deep neural network to predict and explain emotions from speech. From think-aloud and controlled studies, we found that counterfactual explanations were useful and further enhanced with semantic cues, but not saliency explanations. This work provides insights into providing and evaluating relatable contrastive explainable AI for perception applications.
summary: Machine learning models need to provide contrastive explanations, since people often seek to understand why a puzzling prediction occurred instead of some expected outcome. Current contrastive explanations are rudimentary comparisons between examples or raw features, which remain difficult to interpret, since they lack semantic meaning. We argue that explanations must be more relatable to other concepts, hypotheticals, and associations. Inspired by the perceptual process from cognitive psychology, we propose the XAI Perceptual Processing Framework and RexNet model for relatable explainable AI with Contrastive Saliency, Counterfactual Synthetic, and Contrastive Cues explanations. We investigated the application of vocal emotion recognition, and implemented a modular multi-task deep neural network to predict and explain emotions from speech. From think-aloud and controlled studies, we found that counterfactual explanations were useful and further enhanced with semantic cues, but not saliency explanations. This work provides insights into providing and evaluating relatable contrastive explainable AI for perception applications.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型需要提供对比解释，因为人们经常试图理解为什么会发生令人费解的预测，而不是某些预期的结果。目前的对比解释是示例或原始特征之间的基本比较，但由于缺乏语义含义，仍然难以解释。我们认为解释必须与其他概念、假设和关联更相关。受认知心理学感知过程的启发，我们提出了 XAI 感知处理框架和 RexNet 模型，用于具有对比显着性、反事实合成和对比线索解释的相关可解释人工智能。我们研究了声音情感识别的应用，并实现了模块化多任务深度神经网络来预测和解释语音中的情感。从有声思考和对照研究中，我们发现反事实解释是有用的，并且通过语义线索进一步增强，但不是显着性解释。这项工作提供了为感知应用提供和评估相关对比可解释人工智能的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于感知过程的认知框架和模型，以增强AI解释的可关联性，特别是在对比性解释方面。
AI.motivation: 现有对比性解释方法依赖于示例或原始特征的简单比较，缺乏语义关联性，难以被用户理解。
AI.method: 受认知心理学感知过程启发，提出XAI感知处理框架和RexNet模型，包含对比显著性、反事实合成和对比线索三种解释方法，并在语音情感识别任务中验证。
AI.result: 实验表明反事实解释结合语义线索有效，而显著性解释效果不足，验证了框架在感知任务中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为感知类AI应用提供了可关联对比解释的新思路，强调反事实解释与语义线索结合的重要性。

title: Efficient Performance Bounds for Primal-Dual Reinforcement Learning from Demonstrations
title_zh: 来自演示的原始对偶强化学习的有效性能界限
abstract: We consider large-scale Markov decision processes with an unknown cost function and address the problem of learning a policy from a finite set of expert demonstrations. We assume that the learner is not allowed to interact with the expert and has no access to reinforcement signal of any kind. Existing inverse reinforcement learning methods come with strong theoretical guarantees, but are computationally expensive, while state-of-the-art policy optimization algorithms achieve significant empirical success, but are hampered by limited theoretical understanding. To bridge the gap between theory and practice, we introduce a novel bilinear saddle-point framework using Lagrangian duality. The proposed primal-dual viewpoint allows us to develop a model-free provably efficient algorithm through the lens of stochastic convex optimization. The method enjoys the advantages of simplicity of implementation, low memory requirements, and computational and sample complexities independent of the number of states. We further present an equivalent no-regret online-learning interpretation.
summary: We consider large-scale Markov decision processes with an unknown cost function and address the problem of learning a policy from a finite set of expert demonstrations. We assume that the learner is not allowed to interact with the expert and has no access to reinforcement signal of any kind. Existing inverse reinforcement learning methods come with strong theoretical guarantees, but are computationally expensive, while state-of-the-art policy optimization algorithms achieve significant empirical success, but are hampered by limited theoretical understanding. To bridge the gap between theory and practice, we introduce a novel bilinear saddle-point framework using Lagrangian duality. The proposed primal-dual viewpoint allows us to develop a model-free provably efficient algorithm through the lens of stochastic convex optimization. The method enjoys the advantages of simplicity of implementation, low memory requirements, and computational and sample complexities independent of the number of states. We further present an equivalent no-regret online-learning interpretation.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑具有未知成本函数的大规模马尔可夫决策过程，并解决从有限的专家演示集中学习策略的问题。我们假设学习者不允许与专家互动，也无法获得任何类型的强化信号。现有的逆强化学习方法具有强大的理论保证，但计算成本昂贵，而最先进的策略优化算法取得了显着的经验成功，但受到有限的理论理解的阻碍。为了弥合理论与实践之间的差距，我们引入了一种利用拉格朗日对偶性的新型双线性鞍点框架。所提出的原对偶观点使我们能够通过随机凸优化的视角开发一种无模型的可证明有效的算法。该方法具有实现简单、内存需求低以及计算和样本复杂性与状态数量无关的优点。我们进一步提出了等效的无悔在线学习解释。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在大规模马尔可夫决策过程中，如何从有限专家演示中学习策略，解决未知成本函数问题，并提出理论保证与计算效率兼顾的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有逆强化学习方法计算复杂度高，而策略优化算法缺乏理论支持，需桥接理论与实践差距，提出高效且可证明的算法。
AI.method: 引入双线性鞍点框架结合拉格朗日对偶性，通过随机凸优化视角设计模型无关算法，具备低内存、计算复杂度与状态数无关的特点，并提供无遗憾在线学习解释。
AI.result: 算法实现简单，内存需求低，计算和样本复杂度独立于状态数量，兼具理论保证与实践效率，且等价于无遗憾在线学习框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡理论分析与实际应用，在大规模强化学习中提供高效、可证明的策略学习方案，拓展了从演示中学习的适用场景。

search_text: Efficient Performance Bounds for Primal-Dual Reinforcement Learning from Demonstrations 来自演示的原始对偶强化学习的有效性能界限 We consider large-scale Markov decision processes with an unknown cost function and address the problem of learning a policy from a finite set of expert demonstrations. We assume that the learner is not allowed to interact with the expert and has no access to reinforcement signal of any kind. Existing inverse reinforcement learning methods come with strong theoretical guarantees, but are computationally expensive, while state-of-the-art policy optimization algorithms achieve significant empirical success, but are hampered by limited theoretical understanding. To bridge the gap between theory and practice, we introduce a novel bilinear saddle-point framework using Lagrangian duality. The proposed primal-dual viewpoint allows us to develop a model-free provably efficient algorithm through the lens of stochastic convex optimization. The method enjoys the advantages of simplicity of implementation, low memory requirements, and computational and sample complexities independent of the number of states. We further present an equivalent no-regret online-learning interpretation. 我们考虑具有未知成本函数的大规模马尔可夫决策过程，并解决从有限的专家演示集中学习策略的问题。我们假设学习者不允许与专家互动，也无法获得任何类型的强化信号。现有的逆强化学习方法具有强大的理论保证，但计算成本昂贵，而最先进的策略优化算法取得了显着的经验成功，但受到有限的理论理解的阻碍。为了弥合理论与实践之间的差距，我们引入了一种利用拉格朗日对偶性的新型双线性鞍点框架。所提出的原对偶观点使我们能够通过随机凸优化的视角开发一种无模型的可证明有效的算法。该方法具有实现简单、内存需求低以及计算和样本复杂性与状态数量无关的优点。我们进一步提出了等效的无悔在线学习解释。 本文研究在大规模马尔可夫决策过程中，如何从有限专家演示中学习策略，解决未知成本函数问题，并提出理论保证与计算效率兼顾的算法。 Angeliki Kamoutsi,Goran Banjac,John Lygeros cs.LG,cs.AI,math.OC

title: Pale Transformer: A General Vision Transformer Backbone with Pale-Shaped Attention
title_zh: Pale Transformer：具有 Pale-Shaped Attention 的通用视觉 Transformer 主干
abstract: Recently, Transformers have shown promising performance in various vision tasks. To reduce the quadratic computation complexity caused by the global self-attention, various methods constrain the range of attention within a local region to improve its efficiency. Consequently, their receptive fields in a single attention layer are not large enough, resulting in insufficient context modeling. To address this issue, we propose a Pale-Shaped self-Attention (PS-Attention), which performs self-attention within a pale-shaped region. Compared to the global self-attention, PS-Attention can reduce the computation and memory costs significantly. Meanwhile, it can capture richer contextual information under the similar computation complexity with previous local self-attention mechanisms. Based on the PS-Attention, we develop a general Vision Transformer backbone with a hierarchical architecture, named Pale Transformer, which achieves 83.4%, 84.3%, and 84.9% Top-1 accuracy with the model size of 22M, 48M, and 85M respectively for 224 ImageNet-1K classification, outperforming the previous Vision Transformer backbones. For downstream tasks, our Pale Transformer backbone performs better than the recent state-of-the-art CSWin Transformer by a large margin on ADE20K semantic segmentation and COCO object detection & instance segmentation. The code will be released on https://github.com/BR-IDL/PaddleViT.
summary: Recently, Transformers have shown promising performance in various vision tasks. To reduce the quadratic computation complexity caused by the global self-attention, various methods constrain the range of attention within a local region to improve its efficiency. Consequently, their receptive fields in a single attention layer are not large enough, resulting in insufficient context modeling. To address this issue, we propose a Pale-Shaped self-Attention (PS-Attention), which performs self-attention within a pale-shaped region. Compared to the global self-attention, PS-Attention can reduce the computation and memory costs significantly. Meanwhile, it can capture richer contextual information under the similar computation complexity with previous local self-attention mechanisms. Based on the PS-Attention, we develop a general Vision Transformer backbone with a hierarchical architecture, named Pale Transformer, which achieves 83.4%, 84.3%, and 84.9% Top-1 accuracy with the model size of 22M, 48M, and 85M respectively for 224 ImageNet-1K classification, outperforming the previous Vision Transformer backbones. For downstream tasks, our Pale Transformer backbone performs better than the recent state-of-the-art CSWin Transformer by a large margin on ADE20K semantic segmentation and COCO object detection & instance segmentation. The code will be released on https://github.com/BR-IDL/PaddleViT.
abstract_zh: 最近，变形金刚在各种视觉任务中表现出了可喜的表现。为了减少全局自注意力引起的二次计算复杂度，各种方法将注意力范围限制在局部区域内以提高其效率。因此，它们在单个注意力层中的感受野不够大，导致上下文建模不充分。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种苍白形状的自注意力（PS-Attention），它在苍白形状的区域内执行自注意力。与全局自注意力相比，PS-Attention 可以显着降低计算和内存成本。同时，它可以在与之前的局部自注意力机制相似的计算复杂度下捕获更丰富的上下文信息。基于 PS-Attention，我们开发了一种具有分层架构的通用 Vision Transformer 主干，名为 Pale Transformer，对于 224 ImageNet-1K 分类，其模型大小分别为 22M、48M 和 85M，达到 83.4%、84.3% 和 84.9% Top-1 准确率，优于之前的 Vision Transformer 主干。对于下游任务，我们的 Pale Transformer 主干在 ADE20K 语义分割和 COCO 对象检测和实例分割方面比最近最先进的 CSWin Transformer 表现得更好。代码将在 https://github.com/BR-IDL/PaddleViT 上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Pale Transformer的视觉Transformer主干网络，通过引入Pale-Shaped自注意力机制，在减少计算成本的同时提升上下文建模能力。
AI.motivation: 传统全局自注意力机制存在二次复杂度问题，而局部自注意力机制的感知域不足导致上下文建模能力有限，需平衡效率与性能。
AI.method: 设计Pale-Shaped自注意力（PS-Attention），在局部区域进行注意力计算，并构建分层架构的Pale Transformer主干网络。
AI.result: 在ImageNet-1K分类任务中，模型大小分别为22M、48M、85M时Top-1准确率达83.4%、84.3%、84.9%，在ADE20K和COCO下游任务上优于CSWin Transformer。
AI.conclusion: Pale Transformer通过创新的注意力机制有效平衡了计算效率与上下文建模能力，为视觉任务提供了更优的主干网络方案。
